step1.planPregnancyDesc: Shirya daukar ciki da sahihin bibiyar kwanakin haihuwa masu yiwuwa.

step5.title:
Sanarwar zagaye
(Fadakarwa)
step5.anonymousText: Rubutu ba tare da bayyanawa ba
step5.anonymousTooltip: Don kare sirrinki, sanarwar za su zo da rubutu na gama-gari (misali, 'Abin da ya faru na Eluna'), ba tare da nuna matakan zagaye a allon kulle ba.

mainScreen.expectedCycle: Zagayen da ake sa ran zai zo

expectedPeriodInfo.title: Al'ada
expectedPeriodInfo.desc: An ƙididdige wannan ranar ne bisa tarihin da kika shigar. Sauyawar kwanaki 2–3 al'ada ce ta jiki ga damuwa, rashin isasshen barci, ko sauyin yanayi.
expectedPeriodInfo.tip: Shawara: Don hasashen ya ƙara zama sahihi, ki rubuta alamominki da matakin damuwarki. Hakan yana taimaka wa tsarin ya fi fahimtar yanayin jikinki na musamman.

phase1.title: Shirye-shirye (Matakin Follicular)
phase1.desc: Jikinki yana fara shiryawa don sabon zagaye. Matakan FSH suna ƙarfafa girman follicle, suna ƙara estrogen a hankali tare da shimfiɗa tubalin ovulation mai zuwa.
phase1.tip: Shawara: Ki fara auna BBT kullum a lokaci ɗaya. Hakan yana samar da "ma'aunin asali" domin tsarin ya iya gano daidai lokacin da ƙwai ya fito.

phase2.title: Jiran lokaci (Tagar Haihuwa)
phase2.desc: Matakan estrogen na ƙaruwa, suna sa yanayin ya zama mai matuƙar dacewa ga maniyyi. "Mafi kyawun lokacinki" ya buɗe—damar samun ciki na ƙaruwa.
phase2.tip: Shawara: Ki fara yin gwajin LH sau biyu a rana. Kololuwar sinadarin hormone na nuna wa tsarin cewa ovulation zai faru cikin awanni 24–48.

phase3.title: Ovulation (Ranar Kololuwa)
phase3.desc: Wannan ne kololuwar yanayin halittarki. Matakan LH sun kai matsakaicin su, suna tayar da fitowar ƙwai. Wannan shi ne mafi ingancin lokaci a zagayenki don samun ciki.
phase3.tip: Shawara: Yau rana ce mai muhimmanci. Gwajin LH mai kyau tare da tabbataccen canjin BBT yana ba Eluna damar tabbatar da ovulation ɗinki da daidaito 100%.

phase4.title: Jiran sakamako (Matakin Luteal)
phase4.desc: Ovulation ya kammala, kuma matakan progesterone sun fara ƙaruwa. Yanzu jikinki yana samar da yanayin da zai iya tallafa wa dashewar ciki tare da kiyaye daidaiton cikin jiki.
phase4.tip: Shawara: Ki mayar da hankali kan hutu da ingantaccen barci. Ki ci gaba da rubuta bayanan alamomi: wannan yana taimaka wa tsarin fahimtar ko ciki ya samu.

averageCycleInfo.title: Matsakaicin Zagaye
averageCycleInfo.desc: Wannan shi ne matsakaicin tsawon zagayenki bisa watannin baya-bayan nan. Wannan ma'auni yana taimaka wa tsarin fahimtar salon zagayen jikinki da hasashen ranaku da daidaito har zuwa 95%.
averageCycleInfo.tip: Shawara: Ki ci gaba da rubuta ranakun fara al'adarki. Yayin da bayanan tarihi ke ƙaruwa, Eluna zai fi dacewa da tsarin jikinki na musamman kuma ya fi hasashen tagar haihuwarki daidai.

conceptionInfo.title: Damar Samun Ciki
conceptionInfo.descHigh: Mai yawa: Kina cikin tagar haihuwarki. Waɗannan su ne ranakun da suka fi dacewa don shirya samun ciki.
conceptionInfo.descMedium: Matsakaici: Tagar haihuwarki na gabatowa ko kuma ta ƙare kwanan nan. Yiwuwar samun ciki matsakaici ce.
conceptionInfo.descLow: Ƙasa: A wannan matakin na zagayenki, yiwuwar samun ciki kaɗan ce sosai.
conceptionInfo.howItWorksDesc:
• Tsarin yana nazarin zagayenki da alamomin halitta (BBT, LH, mucus)
• Yana ƙididdige tagar haihuwa (har zuwa kwanaki 6)
• Mafi girman yiwuwar tana ranar ovulation da ranar da ta gabace ta

confidenceInfo.title: Daidaiton Hasashe
confidenceInfo.descHigh: Aminci mai yawa: Tsarin ya tattara isassun bayanan alamomin halitta don yin ingantaccen hasashen lissafi.
confidenceInfo.descMedium: Aminci matsakaici: Hasashen ya fi dogara da matsakaicin bayanan baya. Ki ƙara gwaje-gwajen LH ko BBT domin ya fi dacewa da ke.
confidenceInfo.descLow: Aminci ƙasa: Tsarin bai da isassun bayanai game da zagayenki. Ki riƙa rubuta al'adarki da alamominki akai-akai don inganta daidaito.
confidenceInfo.howToImproveDesc:
• Ki riƙa rubuta ranakun al'adarki akai-akai
• Ki yi gwajin ovulation (LH)
• Ki auna kuma ki rubuta Basal Body Temperature (BBT)

Ovulation.tip: An saki kwai. Yiwuwar daukar ciki na raguwa.

LutealEarly.tip: Karfin jiki na iya fara raguwa.

LutealLate.tip: Alamomin PMS na iya bayyana. Ki kula da kanki.

menstruation.desc1: Karancin estrogen yana rage karfin garkuwar fata. Bushewa da saurin jin kaikayi na iya faruwa.
menstruation.tip1: Shawara: Yi amfani da wanke fuska mai laushi da danshi na asali.
menstruation.desc2: Jiki yana amfani da kuzari wajen sabunta rufin mahaifa. Matakin serotonin yana raguwa na dan lokaci.
menstruation.tip2: Shawara: Cikakken barcin dare da yawo a kafa za su taimaka miki ki murmure da sauri.
menstruation.desc3: Prostaglandins na iya jawo matsewar mahaifa da ciwon baya na kasa.
menstruation.tip3: Shawara: Kwalbar ruwan dumi ko wanka mai dumi zai taimaka wajen sassauta tsokoki masu laushi.

follicular.desc1: Karuwar estrogen na karfafa samar da collagen da hyaluronic acid. Fata tana kara matsewa.
follicular.tip1: Shawara: Wannan lokaci ne mai kyau don saka sabbin sinadarai masu aiki a tsarin kula da fatarki.
follicular.desc2: Hormones suna kara karfin tunani da juriya. Za ki ji karin kuzari.
follicular.tip2: Shawara: Shirya ayyuka mafi wahala da motsa jiki masu karfi a wadannan kwanaki.
follicular.desc3: Matakin dopamine yana karuwa, yana sa ki fi son mu'amala da mutane kuma ki ji kwarin gwiwa.
follicular.tip3: Shawara: Lokaci ne mai kyau don fadada hulda da yin magana a bainar jama'a.

ovulatory.desc1: Estrogen yana kaiwa kololuwa, ramukan fata suna raguwa, kuma launin fuska yana fi daidaito. Za ki yi kama da wacce ta huta sosai.
ovulatory.tip1: Shawara: Kadan daga kayan kwalliya zai fito da kyawunki na dabi'a.
ovulatory.desc2: Kololuwar testosterone da estrogen na ba da mafi girman ƙarfi na jiki da sha'awar jima'i.
ovulatory.tip2: Shawara: Yi amfani da wannan kuzari wajen cim ma manyan burikanki.
ovulatory.desc3: Jikinki yana nuna shirinsa na ɗaukar ciki ta hanyar ƙara alamun haihuwa.
ovulatory.tip3: Shawara: Saurari saƙonnin jikinki; a yanzu kina da matuƙar saurin ji.

luteal.desc1: Progesterone yana motsa glandan mai na fata, wanda zai iya jawo kuraje.
luteal.tip1: Shawara: Mai da hankali kan tsaftace fata mai kyau da kuma mask na tsarkake fata.
luteal.desc2: Jiki yana riƙe sodium, wanda kan haifar da ɗan kumburi da nauyi a jiki.
luteal.tip2: Shawara: Rage amfani da gishiri, sannan ki ƙara sauƙaƙan tausa don fitar da ruwa a jiki.
luteal.desc3: Raguwar hormones kafin zagaye na iya haifar da saurin fushi (PMS).
luteal.tip3: Shawara: Yi atisayen nutsuwa kuma ki ƙirƙiri yanayi mafi kwanciyar hankali a kewaye da ke.

menstruation.title: Nutsuwa da Farfaɗowa
menstruation.desc: Lokaci ne na rage gudu da sauraron kanki. Jikinki yana sabunta kansa, yana karkatar da dukkan ƙarfi zuwa farfaɗowa da hutu.
menstruation.skin: Saurin jin fata ya ƙaru. Bushewa da rashin haske na iya faruwa. Ana ba da shawarar laushin danshi da guje wa peeling mai tsauri.
menstruation.energy: Matakan hormone sun yi ƙasa. Akwai raguwar ƙarfi na jiki da mayar da hankali a dabi'a. Lokaci ne mai kyau don cikakken barci da yawo cikin natsuwa.
menstruation.body: Ayyukan tsarkake jiki suna gudana. Ana iya jin rashin daɗi a ƙasan baya da ƙasan ciki. Ɗan dumi da hutu za su taimaka wajen sassauta tsokoki.

follicular.title: Tashi da Sabon Fara
follicular.desc: Kuzari yana dawowa tare da ƙaruwa a estrogen. Wannan ne mafi dacewa don sabbin farawa, tsare-tsare masu aiki, da ci gaba cikin kwarin gwiwa.
follicular.skin: Yanayin fata yana inganta da sauri. Lokaci ne mai kyau don sabbin kulawar kwalliya, peeling mai laushi ko tsaftacewa.
follicular.energy: Estrogen yana ƙaruwa. Juriya tana dawowa. Lokaci ne mai kyau don motsa jiki mai ƙarfi da cardio.
follicular.body: Jikinki yana jin sauƙi. Sassauci da daidaituwa suna inganta, tsokoki kuma suna amsawa da sauri ga nauyi.

ovulatory.title: Kololuwa da Haski
ovulatory.desc: Wannan ne kololuwar yanayin jikinki. Kina a mafi girman jan hankali da kwarin gwiwa—lokaci mafi dacewa don haskakawa da nuna kuzarin ki ga duniya.
ovulatory.skin: Fatarki tana bayyana da haske, laushi, kuma a sarari. Sauƙaƙƙen tsarin kula da fata na yau da kullum ya isa a yanzu.
ovulatory.energy: Kololuwar kuzarin jiki da zamantakewa. Shirya muhimman tarurruka, alƙawura, da manyan ayyuka.
ovulatory.body: Sha'awar jima'i tana da yawa. Kina a mafi jan hankali, jikinki kuma yana jin ƙarfi da juriya.

luteal.title: Natsuwa da Kulawa
luteal.desc: Lokaci ne na rage gudu a hankali da mai da hankali a ciki. Kewaye kanki da jin daɗi, rage sauri, kuma ki yi wa kanki alheri gwargwadon iko.
luteal.skin: Ana iya samun ƙarin mai a fata da kuraje. Ki tsaftace a hankali, ki guji goge fata mai tsauri.
luteal.energy: Estrogen yana raguwa, saurin fushi na iya faruwa. Ki yi ƙoƙarin samun ƙarin barci kuma ki jinkirta ayyukan da ke buƙatar kuzari mai yawa.
luteal.body: Progesterone yana ƙaruwa. Ana iya samun riƙe ruwa a jiki, taushin nono, da ɗan kumburin ciki. Ki tausaya wa kanki.

calendarScreen.matchesForVisiblePeriod: da suka dace a lokacin da ake gani
calendarScreen.anomalyGenericTitle: Bayanan da ba su saba ba
calendarScreen.anomalyGenericDesc: Kin shigar da bayanan da suka fita daga zagayowar al'ada. Kina da tabbacin kina son adana su a matsayin bayanan da ba su saba ba?
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleLongTitle: Tsawon zagayowar da ba ya saba
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleLongDesc: Kin saita tsawon zagayowar zuwa kwanaki {{cLength}}. Wannan ya wuce abin da aka saba sosai. Wataƙila kin manta da rubuta al'adarki ta baya? Idan kina da tabbacin komai daidai ne, za ki iya adana wannan bayanin a matsayin wanda ba ya saba.
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleShortTitle: Gajeren zagayowar da ba ya saba
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleShortDesc: Kin saita tsawon zagayowar zuwa kwanaki {{cLength}} kacal. Wannan ya fita daga yanayin jiki na al'ada. Kina da tabbacin kina son adana shi a matsayin bayanin da ba ya saba?
calendarScreen.anomalyMensesTitle: Jinin al'ada da ba ya saba
calendarScreen.anomalyMensesDesc: Kin saita tsawon jinin al'ada zuwa kwanaki {{mLength}}. A yawanci, ba ya wuce kwanaki 7-8. Ki tabbatar ba ki zaɓi ƙarin kwanaki da kuskure ba.
calendarScreen.anomalySaveBtn: Adana a matsayin wanda ba ya saba
calendarScreen.anomalousMensesAlert: Wannan jinin al'ada ya yi kama da ya fi tsawo fiye da yadda aka saba (fiye da kwanaki 14). Don kiyaye daidaiton hasashe, muna la'akari da kwanaki 14 na farko kawai.
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleWarning: Wannan zagayowar ya yi kama da ba na al'ada ba, don haka an cire shi daga hasashen lissafi. Da fatan za ki duba ranakun al'adarki.

addLogModal.notesPlaceholder: Bayyana alamominki ko tunaninki (har zuwa haruffa 1000)...

items.energy_vivid_dreams: Mafarkai masu ƙarfi / Mafarkai masu tsoro

insights.phase1Focus: Mayar da hankali: Farfaɗowa da kula da kai
insights.day1: Al'ada ta fara. Progesterone yana raguwa, wanda ke sa rufin mahaifa ya zube kuma na iya jawo ciwon mara.
insights.day2: Jini ya fi yawa. Kina iya jin ƙarin gajiya da barci saboda asarar baƙin ƙarfe.
insights.day3: Jiki yana daidaitawa. Kumburi a jiki yana raguwa, kuma ciwon mara yana sauƙaƙa.
insights.day4: Estrogen yana fara ƙaruwa a hankali. Yanayi yana daidaita, kuma fata tana ƙara haske.
insights.day5: Wannan mataki na ƙarewa. Ƙarfi yana dawowa yayin da jiki ke shirin balagar sabon ƙwai.
insights.phase2Focus: Mayar da hankali: Ƙarfi, ƙirƙira da haske
insights.day6_8: Estrogen yana ƙaruwa. Za ki iya lura da ƙarin mayar da hankali da sha'awar hulɗa da mutane.
insights.day9_10: Fata tana haskawa. Hormones suna ƙarfafa samar da collagen, kuma sha'awar jima'i tana fara ƙaruwa.
insights.day11_12: Lokacin haihuwa ya buɗe. Ruwan farji yana ƙara laushi da yawa ('mai kauri' ko 'mai ruwa'), kuma yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki tana ƙaruwa.
insights.day13: Kololuwar kafin ovulation. Mafi girman ƙarfi da jin tabbaci kafin a saki ƙwai.
insights.day14: Ovulation. An saki ƙwai. Ana iya jin ɗan zafi a gefe na ciki (mittelschmerz) da kuma kololuwar sha'awar jima'i.
insights.day15: Mafi dacewar lokacin ya rufe. Zafin jikin asali yana fara ƙaruwa, yana tabbatar da cewa ovulation ya kammala.
insights.phase4Focus: Mayar da hankali: Rage gudu da kula da kai
insights.day16_18: Progesterone ya fara rinjaye. Za ki iya jin natsuwa da ɗan rage sha'awar hulɗa da mutane.
insights.day19_21: Lokacin dashewar ƙwai. Jiki yana cikin yanayin jira, kuma narkewar abinci tana ɗan sauri kaɗan.
insights.day22_24: Farkon PMS. Ana iya samun taushin nono, kumburi, da ɗan saurin fushi.
insights.day25_26: Yanayin zuciya ba ya daidaita sosai. Ragin hormones na iya jawo damuwa ko baƙin ciki.
insights.day27_28: Yanayin jira. Jiki yana shirin sabon zagaye. Rage motsa jiki mai nauyi kuma ki tabbatar kina samun ingantaccen barci.

daily.cycleLonger: Zagayowar al'adarki ya fi yadda aka saba tsawo. Ki kula da lafiyarki sosai.
daily.anovulatory: Akwai yiwuwar tsarin rashin ovulation. Ki ci gaba da bibiyar LH strips.
daily.normal: Bayanan suna cikin lafiyayyun ma'auni. Rana ce mai kyau don ki mai da hankali ga kanki!

hero.onTrackDesc: Zagayenki na yanzu yana dacewa da tsarin da aka gani a baya.
hero.startDesc: Ki rubuta alamomi kowace rana don buɗe nazarin da aka keɓance miki.
hero.outlierDesc: Zagayenki na yanzu ya bambanta sosai da kewayon da aka saba gani a gare ki.
hero.slightDeviationDesc: Akwai ƙananan bambance-bambance, amma har yanzu suna cikin abin da ake ɗauka a matsayin al'ada.
hero.learningDesc: Algoritim ɗin yana koyon tsarin zagayowarki na musamman.
hero.preliminaryNote: Amintaccen hasashe yana nufin ana buƙatar ƙarin bayanan zagayowarki na baya domin a tantance matsakaicin tsarin jikinki na yau da kullum.
hero.anomaliesDesc: Mun gano bayanai da suka fita daga al'ada a tarihinki. Muna amfani da zagaye {{validCount}} daga cikin {{totalCount}}.
hero.gatheringTitle: Ana ci gaba da tattara bayanai
hero.gatheringDesc: Muna buƙatar wasu ƙarin zagaye kaɗan don gina cikakken bayanin kididdigarki.

medicalExplanation.whyDoYouFeel: Me ya sa kike jin haka?
medicalExplanation.follicularNormal: A lokacin matakin follicular, sinadarin estrogen yana fara ƙaruwa, wanda sau da yawa ke da alaƙa da ƙarin kuzari da ingantaccen yanayi. Wannan alama ce cewa jikinki yana shirin yin ovulation.

patterns.frequent: Mun lura cewa kina yawan shigar da wannan alamar a wannan mataki na zagayowarki na baya.
patterns.historicalMatchSandwich: Mun nazarci bayananki kuma mun lura cewa kin fuskanci irin wannan a zagayowarki na baya a wannan mataki. Wannan na iya kasancewa yana da alaƙa da yadda jikinki ke amsawa ga sauye-sauyen hormones.

recovery.title: Binciken bayanai
recovery.severeTitle: An gano bayanan da ba daidai ba masu hana nazari
recovery.severeDescription: Waɗannan bayanan suna da tsawon da ba ya saba. Sau da yawa hakan na faruwa idan kin manta da rubuta ɗaya daga cikin al'adunki, wanda ke sa zagayowar ya yi tsawo. Don guje wa hasashen ƙarya, an cire waɗannan zagayowar na ɗan lokaci daga nazarin Eluna.
recovery.highAnomalyTitle: Yawan bayanan da suka fita al'ada ya yi tsanani
recovery.highAnomalyDesc: Fiye da 80% na bayananki sun fita daga zagayowar al'ada. Muna ba da shawarar ki sake duba ranakun, domin hakan yana rage daidaiton hasashe sosai.
recovery.warningDesc: Yawancin zagayowarki sun fi tsawo ko sun fi guntu fiye da matsakaici. Ana haɗa su a nazari, amma suna rage amincin gaba ɗaya na tsarin.
recovery.autoFixDesc: Za mu rage tsawon jinin al'ada da ba ya saba zuwa kwanaki 14 domin dawo da nazari. Za a iya soke wannan a kowane lokaci.

anomaly.title: Bayanan da ba su saba ba
anomaly.desc: Nazari ya dogara ne da zagayowar {{used}} daga cikin {{total}}. An cire zagayowar {{excluded}} daga hasashe saboda ba su saba ba.

settings.title: Saituna
settings.footer: An ɓoye duk bayanai kuma ana adana su ne kawai a wannan na'urar
settings.resetDisclaimer: Kin tabbata? Wannan aikin zai goge tarihin alamominki, zagayowarki, da saitunanki har abada. Ba za a iya dawo da bayanan ba.
settings.shareAppMessage: Eluna manhaja ce mai ban mamaki ta bibiyar zagayowar jiki tare da cikakkiyar kariyar sirri. Gwada ta: {{url}}

common.somethingWentWrong: Wani abu ya faskara. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

privacy.title: 1. Manufofin Sirri
privacy.subtitle: BAYANANKI NAKI NE KAƊAI
privacy.p1: Mun yi imani cewa bayanan lafiyar mata su ne mafi sirrin ɓangare na rayuwa. Saboda haka, an gina Eluna bisa ƙa'idar Zero-Knowledge:
privacy.p2: Adanawa a Na'ura: Duk alamomi, kwanaki, da bayanan da kika shigar ana adana su ne kawai a cikin rumbun bayanai mai ɓoyewa a kan na'urarki.
privacy.p3: Babu Sabar: Eluna ba ta da sabar tsakiya da ke tattara bayananki na sirri. Ba za mu iya gani, sayarwa, ko miƙa bayananki ga wasu ɓangarori ba, domin ba mu da damar shiga gare su.
privacy.p4: Alhakinki: Tun da ana adana bayanai a na'ura, tsaronsu yana hannunki. Idan kika goge app ɗin ba tare da ajiyar girgije ba, bayanan za su ɓace har abada.

eula.title: 2. Yarjejeniyar Lasisin Mai Amfani na Ƙarshe (EULA)
eula.subtitle: SHARUƊƊAN AMFANI NA ELUNA
eula.p1: Lasisin Amfani: Eluna tana ba ki lasisi na kanki, ba na keɓancewa kaɗai ba, domin amfani da app ɗin don bukatun kanki.
eula.p2: Sabuntawa: Muna ci gaba da inganta tsarin hasashenmu, saboda haka ana iya sabunta ayyuka da fasalin dubawa.
eula.p3: Biyan PRO: Ana ba da fasalolin da ake biya bisa ga sharuɗɗan tsarin da kika zaɓa. Ana sarrafa biyan kuɗi da mayar da kuɗi ta Apple App Store / Google Play Store.
eula.p4: Iyakar Alhaki: Mai haɓaka app ba shi da alhakin matsalolin fasaha da suka samo asali daga tsarin aiki na na'urarki.

disclaimer.title: 3. Gargaɗin Likita
disclaimer.subtitle: LURA: WANNAN BA NA'URAR LIKITA BA CE
disclaimer.p1: Eluna kayan aiki ne na sa ido da nuna yanayin sauye-sauyen halittarki. Bayanan da ke cikin app ɗin don sanarwa ne kawai.
disclaimer.p2: Ba Hanyar Hana Ciki Ba Ce: Hasashen Eluna (har da "Golden Days") ba za a yi amfani da su a matsayin hanyar hana ɗaukar ciki ba.
disclaimer.p3: Ba Ganewar Cuta Ba Ce: Eluna ba ta maye gurbin shawarar likita. Duk shawarar lafiya, har da shan magunguna, dole ne a tattauna da ƙwararre.
disclaimer.p4: Bambancin Jiki: Daidaiton hasashe yana dogara da yadda zagayowarki ke daidaito da kuma yadda kike cika bayananki akai-akai. Zagayowar halitta na iya sauyawa sakamakon damuwa, rashin lafiya, da wasu abubuwan waje.
disclaimer.p5: Ta amfani da Eluna, kina tabbatar da cewa kin ɗauki cikakken alhakin duk shawarar da aka yanke bisa bayanan app ɗin.

texts.t3: Hypothalamus yana tsara bugun zagayowar al’ada ta hanyar sakin GnRH a bugawa-bugawa.
texts.t4: Hypothalamus shi ne babban mai daidaita axis na hypothalamus–pituitary–ovary. Yana sakin GnRH ne a bugawa-bugawa maimakon a ci gaba ba tare da tsayawa ba; tsarin waɗannan bugun ne ke ƙayyade sakin FSH da LH.
texts.t5: Rawar hypothalamus a zagayowar al’ada muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t6: Hypothalamus yana daidaita zagayowar al’ada ta hanyar neurons na GnRH. Suna sakin GnRH a bugawa-bugawa, ba a ci gaba ba. A lokacin follicular phase, yawan bugun yakan ƙaru, yayin da a luteal phase yake raguwa ƙarƙashin tasirin progesterone. Matsaloli a daidaitawar hypothalamus na iya haifar da rashin yin ovulation, ƙarancin zuwan al’ada, da functional hypothalamic amenorrhea.
texts.t7: idan zagayowar al’ada ta zama ba daidai ba, tana zuwa da tazara mai tsawo sosai, ko kuma ta tsaya
texts.t8: idan akwai alamun rashin yin ovulation, rashin haihuwa, ko kuma alamun matsalar hormones masu tsanani
texts.t9: idan alamun suna ƙaruwa da sauri, jini yana zuba sosai, akwai matsanancin ciwon kai, matsalar gani, ko kuma ana zargin ciki da ba daidai ba
texts.t16: Ƙimomi suna dogara da hanyar gwaji, dakin gwaje-gwaje, shekaru, yanayin asibiti, da ranar zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t18: haɗuwar rashin al’ada da rage nauyi, damuwa, ko motsa jiki fiye da kima
texts.t19: ya kamata a tantance hormone ɗin bisa ga matakin zagayowar al’ada, alamomi, da manufar asibiti
texts.t20: ci gaba da karkacewar hormone tare da alamomi da rikicewar zagayowar al’ada
texts.t23: alamun da ke ƙaruwa da sauri
texts.t29: ana iya bayyana ilimin yadda jiki ke aiki da fassarar asibiti
texts.t30: ba za a iya yin ganewar asali daga alama guda ɗaya ko gwaji guda ɗaya ba tare da cikakken mahallin bayani ba
texts.t31: maimaituwar rikicewar zagayowar al’ada ko alamomi masu tsanani na buƙatar binciken musabbabin su
texts.t34: idan akwai rashin al’ada/rashin yin ovulation da gonadotropins masu ƙasa-ko-kusa da al’ada -> a yi la’akari da dannewar axis daga tsakiya
texts.t35: idan akwai damuwa, ƙarancin kuzari, ko motsa jiki fiye da kima -> a tantance yiwuwar functional hypothalamic dysfunction
texts.t36: yin ganewar asali daga gwaji guda ɗaya a wajen mahallin asibiti
texts.t37: fassara hormones ba tare da la’akari da matakin zagayowar al’ada da ovulation ba
texts.t39: alama guda ɗaya ba tare da maimaituwar tsari a zagayowar al’ada ba
texts.t40: fayyace rawar ilimin jiki ta hormone ko axis
texts.t41: bayyana yadda wannan ke da alaƙa da matakan zagayowar al’ada
texts.t42: ƙara fassarar asibiti da alamun gargaɗi
texts.t46: Hypothalamus yana daidaita zagayowar al’ada ta hanyar sakin GnRH a bugawa-bugawa.
texts.t47: Rikicewar daidaitawar hypothalamus na iya haifar da rashin al’ada da rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t48: An ba fifiko ga ƙa’idojin asibiti, Endotext/NCBI Bookshelf, da bita kan endocrinology na haihuwa.
texts.t59: fayyace matakin zagayowar al’ada da ko ovulation ya faru
texts.t60: daidaita bayanan dakin gwaje-gwaje da alamomi da ultrasound/tarihin lafiya
texts.t61: idan karkacewar ta ci gaba, a nemo babban musabbabi maimakon takaita ga bayanin sakamakon kawai
texts.t62: kada a fassara hormones a ware daga yadda marar lafiya ke gabatar da alamomi
texts.t63: kada a yi amfani da kalmomin yau da kullum a madadin ganewar asali
texts.t64: Fassarar hormones na buƙatar la’akari da mahallin asibiti, matakin zagayowar al’ada, da hanyar gwaji; sauƙaƙawa iri ɗaya ga kowa sau da yawa na iya ruɗarwa.
texts.t66: Rawar gland ɗin pituitary a zagayowar al’ada
texts.t67: Gland ɗin pituitary da zagayowar al’ada
texts.t68: Gland ɗin pituitary tana juya saƙonnin GnRH zuwa sakin FSH da LH.
texts.t69: Anterior pituitary tana amsa ga GnRH ta hanyar sakin FSH da LH, waɗanda kuma ke tayar da girman follicle, samar da estradiol, ovulation, da luteinization.
texts.t70: Rawar gland ɗin pituitary a zagayowar al’ada muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t71: Gland ɗin pituitary ita ce babban mai shiga tsakani tsakanin hypothalamus da ovaries. FSH yafi tallafa wa girman follicle da samar da estradiol a granulosa cells, yayin da LH ke motsa theca cells kuma yana da hannu a ovulation da samuwar corpus luteum. Sauye-sauye a matakin pituitary na iya rikita zagayowar ovulation ko da ovaries suna nan lafiya.
texts.t74: alamun da ke tsananta da lokaci
texts.t75: rawar gland ɗin pituitary a zagayowar al’ada
texts.t76: gland ɗin pituitary da zagayowar al’ada
texts.t78: idan prolactin yana ci gaba da hawa -> a kawar da yiwuwar magunguna, ciki, hypothyroidism, da prolactinoma
texts.t79: idan akwai galactorrhea, rashin al’ada, ko rashin haihuwa -> ana buƙatar binciken musabbabin pituitary
texts.t80: Gland ɗin pituitary tana amsa ga GnRH da sakin FSH da LH.
texts.t81: Ana saka matsalolin pituitary cikin jerin yiwuwar ganewar asali na rashin al’ada da rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t86: Menene GnRH kuma me yasa ake buƙatarsa
texts.t87: GnRH hormone ne mai sakin gonadotropin, shi ne babban saƙo daga hypothalamus zuwa gland ɗin pituitary.
texts.t88: Ana buƙatar GnRH domin gland ɗin pituitary ta saki FSH da LH. Sakin sa a bugawa-bugawa yana da matuƙar muhimmanci: idan aka ba shi a ci gaba, receptors na pituitary suna rasa jin amsawa.
texts.t89: Menene GnRH kuma me yasa ake buƙatarsa — muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t90: GnRH shi ne babban maɓallin neuroendocrine na haihuwa. Sakin sa a bugawa-bugawa yana kiyaye aikin axis na HPO yadda ya kamata; sauye-sauye a yawan bugun suna shafar tsarin LH da FSH a matakai daban-daban na zagayowar al’ada. Saboda haka, a aikin asibiti, agonists da antagonists na GnRH na iya ko dai su motsa ko su danne aikin haihuwa gwargwadon yadda ake ba da su.
texts.t91: menene gnrh kuma me yasa ake buƙatarsa
texts.t93: GnRH yana aiki iri ɗaya idan an ba shi a ci gaba ko a bugawa-bugawa
texts.t96: GnRH shi ne babban motsawar hypothalamus don sakin FSH da LH.
texts.t97: Sakin GnRH a bugawa-bugawa ya zama dole domin kiyaye aikin pituitary yadda ya kamata.
texts.t100: FSH yana motsa girman follicle kuma yana taimakawa zaɓen babban follicle.
texts.t101: FSH yafi aiki a kan granulosa cells, yana tallafa wa girman antral follicles, bayyana aromatase, da samar da estradiol.
texts.t102: FSH muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t103: FSH yana da muhimmanci musamman a farkon da tsakiyar follicular phase. Matakan FSH suna tashi yayin sauyawa daga luteal phase zuwa farkon follicular phase, suna ba da damar ɗaukar rukuni na follicles. A aikin asibiti, ana ɗaukar FSH a matsayin wani ɓangare na hoton ovarian reserve amma ba a taɓa fassara shi shi kaɗai ba ba tare da shekaru, estradiol, AMH, da manufar asibiti ba.
texts.t105: FSH kaɗai yana nuna haihuwa daidai
texts.t106: FSH na al’ada yana kawar da raguwar ovarian reserve
texts.t109: idan manufar ita ce tantance ovarian reserve -> a fassara alamomi tare, ba a ware ba
texts.t110: idan FSH ya tashi kuma akwai hypoestrogenism -> a yi la’akari da raguwar aikin ovary/POI a mahallin da ya dace
texts.t111: FSH yana tallafa wa girman follicle da samar da estradiol.
texts.t112: A aikin asibiti, ba a fassara FSH shi kaɗai ba, sai tare da sauran alamomin ovarian reserve.
texts.t116: daidaita alamar da shekaru da manufar asibiti
texts.t117: idan ya zama dole, a ƙara AFC/ultrasound da sauran alamomin ovarian reserve
texts.t118: kada a yanke hukunci daga gwaji guda ɗaya ba tare da mahallin bayani ba
texts.t120: Ana buƙatar LH domin cikar balagar follicle, ovulation, da samuwar corpus luteum.
texts.t121: A follicular phase, LH yana motsa theca cells, kuma kololuwar LH kafin ovulation tana tayar da ci gaba da meiosis na oocyte, fashewar follicle, da luteinization.
texts.t122: LH muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t123: LH ba kawai abin tayar da ovulation ba ne. A rabin farko na zagayowar al’ada, yana tallafa wa samar da androgens a theca cells, waɗanda daga baya ake mayar da su estrogens. Idan matakan estradiol masu yawa suka daɗe, sai a samu tashin LH wanda ke tayar da ovulation. Bayan haka, ana buƙatar LH domin aikin farko na corpus luteum.
texts.t127: idan akwai kololuwar LH sannan progesterone/BBT ya tashi -> akwai yiwuwar ovulation ya faru
texts.t128: idan jini ya zo amma babu alamun luteal phase -> kada a ɗauki ovulation a matsayin tabbatacce
texts.t129: alama guda ɗaya ba tare da tabbaci daga wasu alamomi ba
texts.t130: jini a matsayin alama kaɗai ta ovulation
texts.t131: Ana buƙatar LH domin balagar oocyte kafin ovulation da fashewar follicle.
texts.t132: Tazarar tsakanin fara tashin LH da ovulation tana bambanta tsakanin mata.
texts.t133: estradiol mai yawa da ya daɗe
texts.t139: Babban estrogens sun haɗa da estradiol, estrone, da estriol; a shekarun haihuwa, estradiol shi ne mafi muhimmanci.
texts.t140: Estrogens suna daidaita yawaitar endometrium, halayen cervical mucus, tasiri a ƙashi da jijiyoyin jini, kuma suna shiga cikin feedback a matakin axis na HPO.
texts.t141: Estrogens muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t142: Estrogens ba hormone guda ɗaya ba ne, rukuni ne na steroids. A zagayowar al’ada, estradiol da follicle ke samarwa shi ne ke da muhimmiyar rawa. Estrone yana ƙara muhimmanci a kyallen jiki na gefe da bayan menopause, yayin da estriol yake da muhimmanci musamman a lokacin ciki. Duka tasirinsu na haihuwa da na jiki baki ɗaya—kan ƙashi, fata, jijiyoyin jini, da kwakwalwa—na da muhimmanci a asibiti.
texts.t146: idan akwai alamun ƙarancin estrogen ko progesterone -> da farko a fahimci ko ovulation ya faru da kuma musabbabin hakan, maimakon amfani da lakabban yau da kullum
texts.t147: idan jini yana zuwa ba bisa ka’ida ba kuma endometrium yana samun motsawa na dogon lokaci ba tare da progesterone ba -> a yi la’akari da chronic anovulation
texts.t148: Estrogens suna shiga cikin yawaitar endometrium da feedback a axis na HPO.
texts.t156: Estradiol: babbar rawarsa a zagayowar al’ada
texts.t158: Estradiol shi ne babban estrogen na shekarun haihuwa kuma muhimmin hormone na follicular phase.
texts.t159: Estradiol yana fitowa daga babban follicle mai girma, yana motsa yawaitar endometrium, kuma yana fara kololuwar LH idan matakansa suka daɗe suna sama.
texts.t160: Estradiol muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t161: Yayin da babban follicle ke girma, samar da estradiol yana ƙaruwa. Estradiol yana sa cervical mucus ya fi sauƙin wucewar maniyyi, yana ƙara yawaitar endometrium, kuma yana canza nau’in feedback a matakin pituitary da hypothalamus. Shi ya sa estradiol yake ɗaya daga cikin manyan 'masu jagoranci' na rabin farko na zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t162: estradiol: babbar rawa a zagayowar al’ada
texts.t164: Babban follicle ne ke samar da estradiol kuma yana shirya endometrium domin yawaita.
texts.t165: Matakan estradiol masu yawa da suka daɗe suna sauya feedback zuwa mai kyau kuma suna tayar da tashin LH.
texts.t172: Progesterone shi ne babban hormone na luteal phase da sauyin endometrium zuwa secretory phase.
texts.t173: Bayan ovulation, corpus luteum ne yafi samar da progesterone kuma yana mayar da endometrium zuwa secretory phase.
texts.t174: Progesterone muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t175: Progesterone yana zama babban hormone bayan ovulation. Yana sa endometrium ya zama a shirye don implantation, yana ƙara basal body temperature, yana rage sauƙin wucewa a cervical mucus, kuma yana canza yanayin feedback a matakin hypothalamus da pituitary. Ba tare da samuwar corpus luteum yadda ya kamata bayan ovulation ba, cikakkiyar progesterone phase ba za ta faru ba.
texts.t176: Ana fassara progesterone ne dangane da ovulation, ba bisa ga 'rana ta 21' ga kowa ba; gwaji guda ɗaya ba koyaushe yake bayyana ingancin luteal phase ba.
texts.t179: Progesterone shi ne muhimmin hormone na luteal phase da sauyin endometrium zuwa secretory phase.
texts.t180: Bayan ovulation, progesterone yana ƙara basal body temperature kuma yana kaurin cervical mucus.
texts.t183: raguwar sauƙin wucewa a cervical mucus
texts.t185: Prolactin ba hormone ne na takamaiman mataki na zagayowar al’ada ba, amma yawansa na iya danne GnRH ya kuma rikita ovulation.
texts.t186: Idan prolactin ya ci gaba da hawa, aikin mai samar da bugun GnRH yana raguwa, sakin LH/FSH yana sauka, kuma ƙarancin zuwan al’ada, rashin al’ada, da rashin yin ovulation na iya faruwa.
texts.t187: Prolactin da zagayowar al’ada muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t188: Prolactin hormone ne na pituitary mai muhimmiyar rawa a shayarwa, amma a wajen ciki da shayarwa, yawansa sau da yawa yana rikita aikin al’ada. Matakan prolactin suna da saurin sauyawa saboda barci, damuwa, ciwo, motsa jiki, motsawar nono, da wasu magunguna. Saboda haka, tantance prolactin na buƙatar shiri mai kyau kafin gwaji.
texts.t189: Prolactin yana da saurin sauyawa saboda abubuwan kafin gwaji; ƙarya tashin mataki na iya faruwa saboda damuwa, ciwo, motsawar nono, da wasu magunguna.
texts.t192: rashin la’akari da magunguna da damuwar kafin gwaji
texts.t193: ɗan ƙaramin tashin mataki guda ɗaya ba tare da maimaita gwaji ba
texts.t194: ɗaukar jini nan da nan bayan damuwa, ciwo, ko rashin isasshen barci
texts.t195: Ci gaba da tashin prolactin yana danne GnRH kuma yana rikita aikin al’ada.
texts.t196: Prolactin yana cikin daidaitaccen bincike na rashin al’ada da rashin daidaiton zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t200: a maimaita prolactin tare da shiri daidai idan tashin matakin yana kan iyaka
texts.t201: a tantance TSH, ciki, da musabbabin da magunguna suka jawo
texts.t202: idan akwai ci gaba da tashin mataki mai yawa, a yi la’akari da ƙarin hoton bincike/tuntuɓar endocrinologist
texts.t203: kada a yanke hukunci daga gwaji guda ɗaya ba tare da kawar da macroprolactin/abubuwan kafin gwaji inda ya dace ba
texts.t209: Testosterone a jikin mata yana nan a ƙananan adadi kuma yana shafar sha’awar jima’i, ƙashin jiki, da metabolism na gefe.
texts.t210: A jikin mata, ovaries da adrenal glands ne ke samar da testosterone, kuma yawansa yafi alaƙa da yanayin hyperandrogenism.
texts.t211: Testosterone da zagayowar mace — muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t212: Testosterone ba hormone 'na waje' ba ne ga jikin mace. Yana zama tushen samar da estrogens kuma yana shiga cikin daidaita sha’awar jima’i, tsoka, da ƙashin jiki. Matsalar asibiti yawanci ba kasancewarsa ba ce, sai dai yawan free fraction ɗinsa, wanda zai iya haifar da kuraje, hirsutism, da matsalolin ovulation.
texts.t213: Ga androgens, hanyar aunawa, SHBG, lokacin ɗaukar samfur, da mahallin asibiti suna da matuƙar muhimmanci; ƙananan karkacewa na buƙatar fassara cikin taka-tsantsan.
texts.t217: idan akwai hirsutism, kuraje, ko zagayowar al’ada mara daidaito -> a tantance hyperandrogenism da musabbabin rashin yin ovulation
texts.t218: idan androgens sun yi matuƙar hawa ko alamun suna ƙaruwa da sauri -> a kawar da yiwuwar ƙari ko matsananciyar matsalar endocrine
texts.t219: yin watsi da hanyar gwaji da SHBG a ƙimomin da ke kan iyaka
texts.t220: ƙima a kan iyaka ba tare da alamun asibiti ba
texts.t221: tantance total testosterone kaɗai ba tare da mahallin SHBG ba
texts.t222: Testosterone a jikin mata yana da muhimmanci a ƙananan ma’auni, kuma yawansa yana da alaƙa da hyperandrogenism da matsalolin ovulation.
texts.t227: tabbatar da alamun asibiti da bayanan dakin gwaje-gwaje
texts.t228: a tantance zagayowar al’ada, nauyin jiki, insulin resistance, da PCOS
texts.t229: idan akwai alamomi masu tsanani da sauri, a kawar da yiwuwar wasu manyan musabbabai masu wuya
texts.t230: Hanyar gwaji tana da matuƙar muhimmanci wajen tantance testosterone a mata; immunoassays a ƙananan ma’aunin mata ba su da aminci kamar ingantattun hanyoyin mass spectrometry.
texts.t231: Androgens a jikin mata: na al’ada da yawa fiye da kima
texts.t233: Jikin mace ma yana buƙatar androgens, amma yawansu yana rikita ovulation kuma yana shafar fata, gashi, da zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t234: Androgens sun haɗa da testosterone, androstenedione, DHEA, da DHEAS. Ba jimillar mataki kaɗai ba, har ma da bioavailable fraction da alamomin da ke tare da su ne ke da muhimmanci a asibiti.
texts.t235: Androgens a jikin mata — muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t236: A ma’aunin ilimin jiki na al’ada, androgens suna shiga cikin steroidogenesis na yau da kullum kuma suna zama tushen samar da estrogen. Idan sun yi yawa, za su iya hana girman babban follicle yadda ya kamata kuma su taimaka ga chronic anovulation. Ya kamata a tantance su tare da la’akari da shekaru, alamomi, SHBG, da yiwuwar tushensu — na ovary ko adrenal.
texts.t237: hirsutism da ke ƙaruwa da sauri
texts.t241: androgens a jikin mata: na al’ada da yawa fiye da kima
texts.t244: Yawan androgens a jikin mata yana da alaƙa da hirsutism, kuraje, da rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t249: ƙaruruwan da ke fitar da androgen
texts.t250: Anti-Müllerian hormone (AMH): abin da yake nunawa
texts.t252: AMH yana nuna yawan preantral da ƙananan antral follicles masu girma kuma ana amfani da shi a matsayin alamar ovarian reserve.
texts.t253: AMH ba ya nuna ingancin ƙwai kai tsaye kuma ba ya tabbatar da haihuwa shi kaɗai. Yana taimakawa tantance irin amsar ovaries da ake sa ran samu ga stimulation.
texts.t254: Anti-Müllerian hormone (AMH) muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t255: Granulosa cells na preantral da ƙananan antral follicles ne ke samar da AMH. Sauƙinsa yana cikin cewa ba ya dogara sosai da ranar zagayowar al’ada kamar FSH ko inhibin B. Duk da haka, ya kamata a fassara AMH cikin taka-tsantsan: ƙananan AMH ba yana nufin rashin haihuwa nan take ba, kuma AMH mai yawa ba ya tabbatar da ovulation na al’ada. Sau da yawa yana hawa a PCOS kuma yana raguwa idan ovarian reserve ya ragu.
texts.t256: Fassara tana dogara da hanyar gwaji, shekaru, manufar gwaji, da dakin gwaje-gwaje; yanayin canji da mahallin bayani sun fi muhimmanci fiye da lamba guda ɗaya.
texts.t257: anti-müllerian hormone (amh): abin da yake nunawa
texts.t258: AMH yana nuna ingancin ƙwai kai tsaye
texts.t259: ana iya hasashen samun ciki ta halitta da AMH kaɗai
texts.t262: ɗaukar AMH a matsayin daidai da ingancin ƙwai ko damar samun ciki ta halitta
texts.t263: AMH yana nuna yawan preantral da ƙananan antral follicles kuma yana zama alamar ovarian reserve.
texts.t264: Bai kamata a yi amfani da AMH a matsayin gwaji kaɗai don gano PCOS ko tantance haihuwa ba.
texts.t267: ba shi ne babban saƙon feedback na zagayowar al’ada ba
texts.t268: AMH yana nuna ovarian reserve fiye da haihuwa ta yanzu ko ingancin ƙwai; bai kamata a fassara shi a matsayin hasashen kai tsaye na samun ciki ta halitta ba.
texts.t271: Granulosa cells na farkon antral follicles ne ke samar da Inhibin B kuma yana danne FSH.
texts.t272: Inhibin B yana da muhimmanci a matsayin wani ɓangare na negative feedback a farkon follicular phase. Ana amfani da shi ƙasa da AMH saboda yana fi sauyawa a duk zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t273: Inhibin B muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t274: Inhibin B yana taimakawa daidaita girman rukuni na follicles ta hanyar hana FSH. A magungunan haihuwa, wani lokaci ana amfani da shi a matsayin ƙarin alamar aikin ovary, amma a aikin zamani, ya kasa AMH wajen sauƙin amfani da maimaituwar sakamako don tantance ovarian reserve na yau da kullum.
texts.t278: Granulosa cells na follicles masu girma ne ke samar da Inhibin B kuma yana danne FSH.
texts.t279: Ana amfani da Inhibin B ƙasa da AMH wajen tantance ovarian reserve saboda yawan sauyinsa a zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t280: granulosa cells na ƙananan antral follicles
texts.t284: TSH kansa ba ya daidaita zagayowar al’ada kai tsaye, amma yana zama alamar matsayin thyroid, wanda ke shafar ovulation da daidaiton zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t285: Matsalolin TSH na iya kasancewa tare da hypo- ko hyperthyroidism, kuma waɗannan yanayi suna da alaƙa da rikicewar zagayowar al’ada, sauye-sauye a SHBG, prolactin, da aikin ovulation.
texts.t286: TSH da zagayowar al’ada — muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t287: TSH yana da amfani a matsayin alamar binciken farko na aikin thyroid idan akwai rikicewar zagayowar al’ada. Ko da yake ba hormone na haihuwa ba ne a ma’ana ta kai tsaye, sauyinsa yana taimakawa wajen zargin musabbabin endocrine na rashin yin ovulation, ƙarancin zuwan al’ada, ko rashin al’ada. Saboda haka, sau da yawa ana saka TSH a cikin binciken farko na asali.
texts.t288: Matsakaitan ƙimomi suna dogara da hanyar gwaji da mahallin asibiti; wajen tantance haihuwa, ana fassara TSH tare da free T4 da tarihin asibiti.
texts.t292: idan akwai rikicewar zagayowar al’ada + alamun matsalar thyroid -> a tantance TSH da free T4
texts.t293: idan hyperprolactinemia ta haɗu da TSH mai yawa -> a tuna da alaƙar TRH/prolactin
texts.t294: TSH yana cikin daidaitaccen bincike na rikicewar zagayowar al’ada da rashin al’ada.
texts.t295: Matsalar thyroid na iya rikita ovulation da aikin al’ada.
texts.t297: yiwuwar rikicewar zagayowar al’ada a matsalar thyroid
texts.t300: a tantance TSH tare da free T4 da yadda marar lafiya ke gabatar da alamomi
texts.t301: idan ya dace, a ƙara anti-TPO/TG antibodies
texts.t302: a gyara matsalar thyroid kafin fassara korafe-korafen haihuwa
texts.t307: Hormones na thyroid suna tallafa wa aikin ovaries, endometrium, da yanayin metabolism da ake buƙata don ovulation.
texts.t308: Duka hypothyroidism da hyperthyroidism na iya rikita ovulation, su tsawaita ko su rage zagayowar al’ada, kuma su haifar da rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t309: Hormones na thyroid da ovulation — muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t310: Hormones na thyroid suna shafar kyallen jiki da yawa na tsarin haihuwa, ciki har da ovaries, endometrium, da tsarin placenta. A hypothyroidism, ƙarin TRH da secondary hyperprolactinemia ma na iya faruwa, wanda ke ƙara haɗarin rashin yin ovulation. Saboda haka, idan akwai rikicewar zagayowar al’ada, yana da muhimmanci ba kawai a auna TSH ba har ma a tantance cikakken bayanin thyroid.
texts.t314: Duka hypothyroidism da hyperthyroidism na iya kasancewa tare da rashin yin ovulation da rikicewar zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t315: Ana ba da shawarar tantance aikin thyroid idan akwai rashin al’ada da rikicewar zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t321: Cortisol da tasirin damuwa a kan hormones
texts.t323: Damuwa mai tsawo da kunna axis na HPA na iya danne axis na haihuwa.
texts.t324: A ƙarƙashin matsananciyar damuwa ko mai tsawo, matakan CRH da cortisol suna ƙaruwa, wanda zai iya rage bugun GnRH, ya canza sakin LH, kuma ya rikita ovulation.
texts.t325: Cortisol da tasirin damuwa a kan hormones muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t326: Tasirin damuwa a kan zagayowar al’ada ba kasafai yake takaita ga cortisol kaɗai ba. Yawanci yana haɗa nauyin tunani da motsin rai, matsalar barci, ƙarancin kuzari, yawan motsa jiki, da sauye-sauye a aikin axis na HPA. A asibiti, wannan na iya bayyana a matsayin tsawaituwar zagayowar al’ada, rashin yin ovulation, ko functional hypothalamic amenorrhea.
texts.t327: cortisol da tasirin damuwa a kan hormones
texts.t330: idan akwai ƙarancin kuzari, matsananciyar damuwa, ko alamun metabolism -> a nemo musabbabin tsarin jiki baki ɗaya, ba kawai 'hormone na jima’i' ba
texts.t331: idan zagayowar al’ada ta rikice tare da siffa mai kama da PCOS -> a tantance insulin resistance da hyperandrogenism
texts.t332: Kunna axis na HPA na iya danne GnRH kuma ya rikita ovulation.
texts.t333: Damuwa sau da yawa wani ɓangare ne na mahallin asibiti a functional hypothalamic amenorrhea.
texts.t338: a tantance abinci, nauyi/canje-canjen nauyi, nauyin motsa jiki, barci, da damuwa
texts.t339: a nemo musabbabin metabolism ko na kuzari na rikicewar zagayowar al’ada
texts.t340: a magance babban abin da ke jawo matsalar, ba sakamakonsa kaɗai ba
texts.t343: Insulin yana da alaƙa sosai da aikin ovary kuma yana da muhimmanci musamman a samuwar PCOS.
texts.t344: Hyperinsulinemia yana ƙara samar da androgen a ovary kuma yana rage SHBG, ta haka yana ƙara free androgen levels.
texts.t345: Insulin da tsarin haihuwa muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t346: Insulin ba hormone na metabolism kaɗai ba ne har ma yana da muhimmanci ga haihuwa. A insulin resistance, ovaries suna karɓar saƙonnin ƙara androgenogenesis, kuma hanta tana samar da SHBG kaɗan. Sakamakon haka, bioavailability na androgen yana ƙaruwa, ovulation yana lalacewa, kuma mummunan zagayowar PCOS yana ci gaba.
texts.t350: Insulin yana shafar axis na haihuwa da steroidogenesis na ovary.
texts.t351: Insulin resistance yana taka muhimmiyar rawa a samuwar PCOS da matsalolin ovulation da ke tare da shi.
texts.t361: Leptin yana sanar da kwakwalwa ko ajiyar kuzari ta isa don haihuwa.
texts.t362: Idan kuzarin da ake samu ya yi ƙasa sosai kuma leptin ya yi ƙasa, axis na haihuwa na iya samun hanawa; amma yawan kitsen jiki da leptin resistance ma na iya kasancewa tare da matsaloli.
texts.t363: Leptin da alaƙarsa da ovulation muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t364: Leptin muhimmin mai shiga tsakani ne tsakanin matsayin kuzari da haihuwa. Ba shi kaɗai ne ke sarrafa GnRH ba amma yana cikin hanyar sadarwar saƙonni da ke sanar da kwakwalwa ko akwai isassun albarkatu don tallafa wa ovulation. Saboda haka, duka tsananin rama da kiba na iya rikita zagayowar ovulation, ko da yake hanyoyin sun bambanta.
texts.t368: Leptin yana isar da bayani game da ajiyar kuzari kuma yana shiga cikin daidaita hanyar sadarwar GnRH.
texts.t369: Duka ƙarancin kuzari da kiba na iya kasancewa tare da matsalar ovulation.
texts.t373: Me yasa hormones ke sauyawa bisa matakan zagayowar al’ada
texts.t375: Hormones suna sauyawa bisa matakai saboda zagayowar al’ada ta ginu ne a kan jere-jeren sauyawa tsakanin negative da positive feedback.
texts.t376: A farkon zagayowar al’ada, ƙananan estradiol da progesterone suna ba FSH damar ɗan tashi; sannan follicle mai girma yana ƙara estradiol da inhibin B, kuma bayan ovulation, progesterone ne ke rinjaye.
texts.t377: Me yasa hormones ke sauyawa bisa matakan zagayowar al’ada muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t378: Zagayowar al’ada ba tsayayyen tarin matakai ba ne, tsarin da ke motsi ne. Da farko jiki yana ɗaukar follicles, sannan yana zaɓar babban follicle, yana shirya ovulation, kuma bayan ovulation yana sake tsara endometrium ƙarƙashin tasirin progesterone. Saboda haka, tantance hormones ba tare da fayyace matakin zagayowar al’ada ba sau da yawa ba ya bayar da cikakken bayani.
texts.t379: me yasa hormones ke sauyawa bisa matakan zagayowar al’ada
texts.t382: idan akwai ci gaba da rikicewar zagayowar al’ada -> a nemo takamaiman musabbabi a axes na HPO/HPT/HPA da matsayin metabolism
texts.t383: idan an samu matsala a gwaji guda ɗaya -> a tabbatar da ita a cikin mahallin asibiti
texts.t384: Sauye-sauyen hormones masu dogaro da mataki suna nuna sauyin feedback da matakan zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t385: A farkon zagayowar al’ada, estradiol da progesterone suna ƙasa, kuma bayan ovulation, progesterone ne ke rinjaye.
texts.t392: Kololuwar LH tashin hormone ne kafin ovulation, wanda ba tare da shi ba ovulation na al’ada ba zai yiwu ba.
texts.t393: Kololuwar LH kafin ovulation tana faruwa ne bayan wani lokaci na estradiol mai yawa da ya daɗe kuma tana tayar da fashewar follicle da ovulation.
texts.t394: Kololuwar LH kafin ovulation muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t395: Ana amfani da gwaje-gwajen LH na kasuwa don gano lokacin haihuwa mafi kyau, amma ba sa bayar da hasashe daidai iri ɗaya ga kowa. Akwai bambanci tsakanin mutane a tazarar lokacin fara tashin LH da ovulation; saboda haka, a asibiti, ya fi kyau a fassara wannan kololuwa a matsayin kusantar ovulation maimakon ainihin sa’arta.
texts.t399: Kololuwar LH tana gabatar da ovulation kuma tana tayar da shi.
texts.t400: Tazarar tsakanin fara tashin LH da ovulation tana da bambanci tsakanin mutane.
texts.t404: Corpus luteum yana samuwa daga follicle da ya yi ovulation bayan tashin LH.
texts.t405: Bayan ovulation, granulosa da theca cells suna yin luteinization, girman jijiyoyin jini yana ƙaruwa, kuma wani gland na endocrine na ɗan lokaci—corpus luteum—yana samuwa.
texts.t406: Yadda corpus luteum ke samuwa—muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t407: Corpus luteum tsari ne da ke samuwa da sauri, mai yalwar jijiyoyin jini, kuma yana iya samar da progesterone da yawa. Idan implantation bai faru ba, yana raguwa. Idan ciki ya faru, ana ci gaba da aikin sa har sai placenta ta fara samar da isasshen progesterone.
texts.t410: Corpus luteum yana samuwa daga follicle da ya yi ovulation bayan tashin LH.
texts.t411: Babban aikin corpus luteum shi ne samar da progesterone.
texts.t417: Kalmar "rashin daidaiton hormones" ba ganewar asali ba ce, sai dai cikakken bayanin rikicewar daidaiton hormones.
texts.t418: A kimiyyance, ya fi dacewa a fayyace takamaiman matsalar maimakon amfani da kalma ta gama-gari: rashin yin ovulation, hyperprolactinemia, hypothyroidism, hyperandrogenism, hypoestrogenism, da sauransu.
texts.t419: Menene rashin daidaiton hormones—muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t420: A magungunan jama’a, ana yawan amfani da "rashin daidaiton hormones" don bayyana kowace matsala—daga PMS zuwa kuraje. A aikin asibiti mai dogaro da hujja, ana amfani da wannan kalma ne kawai a matsayin jimla ta gama-gari, sannan a fayyace tsarin da ke haddasa ta. Wannan yana da muhimmanci domin magani ba ya dogara da wani "rashin daidaito" na gaba ɗaya, sai dai da takamaiman musabbabi da mahallin bayani.
texts.t424: "Rashin daidaiton hormones" ba takamaiman ganewar asali ba ne; a asibiti, dole ne a nemo takamaiman rikicewar axis ko gland.
texts.t425: kowace axis ta HPO/HPT/HPA ko alaƙar metabolism
texts.t430: Estrogen dominance: abin da ake nufi da shi
texts.t432: Kalmar "estrogen dominance" ana yawan amfani da ita a rubuce-rubucen jama’a amma ba takamaiman ganewar asali ba ce a ilimin mata mai dogaro da hujja.
texts.t433: A aikace, sau da yawa tana haɗa chronic anovulation, rashin progesterone phase, kiba, perimenopause, ko wasu takamaiman yanayi.
texts.t434: Estrogen dominance—muhimmin ɓangare na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t435: Idan mutum yana da alamun da majiyoyin jama’a ke kira "estrogen dominance," a asibiti ya zama dole a tantance chronic anovulation, zagayowar al’ada mara daidaito, kaurin endometrium, abubuwan metabolism, perimenopause, ko illolin magunguna. Wato, muhimmiyar magana ita ce ba kare kalmar ba, sai dai fassara ta zuwa yaren da zai taimaka wajen ganewar asali.
texts.t436: estrogen dominance: abin da ake nufi da shi
texts.t437: estrogen dominance ganewar asali ce mai zaman kanta
texts.t438: kowace PMS na nufin yawan estrogen
texts.t441: a yi amfani da kalmar a matsayin ganewar asali mai zaman kanta
texts.t442: a kasa neman chronic anovulation da rashin progesterone phase
texts.t443: Kalmar 'estrogen dominance' ba daidaitacciyar ganewar asali mai zaman kanta ba ce a endocrinology na haihuwa mai dogaro da hujja.
texts.t444: Sau da yawa, wannan kalma tana ɓoye chronic anovulation, rashin progesterone phase, ko wasu takamaiman yanayi.
texts.t446: motsawar endometrium ba tare da progesterone ya daidaita ba
texts.t449: kada a maye gurbin tsarin da ke haddasa matsalar da lakabin jama’a
texts.t450: Kalmar 'estrogen dominance' ana yawan amfani da ita a kafafen jama’a amma ba daidaitacciyar ganewar asali mai zaman kanta ba ce a endocrinology na haihuwa mai dogaro da hujja.
texts.t451: Karancin progesterone: lokacin da ake tattauna shi
texts.t453: Ya fi dacewa a yi magana game da 'karancin progesterone' ne kawai a mahallin ovulation da aka tabbatar, luteal phase, da manufar asibiti.
texts.t454: A aikin asibiti, ƙananan progesterone sau da yawa yana da alaƙa ba da wani karanci mai zaman kansa ba, sai dai rashin yin ovulation ko lokacin gwaji da bai dace ba.
texts.t455: Karancin progesterone muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t456: Tun da matakan progesterone suna sauyawa sosai a duk zagayowar al’ada, yin gwaji ba tare da danganta shi da ovulation ba sau da yawa ba shi da amfani sosai. Muhimmin ƙa’ida ita ce: da farko a tantance ko ovulation ya faru, sannan a tantance samar da progesterone a tsakiyar luteal phase. In ba haka ba, za a iya ɗora lakabin 'karanci' alhali ainihin matsalar ita ce rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t457: karancin progesterone: lokacin da ake tattauna shi
texts.t458: dole ne a ko da yaushe a gwada progesterone a rana ta 21
texts.t459: ƙananan progesterone ba tare da tabbatar da ovulation ba yana tabbatar da ƙarancin luteal phase
texts.t462: Ƙananan progesterone sau da yawa yana da alaƙa da rashin yin ovulation ko lokacin gwaji da bai dace ba.
texts.t463: Don tantance samarwar luteal, ana fassara progesterone ne dangane da ranar ovulation, ba wata ranar zagayowar al’ada guda ɗaya ga kowa ba.
texts.t468: Ra’ayin 'karancin progesterone' ba tare da tabbatar da rashin yin ovulation ko mahallin aikin luteal ba na iya zama mai ruɗani sosai; a aikin asibiti, musabbabi ya fi muhimmanci fiye da lakabi.
texts.t471: Hyperprolactinemia na ɗaya daga cikin yawan musabbabin endocrine na ƙarancin zuwan al’ada, rashin al’ada, da rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t472: Musabbabai na iya haɗawa da prolactinoma, magunguna, hypothyroidism, yanayin ilimin jiki na al’ada, da wasu cututtukan tsarin jiki.
texts.t473: Hyperprolactinemia da matsalolin zagayowar al’ada muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t474: A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a tabbatar da cewa tashin prolactin yana ci gaba kuma kada a manta da abubuwan kafin gwaji. Idan akwai matsananciyar hyperprolactinemia, galactorrhea, ciwon kai, ko matsalar gani, ana buƙatar zurfafa bincike, ciki har da kawar da yiwuwar prolactinoma da sauran musabbaban matsalar pituitary.
texts.t478: prolactin mai ci gaba da hawa
texts.t481: Hyperprolactinemia sau da yawa yana haifar da ƙarancin al’ada ko rashin al’ada da rashin yin ovulation.
texts.t482: Idan prolactin ya ci gaba da hawa, dole ne a tantance musabbabai ciki har da prolactinoma, magunguna, da hypothyroidism.
texts.t486: Hypoestrogenism yanayi ne na rashin isasshen tasirin estrogen a kyallen jiki.
texts.t487: Yana iya bayyana a matsayin bushewar farji, raguwar sha’awar jima’i, zafin jiki mai tashi, matsalar barci, rashin al’ada, da raguwar ƙashi.
texts.t488: Hypoestrogenism muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaiton hormones.
texts.t489: Alamun hypoestrogenism suna dogara da shekaru, musabbabi, da tsawon lokacin yanayin. A ƙuruciya, wannan yana da muhimmanci musamman domin tsawaitaccen ƙarancin estrogen yana shafar ba kawai zagayowar al’ada da haihuwa ba har ma da ƙashin jiki, mucous membranes, da ingancin rayuwa. Musabbabai sun haɗa da hypothalamic amenorrhea, premature ovarian insufficiency, hyperprolactinemia, da wasu hanyoyin magani.
texts.t493: Hypoestrogenism na iya bayyana a matsayin rashin al’ada, bushewar mucosa, da alamun ƙarancin estrogen.
texts.t494: Karancin estrogen ba zagayowar al’ada kaɗai yake shafa ba har ma da ƙasusuwa, mucous membranes, da jin daɗin jiki gaba ɗaya.

texts.t501: rashin isasshen aikin ƙwai da wuri
texts.t504: Yawaitar androgens na iya bayyana da kurajen fuska, yawan gashi a jiki, zubar gashi irin na androgens, kuma sau da yawa da matsalar yin ƙwai.
texts.t505: Mafi yawan dalili a mata masu shekarun haihuwa shi ne PCOS, amma yana da muhimmanci a kawar da wasu dalilai masu wuya, ciki har da ƙari da CAH marar salo na gargajiya.
texts.t506: Yawaitar androgens muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaituwar hormones.
texts.t507: A asibiti, yawaitar androgens ba kawai ƙimar gwaji ba ce, illa dai wata cuta mai alamomi. Dole ne a tantance saurin yadda alamomin ke ƙaruwa, daidaiton zagayowar al’ada, alamomin juriya ga insulin, da tsananin bayyanar cutar. Saurin bayyana alamomin namantaka alama ce ta gargaɗi da ke buƙatar a duba cikin gaggawa.
texts.t514: Yawaitar androgens na bayyana da yawan gashi a jiki, kurajen fuska, zubar gashi mai alaƙa da androgens, kuma sau da yawa da matsalar yin ƙwai.
texts.t515: Mafi yawan dalilin yawaitar androgens a mata masu shekarun haihuwa shi ne PCOS.
texts.t516: dalilan da suka shafi gland ɗin adrenal
texts.t521: Estradiol da progesterone suna hulɗa da tsarin saƙonnin jijiyoyi na kwakwalwa, don haka sauye-sauyen hormones na iya shafar yanayi.
texts.t522: Ga mafi yawan mutane, waɗannan tasirin suna da matsakaici, amma ga wasu, jin sauyin matakai yana fi bayyana sosai.
texts.t523: Yadda hormones ke shafar yanayi muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaituwar hormones.
texts.t524: Yanayi ba kawai matakan hormones kai tsaye ke shafawa ba, har ma da saurin sauyinsu, yadda jiki na mutum ke amsawa, ingancin barci, matakin damuwa, da tarihin matsalolin lafiyar kwakwalwa. Saboda haka, mataki ɗaya na zagayowar al’ada na iya ji daban ga mutane daban-daban. A kimiyyance, ya fi dacewa a yi magana ba kan "mummunan mataki" ba, sai dai kan hulɗar ilimin halitta da yadda mutum ke ji da amsawa.

texts.t542: Tasirin zagayowar al’ada ga yanayi gaskiya ne, amma tsananin tasirin yana dogara sosai da yadda mutum ke ji da amsawa, kuma bai kamata a ɗauka yana shafar duk mata iri ɗaya ba.
texts.t543: Yadda hormones ke shafar fata, gashi, da sha’awar jima’i
texts.t545: Androgens ne suka fi tasiri kan kuraje, mai na fata, da yawan gashi a jiki; estrogens da progesterone ma suna canza yanayin fata da sha’awar jima’i.
texts.t546: Ƙaruwa a androgens masu ’yanci na ƙara samar da mai a fata kuma na iya jawo kuraje da yawan gashi a jiki, yayin da ƙarancin estrogen mai tsanani sau da yawa yana da alaƙa da bushewa da raguwar sha’awar jima’i.
texts.t547: Yadda hormones ke shafar fata, gashi, da sha’awar jima’i muhimmin ɓangare ne na daidaituwar hormones.
texts.t548: Yanayin fata, gashi, da sha’awar jima’i sakamako ne na abubuwa da dama. Hormones, gado, yadda masu karɓar saƙo ke aiki, magunguna, thyroid, damuwa, ingancin barci, da dangantaka duk suna tasiri. Saboda haka, ko da sakamakon gwaji ya yi kama, yanayin asibiti na iya bambanta tsakanin mutane biyu.
texts.t549: yadda hormones ke shafar fata, gashi, da sha’awar jima’i
texts.t552: Yawan androgens masu ’yanci yana da alaƙa da kuraje, yawan gashi a jiki, da zubar gashi mai alaƙa da androgens.
texts.t553: Karancin estrogen na iya taimakawa wajen bushewar mucosa da raguwar sha’awar jima’i.
texts.t561: Wane ranakun zagayowar al’ada ake gwada hormones daban-daban
texts.t563: Ranar gwaji tana dogara da manufar gwajin: wasu hormones ana tantance su a farkon matakin follicular, wasu bayan yin ƙwai, wasu kuma ana iya gwada su kusan kowace rana.
texts.t564: Ga FSH, LH, da estradiol, yawanci ana amfani da farkon matakin follicular, mafi yawan lokuta ranaku 2–5 na zagayowar al’ada. Ana tantance progesterone kusan kwanaki 7 bayan yin ƙwai. AMH ba ya dogara sosai da ranar zagaye.
texts.t565: Wane ranakun zagayowar al’ada ake gwada hormones daban-daban — muhimmin ɓangare na daidaituwar hormones.
texts.t566: Kuskuren da aka fi yi shi ne ƙoƙarin gwada duk hormones a rana ɗaya kuma a fassara su iri ɗaya ga kowa. Ga progesterone, lokacin da ya danganci yin ƙwai ne yake da muhimmanci, ba kawai "rana ta 21" ba. Ga prolactin, yanayin yin gwajin yana da muhimmanci. Ga TSH, matakin zagayowar al’ada yawanci ba shi da muhimmanci. Saboda haka, ya fi kyau a tsara gwaje-gwajen dakin gwaje-gwaje bisa tambayar asibiti.

texts.t591: Dokokin kalanda na bai ɗaya suna da sauƙi, amma idan zagayowar al’ada ba ta da daidaito, ya fi dacewa a mai da hankali kan yin ƙwai, aikin asibiti, da hanyar gwaji.
texts.t594: Zagayowar al’ada wani tsari ne na hormones da ke maimaituwa inda kwakwalwa, ovaries, da mahaifa ke daidaita girman follicle, yin ƙwai, shirya endometrium, da jinin al’ada.
texts.t595: Zagayowar al’ada ba jinin al’ada kaɗai ba ne, illa dai aikin tsarin hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian. Bugun GnRH yana daidaita FSH da LH, FSH yana tallafa wa girman follicle, follicle mai girma yana samar da estradiol, yawan estradiol yana tayar da kololuwar LH, yin ƙwai yana raba zagaye zuwa matakai biyu, kuma progesterone daga corpus luteum yana samar da matakin luteal. Idan ciki bai faru ba, matakan progesterone da estradiol suna sauka, sannan jinin al’ada ya fara.
texts.t596: Zagayowar al’ada wani tsarin neuroendocrine ne da na haihuwa mai maimaituwa wanda ke tabbatar da yin ƙwai da shirya endometrium don yiwuwar dashewar ciki.
texts.t597: Tsarin hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian (HPO) ne ke daidaita zagayowar al’ada. Hypothalamus yana sakin GnRH a bugawa-bugawa; yawan bugun da ƙarfinsa ne ke ƙayyade sakin FSH da LH daga gaban gland ɗin pituitary. A farkon matakin follicular, FSH yana motsa rukuni na antral follicles. Daya daga cikinsu yana samun rinjaye ya zama mafi ƙarfi. Kwayoyin granulosa dinsa suna fara samar da estradiol da inhibin B sosai. Yayin da estradiol ke ƙaruwa, endometrium yana shiga matakin girma: gland suna tsawaita, stroma tana kauri, kuma bakin mahaifa yana samar da majina mai sauƙin wucewar maniyyi. Idan yawan estradiol ya daɗe a sama, martanin hana aiki yana komawa martanin ƙarfafawa, yana tayar da kololuwar LH. Yin ƙwai yawanci yana faruwa kusan awa 24–36 bayan fara tashin LH. Bayan yin ƙwai, follicle yana rikidewa ya zama corpus luteum, wanda ke samar da progesterone. Progesterone yana mayar da endometrium zuwa matakin sirri, yana ɗaga zafin jikin asali da kusan 0.3–0.5°C, kuma yana sa majinar bakin mahaifa ta yi kauri. Idan ciki bai faru ba, corpus luteum yana raguwa, matakan progesterone da estradiol suna sauka, sannan zubar da sashen aiki na endometrium — wato jinin al’ada — ya fara. A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a lura cewa zubar jini mai kama da al’ada ba koyaushe yake tabbatar da yin ƙwai ba. A zagayen da babu yin ƙwai, zubar jini na iya faruwa ba tare da cikakken matakin luteal ba. Saboda haka, don fassara zagaye, dole ne a tantance ba kawai samuwar jini ba, har ma da tsawon zagaye, daidaito, alamomin yin ƙwai, halayen majina, zafin jikin asali, da sauran alamomi masu rakiyar sa.

texts.t647: Hulɗar hypothalamus, gland ɗin pituitary, ovaries, da mahaifa ce ke daidaita zagayowar al’ada.
texts.t648: Yawan estradiol yana tayar da tashin LH, kuma yin ƙwai yawanci yana faruwa awa 24–36 bayan farawarsa.
texts.t649: Ana iya ɗaukar zagayowar al’ada a matsayin wata ƙarin muhimmiyar alamar lafiya.
texts.t650: Me ya sa jiki ke buƙatar zagayowar al’ada
texts.t651: Me ya sa ake buƙatar zagaye
texts.t652: Zagayowar al’ada ba don ciki kaɗai ba ne: yana nuna yadda tsarin haihuwa da tsarin neuroendocrine gaba ɗaya ke aiki yadda ya kamata.
texts.t653: Ta fuskar ilimin halitta, zagaye yana da muhimmanci don balagar ƙwai, yin ƙwai, da shirya endometrium don yiwuwar dashewar ciki. Ta fuskar asibiti, zagaye mai daidaito da yin ƙwai alama ce ta yadda tsarin hypothalamic–pituitary–ovarian ke aiki yadda ya kamata, isasshen kuzari a jiki, da rashin manyan matsalolin endocrine.
texts.t654: Zagayowar al’ada wata hanya ce ta shirye-shiryen haihuwa kuma a lokaci guda alamar lafiyar endocrine.
texts.t655: Babban aikin ilimin halitta na zagaye shi ne shirya jiki don ciki. A kowace zagaye, follicle mafi rinjaye yana samuwa, ƙwayar ƙwai tana balaga, yin ƙwai yana faruwa, kuma endometrium yana sauyawa daga matakin girma zuwa matakin sirri. Ba tare da wannan jerin ba, ɗaukar ciki ta halitta ba zai yiwu ba. Amma muhimmancin zagaye ya fi haka faɗi. Zagaye mai daidaito da yin ƙwai yana nuna haɗin kai na hypothalamus, gland ɗin pituitary, ovaries, thyroid, siginonin metabolism, da matsayin kuzarin jiki gaba ɗaya. Wannan ne ya sa likitoci ke amfani da zagaye a matsayin muhimmiyar alamar lafiya. Bacewar zagaye ko rikicewarsa sosai na iya zama alamar farko ta matsalar hypothalamus, ƙarancin kuzari, cutar thyroid, hyperprolactinemia, ko PCOS. Estrogens da progesterone ba mahaifa kaɗai suke shafawa ba. Estrogens suna da muhimmanci ga ƙashi, daidaiton jijiyoyin jini, aikin tunani, da mucous membranes. Progesterone yana shafar daidaiton zafin jiki, yanayi, da sauyin endometrium zuwa matakin sirri. Saboda haka, matsalolin zagaye masu ɗorewa ba haihuwa kaɗai suke shafawa ba, har ma da jin daɗin rayuwa gaba ɗaya.

texts.t704: Zagayowar al’ada yana shirya jiki don yin ƙwai da yiwuwar ciki.

texts.t706: Rashin daidaiton zagaye na iya zama alamar matsalolin hypothalamus, thyroid, prolactin, da ovaries.
texts.t707: Yadda zagaye ke aiki: taƙaitaccen bayani
texts.t709: Zagaye ya ƙunshi matakin follicular, yin ƙwai, da matakin luteal; waɗannan suna ƙarƙashin sauye-sauyen FSH, estradiol, LH, da progesterone a jere.
texts.t710: A farkon zagaye, ƙananan matakan estradiol da progesterone suna ba FSH damar motsa girman follicle. Follicle mafi rinjaye yana samar da estradiol; yawan estradiol yana tayar da tashin LH, wanda ke fara yin ƙwai. Bayan yin ƙwai, corpus luteum yana samar da progesterone kuma yana samar da matakin luteal. Idan ciki bai faru ba, matakan progesterone suna sauka, sannan jinin al’ada ya fara.
texts.t711: Babban tsarin zagaye shi ne sauyin matakai a jere da martanin juna tsakanin hypothalamus, gland ɗin pituitary, ovaries, da endometrium.
texts.t712: A farkon-farkon zagaye, corpus luteum daga zagayen baya ya riga ya ragu, don haka matakan progesterone da estradiol suna ƙasa. Wannan yana cire hanawa daga gland ɗin pituitary, kuma FSH yana fara tallafa wa girman antral follicles da dama. Yayin da follicles ke girma, suna sakin estradiol da inhibin B, kuma ɗaya daga cikinsu ya zama mafi rinjaye. Lokacin da estradiol ya kai mataki mai yawa kuma ya daɗe, gland ɗin pituitary yana komawa martanin ƙarfafawa, sannan tashin LH ya faru. Wannan tashin LH ne ke tayar da balagar ƙarshe ta ƙwayar ƙwai, fashewar follicle, da yin ƙwai. Bayan haka, follicle yana luteinization, corpus luteum yana samuwa, kuma matakin progesterone, wato matakin luteal, ya fara. Progesterone yana sa endometrium ya zama na sirri, yana ƙara zafin jikin asali, kuma yana rage sauƙin wucewa ta majinar bakin mahaifa. Idan amfrayo bai dasa ba, corpus luteum yana raguwa, progesterone da estradiol suna sauka, sannan sabon zagaye ya fara. A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a san cewa tsawon zagaye yawanci tsawon matakin follicular ne ke ƙayyade shi, ba matakin luteal ba. Saboda haka, ba lallai ba ne yin ƙwai ya faru a rana ta 14.

texts.t748: Kololuwar LH tana tayar da yin ƙwai cikin awa 24–36.
texts.t749: Aikin al’ada na yau da kullum yana dogara da lafiyar hypothalamus, gland ɗin pituitary, ovaries, da hanyar fitowar jini.
texts.t752: Matsakaicin tsawon zagaye kusan kwanaki 28 ne, amma iyakar da ake ɗauka al’ada a manya ta fi faɗi: kwanaki 24–38.
texts.t753: Lambar kwanaki 28 matsakaici ce, ba ƙa’ida ta dole ba. A manya masu shekarun haihuwa, tsawon zagaye na kwanaki 24–38 yawanci ana ɗauka al’ada. Zagaye mafi gajarta ko mafi tsawo sau da yawa na buƙatar tantancewa, musamman idan sabon tsari ne.
texts.t754: Matsakaicin tsawon zagaye ƙimar matsakaici ce wadda ba ta maye gurbin iyakar al’ada ta asibiti ba.
texts.t755: Ko da yake al’adar jama’a sau da yawa tana bayyana zagaye a matsayin 'kwanaki 28,' wannan matsakaicin ƙididdiga ne kawai. A fassarar asibiti ta zamani, zagaye na al’ada a manya yawanci yana cikin kwanaki 24–38. Zagaye na kwanaki 26, 31, ko 35 ba cuta ba ne da kansa idan yana da ɗan daidaito kuma ba ya tare da alamomin gargaɗi. Dalilin wannan bambanci shi ne matakin follicular ne ya fi canzawa daga zagaye zuwa zagaye. Matakin luteal bayan yin ƙwai yawanci ya fi daidaito a mace ɗaya. Saboda haka, zagaye mai tsawo sau da yawa yana nufin yin ƙwai a makare maimakon wata cuta ta dole. A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a tantance ba tsawon kaɗai ba, har ma da mahallin sa: shekaru, daidaito, samuwar alamomin yin ƙwai, alamomi, da ko sauyin ya zo kwatsam.

texts.t792: Tantancewar asibiti na buƙatar nazarin yin ƙwai da daidaiton zagaye.
texts.t795: Abin da ake ɗauka al’ada ba cikakkiyar daidaiton zagaye ba ne, sai dai iya hasashen ilimin jiki ba tare da alamomin gargaɗi ba.
texts.t796: Ƙananan sauye-sauye a tsawon zagaye daga wata zuwa wata abin karɓa ne. Zagaye na al’ada ba yawan kwanaki kaɗai ke ƙayyade shi ba, har ma da ɗan daidaito, yiwuwar yin ƙwai, da rashin alamomi masu tayar da hankali. Bambancin da ake yarda da shi yana canzawa bisa shekaru daban-daban.
texts.t797: Sauye-sauyen al’ada a tsawon zagaye canje-canje ne na ilimin jiki da ake yarda da su a tsawon zagayowar al’ada ba tare da alamomin cuta ba.
texts.t798: A asibiti, al’ada ba wai 'kowace zagaye iri ɗaya ce' ba, sai dai tsarin ilimin jiki mai maimaituwa. A manya masu shekarun haihuwa, zagaye mafi yawan lokuta yana cikin kwanaki 24–38, amma ko a cikin wannan iyaka, ƙananan sauye-sauye na halitta na iya faruwa. Fassarar zamani ba tsawon zagaye kaɗai take dubawa ba, har ma da bambanci tsakanin zagaye. Ƙaramin bambanci tsakanin watanni na iya zama na ilimin jiki saboda matakin follicular yana da saurin amsawa ga damuwa, barci, tafiya, motsa jiki, da matsayin kuzari. Bisa bayanan asibiti, ana tantance daidaito ta bambanci tsakanin mafi gajeren da mafi tsawon zagaye, kuma bambancin da ake yarda da shi yana dogara da shekaru. Yana da muhimmanci a tuna: zagaye na iya shiga cikin iyakar al’ada a rubuce amma har yanzu ya buƙaci tantancewa idan yana tare da ciwo mai tsanani, zubar jini marar al’ada, ɗigon jini mai tsawo, ko rashin yin ƙwai.

texts.t840: Me ake ɗauka ranar farko ta zagaye
texts.t842: Rana ta 1 ta zagaye ita ce ranar farko ta cikakken jinin al’ada.
texts.t843: Ana ɗaukar Rana ta 1 ta zagaye a matsayin ranar farko ta cikakken jinin al’ada, ba ɗigon jini kaɗan da ke zuwa kwanaki 1–2 kafin haka ba. A aikace, wannan ita ce ranar da jinin ya yi daidai da al’ada ta yau da kullum kuma yana buƙatar kayan tsafta na yau da kullum. Wannan ƙa’ida tana da muhimmanci saboda ƙididdigar matakin follicular, lokacin gwajin FSH, LH, da estradiol, da ma’aunin bibiyar yin ƙwai duk daga Rana ta 1 ake lissafa su.
texts.t844: Nazarin zagaye na asibiti da na dijital suna buƙatar ma’auni iri ɗaya kowane wata. Saboda haka, farkon cikakken zubar jini ne ake ɗauka a matsayin Rana ta 1. Ɗan ɗigon jini mai ruwan kasa ko ruwan hoda kafin haka ba koyaushe yake nuna ainihin farkon sabon zagaye ba: yana iya zama ragowar zubar endometrium, ɗigon jini tsakanin al’adu, martani ga maganin hana haihuwa na hormones, ko zubar jini saboda wani dalili. Me ya sa wannan yake da muhimmanci? Domin kuskure a fara zagaye yana karkatar da duk lissafi: lokacin gwajin farkon matakin follicular, kiyasin ranar yin ƙwai, fassarar jadawalin zafin jikin asali, da tsawon matakin luteal. A manhajojin bibiyar al’ada, wannan yana da matuƙar muhimmanci: idan aka ɗauki 'duk wata alamar jini' a matsayin Rana ta 1, tsarin lissafi na iya yin kuskure da kwanaki 1–2 a kai a kai. Idan mutum yakan rikita ɗigon jini da ainihin al’ada akai-akai, yana da amfani a rubuta launi, yawa, buƙatar pad/tampon, kasancewar ciwo, da tsawon lokacin. Idan irin waɗannan lokuta suna maimaituwa, musamman tare da ciwo, zubar jini bayan jima’i, ko zubar jini tsakanin zagaye, to ba batun bibiyar al’ada kaɗai ba ne, sai dai dalilin a je a duba kai tsaye.
texts.t845: Ya fi kyau a tantance zagaye a cikin watanni da dama a jere maimakon a dogara da lokaci guda ɗaya.
texts.t846: Kasancewar alamomin gargaɗi ya fi muhimmanci fiye da yawan kwanaki tsakanin al’adu kawai.
texts.t847: A cikin manhaja, yana da amfani a haɗa kalanda, bayanan alamomi, da abubuwan rayuwa.

texts.t867: Daidaituwar hormones na zagaye tana dogara da GnRH, FSH, da LH
texts.t868: Tantancewar asibiti ta zagaye na buƙatar nazarin yin ƙwai da daidaito
texts.t871: Yawanci ana bayyana zagaye ta matakan jinin al’ada, follicular, yin ƙwai, da luteal.
texts.t872: Yana da sauƙi a bayyana zagaye ta matakai huɗu: jinin al’ada, follicular, yin ƙwai, da luteal. A matakin ovaries, ana gane matakin follicular, yin ƙwai, da matakin luteal; a matakin mahaifa kuma, matakan jinin al’ada, girma, da sirri. Waɗannan tsare-tsaren suna cika juna: tasirin estradiol ya fi rinjaye a rabin farko na zagaye, progesterone kuma bayan yin ƙwai.
texts.t873: Matakin jinin al’ada shi ne lokacin da sashen aiki na endometrium ke zubewa bayan saukar progesterone da estradiol. Sannan matakin follicular ya fara: FSH yana motsa girman follicle, kwayoyin granulosa suna samar da estradiol, kuma endometrium yana shiga matakin girma ya sake kauri. A lokaci guda, majinar bakin mahaifa tana ƙara danshi da laushi. Matakin yin ƙwai wani ɗan gajeren lokaci ne a kusa da sakin ƙwayar ƙwai daga follicle mafi rinjaye bayan kololuwar LH. Lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa yana samuwa a kusa da wannan mataki. Bayan yin ƙwai, zagaye yana shiga matakin luteal: corpus luteum yana samar da progesterone, endometrium ya zama na sirri, zafin jikin asali yawanci yana tashi, kuma majinar bakin mahaifa tana yin kauri. Ga mai amfani, sanin matakan yana taimakawa fahimtar dalilin da ya sa fitar ruwa, zafin jiki, sha’awar jima’i, jin zafin nono, da alamomin kafin al’ada suke canzawa. Ga likita kuma, waɗannan matakan suna da muhimmanci domin gwaje-gwaje da bincike daban-daban sun fi dacewa a fassara su a wasu ranaku na zagaye.
texts.t876: Matakin follicular shi ne ɓangaren farko na zagaye, lokacin da follicles ke girma a ovary kuma matakan estrogen ke ƙaruwa a hankali.
texts.t877: Matakin follicular yana farawa a ranar farko ta jinin al’ada kuma yana ƙarewa da yin ƙwai. A wannan lokacin, FSH yana motsa girman antral follicles, kwayoyin granulosa suna fara samar da 17-beta-estradiol da inhibin B sosai, kuma a hankali follicle ɗaya ya zama mafi rinjaye. Tsawon matakin follicular ne sau da yawa ke bayyana dalilin da ya sa jimillar zagayen mutum zai iya zama kwanaki 26, 29, ko 33.
texts.t878: A farkon matakin follicular, matakan progesterone da estradiol suna ƙasa, don haka tasirin hanawa a kan gland ɗin pituitary yana raguwa kuma FSH yana ƙaruwa kaɗan. A ƙarƙashin tasirin FSH, follicles da dama suna fara bunƙasa, amma yayin da estradiol da inhibin B ke ƙaruwa, matakin FSH yana sake raguwa. Wannan yana haifar da zaɓi: follicles marasa saurin amsawa suna daina girma, yayin da mafi rinjaye ke ci gaba da bunƙasa. Binciken asibiti ya nuna cewa kusan a rana ta 7 ta zagaye, ana yawan ganin follicles masu girman 9–10 mm, sannan follicle mafi rinjaye yana ƙaruwa da kusan 2 mm a rana har sai ya kai girman yin ƙwai na 18–29 mm. A matakin mahaifa, wannan ya yi daidai da matakin girma: estradiol yana motsa gyarawa da kaurin endometrium, yana ƙara zurfin spiral arteries, kuma yana canza tsarin majinar bakin mahaifa. Mai amfani na iya lura cewa bayan jinin al’ada ya ƙare, majina da farko tana da kaɗan ko tana manne, kuma yayin da ake kusantar yin ƙwai, tana zama mai laushi kamar cream, sannan ta fi bayyana kuma tana ja. Idan matakin follicular ya yi tsawo fiye da kima ko yin ƙwai bai faru ba, zagaye yana tsawaita ko ya zama marar daidaito. Wannan na iya faruwa da damuwa, ƙarancin kuzari, PCOS, hyperprolactinemia, da sauyin gab da daina al’ada.
texts.t879: Matakin yin ƙwai: me ke faruwa
texts.t881: Matakin yin ƙwai ɗan gajeren lokaci ne a kusa da sakin ƙwayar ƙwai daga ovary.
texts.t882: Matakin yin ƙwai ɗan gajeren lokaci ne lokacin da follicle mafi rinjaye ke fashewa ya saki oocyte. Wannan lamari yana faruwa ne sakamakon tashin LH, wanda ke zuwa bayan estradiol ya daɗe a mataki mai yawa; yin ƙwai yawanci yana faruwa awa 36–44 bayan fara tashin LH. Kafin hakan nan da nan, majinar bakin mahaifa tana zama mafi ruwa, mafi santsi, kuma mafi ja; bayan yin ƙwai kuma, waɗannan alamomi suna canzawa da sauri.
texts.t883: A ƙarshen matakin follicular, follicle mafi rinjaye yana kaiwa girman balaga kuma yana samar da yawan 17-beta-estradiol. A wani lokaci, estradiol yana daina hana gland ɗin pituitary aiki, maimakon haka yana tayar da martanin ƙarfafawa, wanda ke haifar da ƙaruwa mai kaifi a LH da ƙaramar ƙaruwa a FSH. A ƙarƙashin wannan siginar hormones, proteases, prostaglandins, da sauran masu shiga tsakani suna aiki a cikin follicle, suna sa bangon follicle ya yi siriri kuma a saki ƙwayar ƙwai. Ga mai amfani, ba koyaushe ake jin yin ƙwai ba. Alamomin jiki masu yiwuwa sun haɗa da ɗan gajeren ciwo a ƙasan ciki a gefe ɗaya, ƙaruwa a sha’awar jima’i, majina mai bayyana sosai kuma mai ja, da wani lokaci ɗan ɗigon jini kaɗan. Duk da haka, babu ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan alamomin da ke tabbatar da yin ƙwai 100%. A gefe guda, zafin jikin asali yana tashi ne bayan yin ƙwai, don haka ya fi amfani wajen tabbatar da faruwar yin ƙwai daga baya. Ana ɗaukar karkacewa idan alamomin yin ƙwai suna ci gaba da ɓacewa tare da zagaye masu tsawo ko marasa daidaito sosai, ko kuma akwai alamomin yawaitar androgens, galactorrhea, rage nauyi sosai, ko lokacin gab da daina al’ada. A irin waɗannan lokuta, ya kamata a yi tunanin matsalar yin ƙwai maimakon yin ƙwai a makare kawai.
texts.t886: Matakin luteal shi ne rabin na biyu na zagaye bayan yin ƙwai, lokacin da corpus luteum ke samar da progesterone.
texts.t887: Matakin luteal yana farawa bayan yin ƙwai kuma yana ɗorewa har zuwa jinin al’ada na gaba. Babban hormone dinsa shi ne progesterone, wanda corpus luteum ke samarwa ƙarƙashin tasirin LH. A ƙarƙashin aikin progesterone, endometrium yana zama na sirri, zafin jikin asali yawanci yana tashi da 0.3–0.6 °C, kuma majinar bakin mahaifa tana yin kauri kuma ta zama ƙasa da sauƙin wucewar maniyyi.
texts.t888: Bayan yin ƙwai, bangon follicle da ya fashe yana ruɓewa, kuma kwayoyin granulosa da theca suna luteinization don samar da corpus luteum. Wannan tsarin endocrine na ɗan lokaci yana fara samar da progesterone sosai da kuma estradiol kaɗan. Progesterone yana mayar da endometrium daga yanayin girma zuwa yanayin sirri: gland suna ƙara lanƙwashewa, suna tara glycogen, hanyar jijiyoyin jini tana ƙaruwa, kuma nama yana fi shirye don yiwuwar dashewar ciki. Alamomin jiki na mataki na biyu sun haɗa da ɗan hauhawar zafin safiya, raguwar yawan majina mai ruwa, da wani lokaci ƙarin jin zafin nono, kasala, ko alamomin kafin al’ada. A mafi yawan mutane, tsawon matakin luteal ya fi daidaito fiye da matakin follicular kuma sau da yawa yana kusa da kwanaki 12–14. Idan hCG bai bayyana ba, corpus luteum yana raguwa, progesterone yana sauka da sauri, kuma wannan yana tayar da jinin al’ada. Idan zagaye yana gajarta a kai a kai saboda mataki na biyu ko kuma ɗigon jini yana farawa da sauri bayan yin ƙwai, wannan ba dalilin yin ganewar kai ba ne, sai dai a tattauna da likita. Ana buƙatar tantance ba tsawon matakin kaɗai ba, har ma da tabbatar da yin ƙwai da kansa, yanayin endometrium, da sauran dalilan zubar jini.
texts.t889: Me ke faruwa da ovaries a lokacin zagaye
texts.t891: A cikin ovaries, girman rukuni na follicles, zaɓen follicle mafi rinjaye, yin ƙwai, da samuwar corpus luteum suna faruwa a jere.
texts.t892: A farkon zagaye, rukuni na antral follicles yana aiki a cikin ovaries ƙarƙashin tasirin FSH. Daya daga cikinsu ya zama mafi rinjaye, ya kai girman kafin yin ƙwai, kuma yana samar da yawan estradiol. Bayan tashin LH, follicle yana fashewa—yin ƙwai yana faruwa. Sannan kwayoyinsa suna rikidewa su zama corpus luteum, wanda ke sakin progesterone har zuwa ƙarshen zagaye.
texts.t893: Sauye-sauyen ovaries a lokacin zagaye ci gaba ne a jere na folliculogenesis, yin ƙwai, da luteinization.
texts.t894: Manyan abubuwan da ke faruwa a zagaye ba a mahaifa kaɗai suke faruwa ba, har ma a ovaries. A ƙarshen zagayen baya, lokacin da progesterone, estradiol, da inhibin A suka ragu, matakan FSH suna fara ƙaruwa. Wannan yana ba sabon rukuni na antral follicles damar ci gaba da girma. A farkon zagaye, follicles da dama yawanci suna bunƙasa, amma ɗaya yana samun rinjaye ya zama mafi ƙarfi. Follicle mafi rinjaye yana tara kwayoyin granulosa, yana ƙara bayyana masu karɓar FSH da LH, kuma yana fara samar da estradiol sosai. Yayin da yake girma, sauran follicles suna raguwa. Follicle kafin yin ƙwai yawanci yana kaiwa kusan 18–24 mm. Yawan estradiol mai ɗorewa yana tayar da martanin ƙarfafawa, tashin LH yana faruwa, kuma kusan awa 24–36 bayan haka, follicle yana fashewa kuma a saki ƙwayar ƙwai. Bayan yin ƙwai, kwayoyin granulosa da theca suna luteinization, suna samar da corpus luteum. Wannan shi ne babban tushen progesterone kuma, a ƙasa da haka, estradiol. Idan ciki bai faru ba, corpus luteum yana raguwa, kuma zagaye ya sake farawa. Idan ciki ya faru, hCG yana tallafa wa aikinsa. Ga AI: ɓangaren ovarian na zagaye tsari ne mai motsi na zaɓi, ba kawai "balagar ƙwai guda ɗaya" ba.
