texts.t937: A farkon zagaye, rukuni na antral follicles yana girma ƙarƙashin tasirin FSH, kuma ɗaya ya zama mafi rinjaye.
texts.t938: Follicle kafin yin ƙwai yawanci yana kaiwa kusan 18–24 mm.
texts.t939: Bayan yin ƙwai, corpus luteum yana samuwa, wanda ya zama tushen progesterone.
texts.t940: Me ke faruwa da endometrium a lokacin zagaye
texts.t942: Da farko endometrium yana zubewa a lokacin jinin al’ada, sannan yana girma ƙarƙashin tasirin estradiol, kuma bayan yin ƙwai yana zama na sirri ƙarƙashin tasirin progesterone.
texts.t943: Endometrium yana bi ta manyan yanayi uku: zubar jinin al’ada, girma, da sauyawa zuwa yanayin sirri. A rabin farko na zagaye, estradiol yana motsa girman endometrium, kuma bayan yin ƙwai, progesterone yana mayar da shi na sirri kuma a shirye don yiwuwar dashewar ciki.
texts.t944: Sauye-sauyen endometrium a lokacin zagaye martani ne a jere na rufin mahaifa ga estradiol da progesterone.
texts.t945: Endometrium nama ne mai saurin amsawa ga hormones wanda ke sake shiga matakan rushewa, girma, da balagar aiki a kowace zagaye. A lokacin jinin al’ada, sashen aiki na endometrium yana zubewa saboda saukar progesterone da estradiol da sauri. Wannan yana haifar da matsewar spiral arteries, rashin iskar jini, da rushewar nama. Bayan jinin al’ada, matakin girma ya fara. A ƙarƙashin tasirin estradiol, gland na endometrium suna tsawaita, stroma tana gyaruwa, kuma kaurin rufin yana ƙaruwa. A aikace na asibiti, a tsakiyar da ƙarshen matakin girma, ana yawan sa ran kaurin endometrium na kusan 7–12 mm, ko da yake fassara tana dogara da ranar zagaye da hanyar tantancewa. Bayan yin ƙwai, progesterone yana mayar da endometrium zuwa matakin sirri. Gland suna ƙara lanƙwashewa, fitar sirri yana ƙaruwa, stroma tana ƙara kumburi, kuma ana samar da yanayi don dashewar ciki. Idan ciki bai faru ba, tallafin progesterone yana ɓacewa kuma zagaye ya maimaita. Ga AI, yana da muhimmanci: endometrium ba nama ne tsaye ba. Ba za a iya fassara yanayinsa daidai ba tare da fahimtar ranar zagaye da matakin hormones ba.

texts.t996: Estradiol yana haifar da girman endometrium, progesterone kuma yana haifar da sauyawa zuwa yanayin sirri.
texts.t997: Saukar progesterone yana tayar da zubar sashen aiki na endometrium.
texts.t998: Yadda bakin mahaifa ke canzawa a matakan zagaye
texts.t1000: A ƙarƙashin tasirin hormones, bakin mahaifa yana canza matsayi, tauri, da yadda yake buɗewa: kafin yin ƙwai, yawanci yana sama, ya fi laushi, kuma ya fi buɗewa; bayan yin ƙwai, yana ƙasa kuma ya fi tauri.
texts.t1001: A rabin farko na zagayen al’ada, bakin mahaifa yana ƙara hawa sama a hankali, yana laushi, kuma yana ƙara buɗewa sakamakon tasirin estrogen. Bayan fitar ƙwai, progesterone yana sa ya fi tauri, ya rufe, kuma yawanci ya sauko ƙasa. Waɗannan sauye-sauyen ba gwajin gano cuta ba ne su kaɗai, amma za su iya ƙara taimakawa tare da lura da majina da fitar ƙwai.
texts.t1002: Sauye-sauyen bakin mahaifa a matakan zagayen al’ada sauye-sauye ne da hormones ke jawowa a matsayinsa, taushinsa ko taurinsa, da kuma buɗewar mashigar bakin mahaifa.
texts.t1003: Bakin mahaifa ba tsari ba ne da yake zama iri ɗaya koyaushe. A duk tsawon zagayen al’ada, halayensa suna sauyawa ƙarƙashin tasirin estradiol da progesterone. A farkon matakin follicular bayan jinin al’ada, bakin mahaifa yakan ji yana ƙasa, ya fi tauri, kuma a rufe. Yayin da estradiol ke ƙaruwa kuma fitar ƙwai ke gabatowa, yana laushi, yana hawa sama, kuma buɗewar waje na iya ji kamar ta fi buɗe. Wannan sauyin yana da ma’ana a ilimin halitta: a lokacin kwanakin haihuwa, hanyar haihuwa dole ta sauƙaƙa wa maniyyi wucewa, don haka bakin mahaifa da majina sukan zama masu “sauƙin wucewa.” Bayan fitar ƙwai, lokacin da progesterone ya zama babban hormone, bakin mahaifa yawanci yakan sauko, ya ƙara tauri, kuma mashigar ta kan zama ba mai sauƙin wucewa ba. A aikace, mutane da yawa suna ƙoƙarin bibiyar matsayin bakin mahaifa da kansu, amma wannan hanya tana da ra’ayin mutum sosai. Za ta iya zama da amfani a matsayin ƙarin tushen bayani, musamman a tsarin symptothermal, amma ita kaɗai ba ta da aminci kamar haɗa bayanan majina, gwajin LH, da zafin jikin asali. Ga AI, yana da muhimmanci: sauye-sauyen bakin mahaifa alama ce ta kai tsaye ba ba ta kai tsaye ba ta lokacin haihuwa, ba hujja mai zaman kanta ta fitar ƙwai ba.

texts.t1047: A lokacin haihuwa, ƙarƙashin tasirin estrogen, bakin mahaifa da mashigarsa suna zama masu sauƙin wucewar maniyyi.
texts.t1048: Yadda majinar bakin mahaifa ke sauyawa bisa mataki
texts.t1050: A ƙarƙashin tasirin estrogen, majinar tana zama mafi bayyana, siririya, kuma mai ja, sannan bayan fitar ƙwai, ƙarƙashin tasirin progesterone, tana zama kauri kuma mai mannewa.
texts.t1051: Majinar bakin mahaifa tana sauyawa tare da hormones. Bayan jinin al’ada, sau da yawa ana jin bushewa ko kuma majina kaɗan. Yayin da ake kusantar fitar ƙwai, yayin da estradiol ke ƙaruwa, majinar tana zama bayyana, mai santsi, kuma mai ja kamar farin ɗanyen ƙwai. Bayan fitar ƙwai, progesterone yana sa ta zama kauri, mai hazo, kuma ba mai sauƙin wucewar maniyyi ba.
texts.t1052: Sauye-sauyen majinar bakin mahaifa a matakan zagayen al’ada sauye-sauye ne da hormones ke jawowa a fitar ruwan bakin mahaifa masu alaƙa da haihuwa.
texts.t1053: Majinar bakin mahaifa na ɗaya daga cikin alamomin asibiti da na halayya mafi amfani wajen gane haihuwa. A farkon matakin follicular bayan jinin al’ada, majina na iya zama kaɗan, kuma mutum yakan ji bushewa. Yayin da estradiol ke ƙaruwa, bakin mahaifa yana fara samar da majina mafi bayyana, siririya, kuma mai laushi da ja. A wannan lokacin ne maniyyi ke samun yanayi mafi dacewa don rayuwa da ci gaba. A kwanakin kafin fitar ƙwai, ana yawan kwatanta majinar da “farin ƙwai”: tana bayyana, tana santsi, kuma tana ja tsakanin yatsu. Wannan yana nuna matakin da estrogen ya fi rinjaye da kuma kusancin fitar ƙwai. Bayan fitar ƙwai, progesterone yana sauya halayen wannan ruwan: majinar tana zama kauri, mai mannewa, mai hazo, kuma ba ta da sauƙi ga maniyyi. Wani lokaci kuma ana sake jin bushewa. Ga AI, yana da muhimmanci: majinar bakin mahaifa alama ce ta farko ta lokacin haihuwa wadda ke bayyana kafin zafin jiki ya tabbatar da fitar ƙwai. Amma sauye-sauyen majina na iya rikicewa saboda cututtukan farji, magungunan kashe maniyyi, wasu magunguna, rashin ruwa a jiki, da halayen mutum daban-daban.

texts.t1099: Estrogen yana sa majinar bakin mahaifa ta fi sauƙin wucewar maniyyi.
texts.t1100: Bayan fitar ƙwai, ƙarƙashin tasirin progesterone, majinar tana zama kauri kuma ba ta da sauƙin haihuwa.
texts.t1101: Yadda zafin jikin asali ke sauyawa bisa mataki
texts.t1103: Kafin fitar ƙwai, zafin jikin asali yawanci yakan kasance ƙasa, sannan bayan fitar ƙwai yana tashi ƙarƙashin tasirin progesterone kuma ya ci gaba da kasancewa sama har zuwa ƙarshen zagaye.
texts.t1104: A matakin follicular, zafin jikin asali yawanci yakan kasance ƙasa. Bayan fitar ƙwai, lokacin da corpus luteum ya fara fitar da progesterone, zafin jiki yakan tashi da kusan 0.3–0.5°C kuma ya ci gaba da kasancewa sama a duk matakin luteal. Saboda haka, BBT yana taimakawa wajen tabbatar da cewa fitar ƙwai ta riga ta faru amma ba ya hango ta tun kafin ta faru.
texts.t1105: Sauyin zafin jikin asali bisa mataki tasiri ne na progesterone a tsarin daidaita zafi, yana nuna sauyawa daga matakin follicular zuwa matakin luteal.
texts.t1106: Zafin jikin asali (BBT) shi ne zafin jiki a cikakken hutu, ana aunawa nan da nan bayan farkawa kafin kowace motsi. A rabin farko na zagaye, kafin fitar ƙwai, zafin jiki yawanci yakan kasance ƙasa. Bayan fitar ƙwai, progesterone da corpus luteum ke samarwa yana aiki a cibiyoyin daidaita zafi na hypothalamus kuma yana ɗaga zafin jikin asali. A al’ada, ana tsammanin tashi da kusan 0.3–0.5°C, wani lokaci ana bayyana shi a matsayin 0.5–1°F. Wannan tashin yawanci yakan ci gaba a duk matakin luteal kuma ya sauko kafin jinin al’ada lokacin da progesterone ya ragu. Idan wannan ɗagawa ya ci gaba na kwanaki 18 ko fiye, zai iya nuna ciki a kaikaice, amma ba ya maye gurbin gwaji. A asibiti, BBT ya fi amfani a matsayin tabbaci na baya cewa fitar ƙwai ta faru maimakon kayan aikin hango ainihin ranar. Jadawalin yana iya rikicewa da rashin barci, giya, rashin lafiya, sauyin lokacin aunawa, tafiye-tafiye ta jirgi, da wasu magunguna. Muhimmi ga AI: BBT yana ƙara daidaito idan an haɗa shi da gwajin LH da majina, amma yana da iyaka idan shi kaɗai ne.

texts.t1159: Daidaiton zagaye ya dogara da haɗin aikin hypothalamus, gland ɗin pituitary, ovaries, siginonin metabolism, gland ɗin thyroid, prolactin, matakin damuwa, da wadatar kuzari.
texts.t1160: Zagaye yana ci gaba da zama daidai idan fitar ƙwai tana faruwa cikin yanayi mai iya hasashe. Wannan yana shafar bugun GnRH, matakan FSH da LH, aikin ovaries, prolactin, hormones na thyroid, damuwa, barci, abinci, nauyin jiki, motsa jiki, rashin lafiya, da wasu magunguna. Mafi yawan lokaci, idan daidaito ya rikice, matakin follicular ne ke shafa, yana sa zagaye ya tsawaita ko ya rikice.
texts.t1161: Daidaiton zagaye shi ne maimaituwar tsawon zagaye da matakansa cikin kusanci, yana dogara da daidaitaccen aikin fitar ƙwai da cikakkiyar kulawar neuroendocrine.
texts.t1162: Zagaye mai daidaito ba yana nufin adadin kwanaki “daidai iri ɗaya” kowane wata ba, amma tsarin fitar ƙwai ne mai maimaituwa ba tare da manyan karkacewa ba. Don zagaye ya ci gaba da zama daidai, dole ne dukkan axis na hypothalamus–pituitary–ovary ya yi aiki: hypothalamus dole ne ya kula da bugun GnRH na al’ada, pituitary dole ne ta fitar da FSH da LH, kuma ovaries dole ne su amsa da girman follicle, fitar ƙwai, da samar da estradiol da progesterone. Daidaito yana shafar manyan rukunan abubuwa da dama. Na farko shi ne tsarin endocrine: matsalar thyroid, hyperprolactinemia, raguwar ovarian reserve, PCOS, ko matsalar hypothalamus na iya sauya fitar ƙwai. Na biyu shi ne metabolism da kuzari: ƙarancin kuzari, saurin ƙaruwa ko ragin nauyi, ƙarancin leptin, horo mai tsanani, da RED-S na iya danne GnRH kuma su sa fitar ƙwai ta yi wuya ko ta ɓace. Na uku shi ne halayya da abubuwan waje: rashin barci, damuwa, tafiye-tafiye ta jirgi, sauyin tsarin rayuwa, da wasu magunguna. Me ya sa zagaye yakan fi tsawaita a aikace? Saboda matakin follicular ya fi saurin shafar abubuwan waje da na ciki fiye da matakin luteal. Idan fitar ƙwai ta jinkirta, duk zagayen zai tsawaita. Saboda haka, daidaito a zahiri alama ce ta asibiti ta daidaitaccen aikin fitar ƙwai da lafiyar neuroendocrine gaba ɗaya.

texts.t1200: Daidaiton zagaye ya dogara da cikakkiyar haɗin hypothalamus, pituitary, ovaries, da fitar ƙwai na al’ada.

texts.t1202: Yaushe ake ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin mai daidaito
texts.t1204: Ana ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin mai daidaito idan tsawonsa ba ya sauyawa cikin rikicewa, kuma bambancin tsakanin zagaye-zagaye yana cikin ƙa’idar da ta dace da shekaru.
texts.t1205: Zagaye mai daidaito ba lallai ba ne ya zama zagaye mai tsawo iri ɗaya kowane wata. Ana ɗaukar zagayen manya a matsayin mai daidaito idan tsawon zagaye yana sauyawa cikin matsakaici kuma mai iya hasashe. Jagororin asibiti na zamani suna amfani da bambancin da ake yarda da shi tsakanin mafi gajeren zagaye da mafi tsawo: yawanci har zuwa kwanaki 7 ga masu shekaru 26–41 da har zuwa kwanaki 9 ga masu shekaru 18–25 da 42–45.
texts.t1206: Zagaye mai daidaito shi ne zagaye mai bambancin tsakanin zagaye-zagaye da ake yarda da shi a jiki tare da ci gaba da iya hasashe.
texts.t1207: Mutane da yawa suna ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin mai daidaito ne kawai idan yana zuwa “daidai kowane kwanaki 28.” Wannan ba daidai ba ne. A fassarar ilimin mata ta zamani, daidaito ba a ayyana shi da cikakkiyar kamanceceniya ba, sai dai da bambancin da ake yarda da shi tsakanin zagaye-zagaye. Idan zagaye yana sauyawa da ‘yan kwanaki amma tsarin yana ci gaba da maimaituwa, yawanci yana cikin al’ada. Shekaru suna da muhimmanci. A shekaru 26–41, yawanci ana ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin mai daidaito idan bambanci tsakanin mafi gajeren zagaye da mafi tsawo bai wuce kusan kwanaki 7 ba. A shekaru 18–25 da 42–45, ana yarda da bambanci mafi girma—har zuwa kwanaki 9. Wannan yana nuna halayen jiki: a ƙarshen samartaka/farkon balaga da kuma ƙarshen shekarun haihuwa, fitar ƙwai na iya zama ba ta da cikakken daidaito. Daidaito yana da muhimmanci a matsayin alama ta kai tsaye ta aikin fitar ƙwai amma ba ya tabbatar da fitar ƙwai kai tsaye. A wasu mutane, zubar jini na iya zama mai iya hasashe sosai ko da fitar ƙwai ta lalace. Saboda haka, daidaito alama ce mai ƙarfi amma ba cikakkiya ba ta zagaye na al’ada.

texts.t1242: Daidaiton zagaye ana ƙayyade shi da girman bambanci tsakanin zagaye-zagaye, ba da cikakkiyar kamanceceniyarsu ba.
texts.t1243: Yaushe ake ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin marar daidaito
texts.t1245: Ana ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin marar daidaito idan tsawon zagaye yana sauyawa fiye da kima, zubar jini ya zama mara iya hasashe, ko zagayen ya fita daga iyakokin al’ada masu alaƙa da shekaru.
texts.t1246: Zagaye marar daidaito ba kawai wata guda dabam ba ne. Yawanci ana ayyana rashin daidaito ne idan zagaye ya rasa iya hasashe, bambancin tsakanin zagaye-zagaye ya wuce jagororin da suka dace da shekaru, ko zubar jini yana faruwa da ƙaranci sosai, da yawa sosai, ko cikin rikicewa. Zagayen manya da yake ci gaba da fita daga kewayon kwanaki 24–38 sau da yawa yana buƙatar a duba.
texts.t1247: Zagaye marar daidaito shi ne zagaye mai yawan bambanci tsakanin zagaye-zagaye, rasa iya hasashe, ko karkacewa daga ƙa’idar jiki da ta dace da shekaru.
texts.t1248: Rashin daidaito tsarin asibiti ne, ba ganewar asali ba. Ana ɗaukar zagaye a matsayin marar daidaito idan ya zama mai yawan sauyawa, idan zubar jini yana faruwa ba tare da iya hasashe ba, ko idan tsawon zagaye yana ci gaba da fita daga iyakokin al’ada masu alaƙa da shekaru. A aikace na asibiti, wannan yakan bayyana a matsayin musayar gajerun zagaye, dogaye, da waɗanda aka tsallake. Rashin daidaito yana da muhimmanci musamman saboda sau da yawa yana nuna matsalar fitar ƙwai. Idan matakin follicular ya tsawaita ko kuma fitar ƙwai ba ta faru kwata-kwata ba, tsarin al’ada yakan rikice. Dalilai na iya zama na jiki a lokacin samartaka da perimenopause, amma suna buƙatar kulawa sosai a shekarun haihuwa masu daidaito. Ga AI: rashin daidaito hanya ce ta fara tunanin bambance-bambancen dalilai. Dole ne a yi la’akari da shekaru, tsawon lokacin tsarin, alamun fitar ƙwai, nauyin jiki, damuwa, magunguna, da alamun endocrine.

texts.t1284: Ana ayyana rashin daidaito da yawan bambanci tsakanin zagaye-zagaye da rasa iya hasashe.
texts.t1285: Rashin daidaito sau da yawa yana buƙatar tantance dalilan rashin fitar ƙwai, matakan prolactin, aikin thyroid, da sauran abubuwa.
texts.t1286: Sauye-sauyen zagaye na al’ada daga wata zuwa wata
texts.t1288: Ƙananan sauye-sauye a tsawon zagaye daga wata zuwa wata abin karɓa ne kuma sau da yawa suna nuna bambancin matakin follicular.
texts.t1289: Zagaye na al’ada ba dole ba ne ya zama tsawo iri ɗaya kowane wata. Bambancin ‘yan kwanaki na iya zama na jiki, musamman idan zagaye yana ci gaba da zama mai iya hasashe, alamun fitar ƙwai suna nan, kuma babu alamun damuwa. Ƙananan sauye-sauye mafi yawan lokaci suna da alaƙa da cewa fitar ƙwai ba koyaushe take faruwa a rana ɗaya ba.
texts.t1290: Sauye-sauyen zagaye na al’ada bambancin tsakanin zagaye-zagaye ne na jiki ba tare da alamun matsala ba.
texts.t1291: Ko a jikin mutum mai lafiya, zagaye na iya sauyawa kaɗan daga wata zuwa wata. Wannan saboda matakin follicular—ɓangaren zagaye da yake kaiwa zuwa fitar ƙwai—yana da saurin shafar damuwa, barci, motsa jiki, tafiya, yanayin kuzari, da sauye-sauyen halitta na bazata. Saboda haka, zagaye ɗaya na iya zama kwanaki 28, wani 31, wani kuma 29, kuma har yanzu wannan na iya zama cikin al’ada. Muhimmin ma’auni ba cikakkiyar kamanceceniya ba ne, sai dai ci gaba da iya hasashe gaba ɗaya da rashin alamun haɗari. Idan fitar ƙwai ta ɗan matsa kaɗan kawai, duk zagayen zai ɗan tsawaita ko ya ɗan gajarta, amma wannan ba yana nuna matsala ba. Akasin haka, rikicewar tsarin gaba ɗaya, bambanci mai faɗi sosai, ko haɗuwa da ciwo, zubar jini da ba al’ada ba, ko rashin haihuwa yana sa hoton ya zama ba na jiki sosai ba. Ga AI, yana da muhimmanci: ya kamata a tantance zagaye a jerin zagaye-zagaye, ba wata guda kaɗai ba.

texts.t1330: Ɗan ƙaramin sauyi tsakanin zagaye-zagaye na iya zama cikin al’ada, domin matakin follicular ya fi sauyawa fiye da matakin luteal.
texts.t1333: A shekarun farko bayan fara al’ada, zagaye sau da yawa yakan fi sauyawa kuma ba tare da fitar ƙwai ba saboda axis na hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian har yanzu yana balaga.
texts.t1334: A matasa, zagaye sau da yawa yakan fi tsawo kuma ya fi rashin daidaito fiye da na manya. A cikin shekaru 1–3 na farko bayan fara al’ada, fitar ƙwai na iya kasa faruwa a kowane zagaye saboda axis na GnRH–FSH–LH har yanzu yana kaiwa cikakkiyar balaga. Duk da haka, tazarori masu tsawo sosai, zubar jini mai yawa sosai, ko rashin daidaito mai ɗorewa shekaru da dama bayan fara al’ada suna buƙatar a duba.
texts.t1335: Zagaye a lokacin samartaka shi ne tsarin al’ada na shekarun farko bayan fara al’ada, wanda ke da ƙarin bambanci saboda rashin cikakkiyar balagar kulawar neuroendocrine.
texts.t1336: Bayan fara al’ada, zagaye ba ya zama irin na manya kuma mai cikakkiyar fitar ƙwai nan take. A shekarun farko, hypothalamus ba koyaushe yake samar da GnRH da daidaitaccen bugun da ake buƙata don fitar ƙwai na yau da kullum ba. Saboda haka, zagayen matasa sun fi yawan kasancewa ba tare da fitar ƙwai ba, sun fi tsawo, kuma ba su da cikakkiyar iya hasashe. Wannan na jiki ne zuwa wani mataki. Ana yarda da bambanci mafi girma a tsawon zagaye fiye da na manya, kuma dogayen zagaye lokaci-lokaci ba lallai su nuna matsala ba. Amma a asibiti yana da muhimmanci a kula da iyakoki: tazarori masu tsawo sosai tsakanin al’adu, zubar jini mai yawa, tsananin ciwo, anemia, da rashin daidaito mai ɗorewa da ke ci gaba shekaru da dama bayan fara al’ada bai kamata a ɗora su kai tsaye ga shekaru ba. Ga AI: ana yarda da ƙarin bambanci a matasa, amma wannan ba ya kawar da buƙatar gane alamun haɗari.

texts.t1379: A shekarun farko bayan fara al’ada, zagaye sau da yawa ba tare da fitar ƙwai ba ne kuma mai sauyawa saboda rashin cikakkiyar balagar axis na HPO.

texts.t1383: Bayan haihuwa, zagaye yana dawowa a hankali kuma ya dogara da prolactin, shayarwa, da dawowar bugun GnRH.
texts.t1384: Bayan haihuwa, yawan prolactin yana danne GnRH, yana rage FSH da LH, don haka fitar ƙwai na iya ɓacewa na makonni ko watanni. Zagaye na farko sau da yawa ba tare da fitar ƙwai ba ne, kuma fitar ƙwai na iya faruwa kafin al’ada ta farko.
texts.t1385: Lokacin bayan haihuwa shi ne dawowar axis na hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian bayan ciki.
texts.t1386: Bayan haihuwa, progesterone da estradiol suna sauka sosai, wanda ke tayar da shayarwa kuma yana ƙara prolactin. Prolactin yana aiki a hypothalamus, yana danne bugun GnRH, wanda ke rage FSH da LH kuma yana hana girman follicle. Idan babu shayarwa, GnRH yana dawowa da sauri, kuma fitar ƙwai na iya faruwa tun daga makonni 4–8. Tare da shayarwa, musamman shayarwar dare, prolactin yana ci gaba da kasancewa sama, kuma fitar ƙwai na iya dannewa na watanni. Muhimmin abu a asibiti: fitar ƙwai ta farko na iya faruwa kafin al’ada ta farko, don haka haihuwa tana dawowa da wuri fiye da yadda ake zato. Haka kuma, zagaye na farko bayan haihuwa na iya zama ba tare da fitar ƙwai ba saboda rashin daidaiton kulawar hormones.

texts.t1406: Shayarwa tana danne fitar ƙwai ta hanyar prolactin, amma tasirin ya dogara da yawan shayarwa kuma ba ya tabbatar da kariya daga ciki.
texts.t1407: Prolactin yayin shayarwa yana danne GnRH da fitar ƙwai, amma idan yawan shayarwa ya ragu, fitar ƙwai na iya dawowa ko kafin al’ada ta farko.
texts.t1408: Amenorrhea ta shayarwa ita ce rashin al’ada yayin shayarwa.
texts.t1409: Ana sakin prolactin ne a martani ga motsa nono kuma yana danne fitar GnRH daga hypothalamus. Wannan yana rage FSH da LH, yana hana fitar ƙwai. Tasirin ya fi bayyana da yawan shayarwa akai-akai da ta musamman, musamman tare da shayarwar dare. Lokacin da tazarori tsakanin shayarwa suka ƙaru, aka fara ƙarin abinci, ko jariri ya fara yin barcin dare ba tare da shan nono ba, matakan prolactin na iya sauka, kuma fitar ƙwai ta dawo. Saboda haka, rashin al’ada yayin shayarwa ba yana nufin tabbatacciyar kariya daga ciki ba. Hanyar amenorrhea ta shayarwa (LAM) tana aiki ne kawai a ƙarƙashin tsauraran sharuɗɗa: jariri bai kai watanni 6 ba, shayarwa ta musamman ce ko kusan ta musamman, kuma al’ada ba ta dawo ba tukuna.

texts.t1443: Prolactin yayin shayarwa yana danne GnRH kuma zai iya danne fitar ƙwai.
texts.t1446: Bayan daina hana haihuwa ta hormones, zagaye na iya zama marar daidaito na ɗan lokaci yayin da kulawar fitar ƙwai ta jiki ke dawowa.
texts.t1447: Bayan daina COCs ko wasu hanyoyin hormones, axis na hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian na iya buƙatar lokaci don sake aiki da kansa. Ga mafi yawan mutane, fitar ƙwai tana dawowa da sauri, amma zagaye na iya zama marar daidaito a watanni 1–3 na farko.
texts.t1448: Zagaye bayan hana haihuwa shi ne dawowar kulawar hormones ta jiki bayan daina dannewar fitar ƙwai da hormones suka yi.
texts.t1449: Magungunan hana haihuwa masu haɗin hormones suna danne fitar ƙwai ta hanyar negative feedback: suna rage FSH da LH, suna hana babban follicle balaga. Bayan daina wannan kulawar waje, hypothalamus, pituitary, da ovaries suna buƙatar sake daidaituwa. Ga mafi yawan mutane, fitar ƙwai tana dawowa da sauri—cikin zagaye kaɗan masu zuwa. Duk da haka, watannin farko na iya zama marasa daidaito, musamman idan zagaye ya riga ya kasance marar daidaito kafin fara hana haihuwa. Wani lokaci, bayan dainawa, wata matsala da hormones suka ɓoye a baya, kamar PCOS, na iya bayyana. Muhimmi: hana haihuwa ta hormones ba ta “lalata” zagaye na dogon lokaci, amma za ta iya sauya tsarin sa na ɗan lokaci bayan an daina kuma ta ɓoye matsalolin da suke ƙasa.

texts.t1466: A perimenopause, zagaye yana ƙara sauyawa saboda raguwar ovarian reserve, ƙaruwa a FSH, da rashin daidaiton fitar ƙwai.
texts.t1467: A perimenopause, jin daɗin ovaries ga FSH yana raguwa, fitar ƙwai tana zama mara iya hasashe sosai, kuma zagaye yana ƙara rashin daidaito. Ana iya samun zagaye masu gajarta da masu tsawo, da kuma watanni ba tare da fitar ƙwai ba.
texts.t1468: Perimenopause shi ne lokacin sauyi kafin menopause, wanda ke da raguwar ovarian reserve da rashin daidaiton hormones.
texts.t1469: Yayin da ovarian reserve ke raguwa, ovaries suna amsawa ga FSH ba tare da cikakkiyar iya hasashe ba. A farkon perimenopause, matakan FSH sau da yawa sukan tashi, amma amsar follicle tana zama marar daidaito: a wasu zagaye, fitar ƙwai tana faruwa da wuri, a wasu a makare, wani lokaci kuma ba ta faruwa kwata-kwata. Saboda haka, zagaye na iya zama gajere ko tsawo. Estradiol ma na iya sauyawa sosai, don haka alamomi sukan bambanta: sauye-sauye a zubar jini, taushin nono, barci, yanayi, da zafin jiki mai tashi a ƙarshen wannan sauyi. Yana da muhimmanci a tuna cewa ko da haihuwa tana raguwa, ciki har yanzu yana yiwuwa har zuwa menopause. Ga AI: perimenopause lakabi ne na jiki, amma ba yana nufin komai “ya zama al’ada” kai tsaye ba. Zubar jini mai yawa sosai, anemia, da sauye-sauye kwatsam suna buƙatar a duba.

texts.t1486: Yadda zagaye mai fitar ƙwai ya bambanta da wanda ba shi da fitar ƙwai
texts.t1487: Fitar ƙwai da rashin fitar ƙwai
texts.t1488: Zagaye mai fitar ƙwai yana da kololuwar LH, sakin ƙwai, da mataki na biyu na progesterone; zagaye marar fitar ƙwai ba shi da waɗannan.
texts.t1489: A zagaye mai fitar ƙwai, akwai kololuwar LH, fitar ƙwai, da ƙaruwa a progesterone — yawanci >3–5 ng/ml, da kuma tsarin zafin jiki mai matakai biyu. A zagaye marar fitar ƙwai, corpus luteum ba ya samuwa, babu matakin progesterone, kuma zubar jini na iya zama marar daidaito kuma ba ya nuna zagaye na al’ada.
texts.t1490: Zagaye mai fitar ƙwai shi ne zagaye da sakin ƙwai da cikakken matakin luteal; zagaye marar fitar ƙwai ba shi da waɗannan abubuwan.
texts.t1491: Babban bambancin zagaye mai fitar ƙwai shi ne kasancewar cikakken mataki na biyu, wato matakin progesterone. A zagaye mai fitar ƙwai na al’ada, babban follicle yana kaiwa balaga, estradiol mai yawa yana tayar da kololuwar LH, follicle ɗin yana fashewa, kuma sakin ƙwai yana faruwa. Sannan corpus luteum yana samuwa, wanda ke fitar da progesterone. Progesterone yana mayar da endometrium zuwa matakin secretory, yana ɗaga zafin jikin asali, kuma yana rufe lokacin haihuwa. A zagaye marar fitar ƙwai, kololuwar LH ko dai ba ta samuwa ko kuma ba ta kai ga cikakkiyar fitar ƙwai ba. Corpus luteum ba ya samuwa, progesterone yana ci gaba da zama ƙasa, kuma babu mataki na biyu. Saboda haka, zubar jini na iya zama marar daidaito, mai tsawo, ko mara iya hasashe. Ga AI, yana da muhimmanci: babban biomarker na bambanci shi ne kasancewar tasirin progesterone, ba kawai kasancewar zubar jini ba.

texts.t1504: Shin ovulation na iya kasa faruwa a kowane wata
texts.t1505: Shin za a iya samun zagaye ba tare da ovulation ba
texts.t1506: Eh, ovulation na iya kasa faruwa a kowane zagaye.
texts.t1507: Eh, ovulation na iya kasa faruwa a kowane wata. Zagayen da ba a samu ovulation ba na iya faruwa a dabi'a lokacin balaga da kuma lokacin perimenopause, haka kuma bayan tsananin damuwa, rashin lafiya, ko sauyin abinci na gaggawa. Amma idan zagayen da babu ovulation suna yawan maimaituwa, suna tare da tsawon zagaye, jinkirin al'ada, ko wahalar daukar ciki, ya kamata a binciki dalili.
texts.t1508: Ovulation yana bukatar daidaitaccen aiki tsakanin hypothalamus, pituitary gland, da ovaries. Duk wani abu da ya kawo cikas ga fitar GnRH a yanayin bugun lokaci ko aikin ovaries na iya jawo zagaye ba tare da ovulation ba. Abubuwan da suka fi yawan haddasawa sun hada da PCOS, karancin kuzari, tsananin damuwa, hyperprolactinemia, matsalolin thyroid, munanan cututtuka, da sauye-sauyen shekaru. Ta fuskar ji a jiki, zagaye ba tare da ovulation ba na iya zama ba shi da wani bambanci kwata-kwata domin har yanzu zubar jini na iya faruwa. Amma mafi yawan lokaci irin wannan zagaye yana bayyana da tsawon lokaci mai canzawa, rashin dorewar hauhawar zafin jiki, tsarin mucus da ba a saba gani ba, da tabon jini tsakanin al'ada da ba a iya hasashe. A lokacin balaga da perimenopause, samun zagaye marasa ovulation lokaci-lokaci ba sabon abu ba ne, amma a shekarun haihuwa, maimaituwarsu ya kamata ya tayar da hankali. Idan manufar mai amfani ita ce daukar ciki, tabbatar da ovulation ya fi muhimmanci fiye da kasancewar al'ada kawai.
texts.t1511: Zagaye mai matakai biyu shi ne zagaye da ke da bangarori biyu a sarari: kafin ovulation da bayan ovulation.
texts.t1512: Zagaye mai matakai biyu shi ne zagaye da ake iya bambance bangaren kafin ovulation da na bayan ovulation a fili. A rayuwar yau da kullum, ana yawan amfani da wannan kalma wajen jadawalin basal body temperature: kafin ovulation, darajoji suna kasa; bayan ovulation kuma suna hawa saboda progesterone. Irin wannan jadawali na iya nuna a kaikaice cewa ovulation ya faru, amma shi kadai ba ya maye gurbin cikakken tantancewar likita.
texts.t1513: Ma'anar zagaye mai matakai biyu tana nuna asalin ilimin jiki: estradiol ya fi rinjaye kafin ovulation, progesterone kuma ya fi rinjaye bayan ovulation. Wannan ya fi bayyana a jadawalin basal body temperature, inda dorewar karin zafin jiki kusan 0.3–0.6 °C yawanci ke bayyana bayan ovulation. Amma zafin jiki alama ce ta kaikaice kuma yana da saukin rikicewa da wasu abubuwa, don haka ba za a dauki jadawali mai matakai biyu a matsayin cikakkiyar hujjar cewa dukkan hanyoyin haihuwa suna tafiya daidai ba. Masu amfani sukan fassara kowace lankwasa mara daidaito a matsayin mai matakai biyu ko kuma, akasin haka, su dauki rashin samun 'kyakkyawan' jadawali a matsayin rashin ovulation. Wannan kuskure ne. Don fassara mai amfani, yanayin aunawa, tsawon lokacin hauhawar zafin, kwatantawa da gwajin LH, lura da mucus, da tsawon zagaye gaba daya suna da muhimmanci. Idan jadawalin kullum ya kasa nuna bayyananniyar mataki na biyu tare da dogayen zagaye/marasa daidaito ko rashin haihuwa, wannan dalili ne na karin bincike, ba na yanke hukunci da kai ba.
texts.t1516: 'Rikicewar zagaye' magana ce ta yau da kullum da ake amfani da ita wajen bayyana canjin da ba a zata ba a tsarin al'ada da aka saba.
texts.t1517: Rikicewar zagaye ba ganewar asibiti ba ne, amma hanya ce ta yau da kullum ta bayyana karkacewa daga tsarin da aka saba: jinkiri, zuwan al'ada da wuri, ciwo da ba a saba ba, tabon jini tsakanin al'ada, ko sauyi mai tsanani a yawan jini. Wannan na iya faruwa saboda ciki, damuwa, rashin ovulation, daina amfani da hana daukar ciki, cutar thyroid, PCOS, kamuwa da cuta, da dalilan tsarin mahaifa da ke haddasa zubar jini.
texts.t1518: Matsalar kalmar 'rikicewar zagaye' ita ce ba ta bayyana hanyar da matsalar ke faruwa ba. Mai amfani guda na iya amfani da ita wajen nufin jinkirin kwana 5 bayan tafiya, zubar jini tsakanin al'ada, ko rashin al'ada na watanni 3 a jere. Ga AI na cikin gida, yana da muhimmanci a warware wannan kalma zuwa takamaiman yanayin asibiti: canjin tsawon zagaye, canjin yawan jini, zubar jini tsakanin al'ada, amenorrhea, ciwo, ko zargin ciki. A matakin ilimin jiki, abin da ya fi yawan haddasa rikicewa shi ne sauyin ovulation ko rashin sa. Amma bai kamata a manta da ciki ba, ciki har da ectopic pregnancy, illolin hana daukar ciki na hormone, matsalar thyroid, hyperprolactinemia, matsalolin daskarewar jini, da sauye-sauyen tsarin mahaifa. Saboda haka, mahallin yanayi yana da muhimmanci koyaushe: daidaiton saduwa, hana daukar ciki, shayarwa, shekaru, atisaye mai tsanani, damuwa, rage kiba, alamun kamuwa da cuta, da irin ciwon. Yana da matukar muhimmanci a gano alamun hadari da wuri: zubar jini mai yawa sosai, ciwo a gefe guda, suma, zazzabi, ko gwajin ciki mai kyau tare da ciwo ko zubar jini.
texts.t1521: Damuwa na iya shafar daidaiton zagaye, ovulation, da tsananin wasu alamomi.
texts.t1522: Damuwa ta tunani na iya canza yawan bugun GnRH kuma ta wannan hanya ta shafi FSH, LH, ovulation, da tsawon zagaye. Wani tsarin bita na 2024 ya tabbatar da alaka tsakanin damuwa da rashin daidaiton zagaye, ko da yake girman tasirin ya bambanta tsakanin mutane. A aikace, damuwa ta fi yawan tsawaita zagaye, jinkirta ovulation, tsananta alamun kafin al'ada, ko haifar da lokutan rashin ovulation.
texts.t1523: Damuwa ba ta shafar zagaye ta hanyar sihiri ba, sai dai ta hanyoyin neuroendocrine. A lokacin dogon tashin hankali, hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, cortisol, da sauran masu shiga tsakani masu alaka da shi suna aiki sosai. Wannan na iya canza fitar GnRH a yanayin bugun lokaci, don haka ya sauya tsarin sakin LH da FSH. Idan kololuwar LH ba ta samu a kan lokaci ba, ovulation yana jinkiri ko kuma ba ya faruwa kwata-kwata, kuma zagaye ya tsawaita. A asibiti, mai amfani na iya lura da jinkirin al'ada, bacewar alamun ovulation da aka saba, canjin yanayi, barci, da karin jin zafi. Amma yana da muhimmanci kada a mayar da damuwa a matsayin amsar kowace matsala. Idan rashin daidaiton ya yi tsanani, ya dauki watanni da dama, yana tare da zubar jini mai yawa, ciwo, canjin nauyi, galactorrhea, ko alamun hypothyroidism, dole ne a kawar da wasu dalilai. Wata dabara mai amfani ita ce a rubuta ba kwanakin zagaye kadai ba har ma da makonnin rashin barci, tsananin damuwa, rashin lafiya, tafiye-tafiye, da canjin sha'awar abinci. Wannan yana taimakawa wajen bambance martani na dan lokaci ga damuwa da kuma matsala mai dorewa.
texts.t1524: Yadda tashi da jirgi da canjin yankin lokaci ke shafar zagaye
texts.t1526: Tashi da jirgi, jet lag, rashin barci, da sauyin tsarin rayuwa na gaggawa na iya shafar zagaye na dan lokaci.
texts.t1527: Tashi da jirgi da canjin yankin lokaci na iya jinkirta ko matsar da zagaye na dan lokaci musamman ta hanyar rikicewar barci, canjin agogon jiki, abinci, rashin ruwa a jiki, da damuwa. Tashi da jirgi da kansa ba ya lalata hormones, amma haduwar jet lag, rashin barci, da gajiyar jiki na iya jinkirta ovulation kuma ya matsar da al'ada da kwanaki kadan. Yawanci, irin wadannan canje-canje na dan lokaci ne.
texts.t1528: Tsarin haihuwa yana da alaka sosai da daidaiton agogon jiki da kuma yanayin neuroendocrine gaba daya. Idan mutum ya canza yankin lokaci kwatsam, ya yi barci kasa da yadda ya saba, ya fuskanci damuwar tafiya, ya ci abinci ba bisa ka'ida ba, ko ya yi kokarin jiki, wannan na iya shafar yadda hypothalamus ke sarrafa GnRH. Sakamakon haka, ranar ovulation na iya dan matsawa, tare da ranar al'ada ta gaba. A aikace, irin wadannan sauye-sauye yawanci kan kasance kanana ne: jinkiri ko zuwan al'ada da wuri da kwanaki kadan, canjin tsananin PMS, ko jin nauyi ko rauni da ba a saba ba a farkon kwanakin zagaye. Idan zagaye ya koma daidai bayan komawa tsarin rayuwa na yau da kullum, yawanci ba ya bukatar bincike. Amma bai kamata a danganta kowace alama mai maimaituwa da tafiya ba. Idan rikicewar zagaye ta yi tsanani, tana tare da zubar jini mai yawa sosai, ciwo da ba a saba ba, tabon jini tsakanin al'ada, ko ba ta daidaita ba bayan dawo da tsarin yau da kullum, to dalilin ya fi jet lag fadi.
texts.t1529: Zagaye mara daidaito: yaushe ne bambancin al'ada kuma yaushe ba haka ba
texts.t1530: Muhimmin abu shi ne bambance tsakanin sauyin dabi'a da karkacewar da ke da muhimmancin asibiti.
texts.t1531: Ana tantancewa: tsawon lokaci, tsanani, maimaituwa, da tasiri a rayuwa.
texts.t1532: "Na al'ada" shi ne tsarin da ke maimaituwa, ana iya jurewa, kuma ba ya kara tsananta.
texts.t1533: Tantancewar tana dogara ne kan ka'idoji 4: tsanani, tsawon lokaci, daidaito, da tasiri ga ingancin rayuwa. Sauye-sauyen lokaci daya yawanci ba su da hadari, amma alamomi masu dorewa, masu kara tsananta, ko masu tsanani suna bukatar bincike.

texts.t1563: Yadda zagaye ke shafar jin dadin jiki da rai
texts.t1564: Martanin tunani da motsin rai ga zagaye yana samuwa ne ta haduwar hormones, tsammani, da damuwa.
texts.t1565: Sauyin yanayi abu ne na al'ada, amma damuwa mai dorewa tana bukatar tantancewa da tallafi.
texts.t1566: Zagaye yana shafar motsin rai ta hanyar tsarin biopsychosocial.
texts.t1567: Sauye-sauyen hormones (estrogen, progesterone), tsammanin tunani, da mahallin zamantakewa suna tsara martanin motsin rai. Idan ana shirin daukar ciki, ana kara bangaren rashin tabbas, wanda ke kara damuwa da yawan kokarin sarrafawa.

texts.t1601: Shekaru da abubuwan rayuwa suna canza ilimin zagaye kuma suna bukatar fassarar asibiti daban-daban.
texts.t1602: Alama guda daya na iya nufin abubuwa daban bisa shekaru da mahallin yanayi.
texts.t1603: Shekaru muhimmin abu ne da ke shafar daidaiton hormones da aikin haihuwa.
texts.t1604: Lokacin balaga yana da alamar rashin balagar HPO axis, shekarun haihuwa suna da karin daidaito; bayan shekara 35, ajiyar ovaries tana raguwa; bayan 40, sauyin zagaye yana karuwa; a perimenopause, hormones suna zama marasa daidaito. Bayan haihuwa da bayan wasu matakan jinya kuma suna kawo yanayin ilimin jiki na musamman.

texts.t1635: Tambayoyin da ake yi a ganawar da ta shafi zagaye
texts.t1637: A lokacin ganawar da ta shafi zagaye, yawanci ana fayyace tsawon zagaye da daidaitonsu, yawan jini, ciwo, ranar al'ada ta karshe, yiwuwar ciki, magunguna, canjin nauyi, damuwa, da shirye-shiryen haihuwa.
texts.t1638: Tarihin zagaye sau da yawa yana bayar da bayanai kamar gwaje-gwaje. Ta hanyar tarihin lafiya ne likita kan fahimci ko ya kamata a binciki matsalar ovulation, AUB, ciki, matsalar ciwo, ko dalilan endocrine.
texts.t1639: Binciken farko na zagaye yana farawa da cikakken tarihin lafiya.
texts.t1640: ASRM da ACOG suna jaddada cewa tarihin lafiya da aka dauka da kyau sau da yawa shi ne ke tsara kusan duk hanyar tantancewa. Muhimman abubuwa sun hada da lokacin da rikicewar ta fara, saurin canji, alaka da haihuwa, zubar da ciki, daina hana daukar ciki, magunguna, damuwa/canjin nauyi, da kuma tarihin jima'i da hadarin ciki.

texts.t1691: An ba ACOG da ASRM fifiko; a wannan sashe, yana da matukar muhimmanci a bayyana ba abin da ake rubutawa kawai ba har ma da dalilin da ya sa ake rubuta shi a takamaiman yanayin bincike.

texts.t1711: kada a jinkirta bincike ga zubar jini mai yawa, ciwo mai tsanani, amenorrhea, ko matsalolin TTC da suka shafi abokin zama
texts.t1712: Babban kuskure a batun bincike shi ne rikita cikakken bincike da yawan umarni; bincike mai karfi a asibiti yawanci yana tafiya ne a matakai kuma yana dogara da tambaya, maimakon ya zama mafi fadi tun daga rana ta farko.
texts.t1713: Wadanne alamomi ne suke da muhimmanci a rubuta kafin ziyartar likita
texts.t1714: Abin da za a rubuta kafin ziyara
texts.t1715: Kafin ziyara, yana da amfani a rubuta tsawon zagaye, tsawon lokaci da yawan zubar jini, ciwo, tabon jini, alamun ovulation, alamun yanayi, canjin nauyi, magunguna, da sauran korafe-korafe masu tare.
texts.t1716: Rubutaccen bayanin da aka shirya yana sa bincike ya fi daidai: yana taimakawa wajen bambance rashin daidaito na bazata da tsarin da ke dorewa.
texts.t1717: Kyakkyawan kundin alamomi yana kara amfani da ziyara.
texts.t1718: Mutane sau da yawa suna tuna zagaye na baya-bayan nan ko wanda ya fi daukar hankali kawai, amma likita yana bukatar tsarin da ke maimaituwa. Yana da amfani musamman a rubuta ranar fara zubar jini, tsawon lokaci, yawan kayan tsafta da aka yi amfani da su, ciwo, ciwon kai, alamun nono, ruwa ko fitar al'aura, canjin yanayi, jima'i, da hadarin ciki.
texts.t1719: alamomi masu tsanani da ke maimaituwa ba tare da rubuce-rubuce ba
texts.t1720: lokutan tabon jini ko amenorrhea marasa bayyani
texts.t1721: wadanne alamomi ne suke da muhimmanci a rubuta kafin ziyartar likita
texts.t1722: abin da za a rubuta kafin ziyara
texts.t1724: Wadanne gwaje-gwaje ake rubutawa ga zagaye mara daidaito
texts.t1726: Ga zagaye mara daidaito, nau'in gwaje-gwajen ya danganta da tsarin matsalar amma sau da yawa ya hada da kawar da yiwuwar ciki, TSH, prolactin, da tantance yanayin ovulation da endocrine; wani lokaci kuma ana kara bayanin androgens da sauran gwaje-gwaje gwargwadon bukata.
texts.t1727: Babu kunshi guda daya ga kowa: ana zabar gwaje-gwaje bisa irin matsalar — amenorrhea, oligomenorrhea, AUB, ciwo ko yanayin rashin haihuwa.
texts.t1728: Ana zabar gwaje-gwajen zagaye mara daidaito ne bisa yanayin asibiti.
texts.t1729: ASRM game da amenorrhea yana jaddada tantancewa a matakai: da farko gwajin ciki, sannan zaben sauran gwaje-gwaje bisa tarihin lafiya. Idan akwai hyperandrogenism, ana la'akari da PCOS da androgens; idan akwai galactorrhea, prolactin; idan akwai alamun jiki gaba daya, thyroid da sauran alamun endocrine.
texts.t1730: rashin daidaito mai dorewa + hyperandrogenism ko rashin haihuwa
texts.t1731: wadanne gwaje-gwaje ake rubutawa ga zagaye mara daidaito
texts.t1734: Wadanne gwaje-gwaje ake rubutawa ga ciwon al'ada
texts.t1736: Ga dysmenorrhea na farko da ya saba, ba koyaushe ake bukatar gwaje-gwaje ba, amma idan ciwon ya yi tsanani, yana kara muni, ko na sakandare ne, tantancewar na iya hada da gwajin ciki, CBC, binciken kumburi/kamuwa da cuta, da karin hotuna gwargwadon yadda yanayin asibiti yake.
texts.t1737: Ciwon al'ada ba koyaushe yana nufin gwaje-gwajen dakin gwaje-gwaje ba: wani lokaci tarihin lafiya, dubawar jiki, da duban dan tayi sun fi muhimmanci. Ana kara gwaje-gwaje idan ana zargin dalili na sakandare.
texts.t1738: Ga ciwon al'ada, ana rubuta gwaje-gwaje ne bisa mahallin asibiti, ba kai tsaye ga kowa ba.
texts.t1739: ACOG yana jaddada bambance tsakanin dysmenorrhea na farko da na sakandare. Idan ciwon ya fara tun da wuri, yana da tsarin da aka saba, kuma yana amsa magani da kyau, manyan gwaje-gwaje na iya zama ba dole ba. Amma idan akwai ciwo mai tsanani, dyspareunia, alamun hanji, zazzabi ko zubar jini da ba a saba ba, ana fadada binciken.
texts.t1740: ciwo mai tsanani da ke kara muni
texts.t1741: ciwo tare da zazzabi, AUB ko dyspareunia
texts.t1742: wadanne gwaje-gwaje ake rubutawa ga ciwon al'ada
texts.t1745: Wadanne gwaje-gwaje ake rubutawa idan babu ovulation
texts.t1747: Idan babu ovulation, yawanci ana tantance ciki, prolactin, TSH, da dalilan matsalar ovulation; a wasu yanayi kuma ana kara androgens, alamun ajiyar ovaries da sauran gwaje-gwaje gwargwadon bukata.
texts.t1748: Rashin ovulation da kansa ba ganewar cuta ba ne, amma hanya ce ta shiga bambance-bambancen dalilai: PCOS, FHA, hyperprolactinemia, cutar thyroid, POI da sauran yanayi.
texts.t1749: Rashin ovulation yana bukatar a nemo dalili, ba gwaji guda daya na ovulation kawai ba.
texts.t1750: Idan ovulation ba ya faruwa ko ana zargin rashin sa, ana gina gwaje-gwajen dakin gwaje-gwaje ne a kan dalilan endocrine da manufar haihuwa. Ga PCOS, tsarin tunani ya bambanta; ga zargin FHA, wani daban; ga POI, wani na uku. Shi ya sa ba a rubuta gwaje-gwaje iri daya ga kowa ta hanya guda ba.
texts.t1753: wadanne gwaje-gwaje ake rubutawa idan babu ovulation
texts.t1756: Duban dan tayi na mara: yaushe kuma me ya sa
texts.t1758: Ana rubuta duban dan tayi na mara idan akwai bukatar tantance mahaifa, endometrium, ovaries, dalilan tsarin jiki na AUB, alamun PCOS, cysts, fibroids, polyps da sauran dalilan rashin daidaiton zagaye ko ciwo.
texts.t1759: Wannan na daya daga cikin matakan gaba da aka fi yawan dauka a yanayin AUB, ciwon mara, amenorrhea da rashin haihuwa, domin yana taimakawa wajen saurin bambance tsakanin dalilan tsarin jiki da wadanda ba na tsarin jiki ba.
texts.t1760: Duban dan tayi na mara muhimmin kayan hoto ne ga korafe-korafen zagayen al'ada da dama.
texts.t1761: ASRM ya bayyana a fili cewa duban dan tayi na mara sau da yawa yana taimakawa wajen tsara bincike tun da wuri a binciken amenorrhea. A AUB, duban dan tayi yana da muhimmanci musamman wajen tantance fibroids, kaurin endometrium, zargin polyps, da abubuwan da suka shafi ovaries. Amma duban dan tayi na al'ada ba ya kawar da dukkan dalilan endocrine kuma ba ya maye gurbin tarihin lafiya.
texts.t1762: ciwo mai tsanani ko zargin matsalar tsarin jiki
texts.t1766: duban dan tayi na mara: yaushe kuma me ya sa
texts.t1771: Folliculometry jerin duban dan tayi ne a cikin zagaye guda domin sa ido kan girman follicle, ovulation, kuma wani lokaci endometrium.
texts.t1772: Ba a amfani da shi ga kowa ba, sai idan akwai bukatar tabbatar da ovulation, lokaci, amsa ga stimulation, ko fahimtar ko girman follicle yana faruwa yadda ake tsammani.
texts.t1773: Folliculometry duban dan tayi ne mai bin lokaci, ba na sau daya kawai ba.
texts.t1774: A aikace, folliculometry yana nufin ziyara da dama a lokacin zagaye. Yana da amfani musamman ga TTC, tsarin induction, da ovulation da ba a gane ba sosai. Karfinsa yana cikin nuna yadda abu ke tafiya a lokaci, ba hoto guda daya kawai ba.
texts.t1775: dogon rashin haihuwa ko ovulation da ba a gane ba sosai
texts.t1776: induction na ovulation ba tare da sa ido ba
texts.t1780: Bayanan hormones: abin da zai iya kunsa
texts.t1782: Bayanan hormones na iya hada da TSH, prolactin, FSH, LH, estradiol, androgens, da sauran alamomi — ba a matsayin kunshin dole ga kowa ba, sai dai bisa tambayar asibiti.
texts.t1783: Babban kuskure shi ne neman dogon jerin hormones ba tare da fahimtar ainihin abin da ake tabbatarwa ko kawarwa ba.
texts.t1784: Bayanan hormones ya kamata su kasance masu dogaro da tambaya.
texts.t1785: Wasu marasa lafiya suna bukatar mayar da hankali kan amenorrhea da dalilan pituitary-thyroid, wasu kan hyperandrogenism, wasu kuma kan binciken haihuwa. Saboda haka, 'bayanan hormones' ba tare da takamaiman manufa ba sau da yawa yana haifar da karin rudani fiye da amfani. Lokaci, mahallin zagaye, da fassara tare da sakamakon asibiti suna da muhimmanci.
texts.t1786: babban kunshin gwaje-gwaje da mutum ya nema da kansa ba tare da manufar asibiti ba
texts.t1787: sakamako marasa bayyani ba tare da mahallin yanayi ba
texts.t1788: bayanan hormones: abin da zai iya kunsa
texts.t1791: Gwajin ferritin ga al'ada mai yawa
texts.t1793: Ana bukatar gwajin ferritin ga al'ada mai yawa idan akwai hadarin karancin iron, ko da hemoglobin bai ragu sosai ba tukuna.
texts.t1794: Yawan zubar jinin al'ada na iya rage ajiyar iron a hankali, don haka ferritin yana da muhimmanci wajen tantance karanci da ke boye.
texts.t1795: Ferritin yana taimakawa gano ragin ajiyar iron a HMB.
texts.t1796: Mutanen da ke da zubar jini mai yawa na iya korafin gajiya, rashin iya motsa jiki, jiri, da zubar gashi tun kafin anemia ta bayyana sosai. Saboda haka, tunanin asibiti yana nuna cewa bai kamata a jira anemia mai tsanani ba, sai dai a tantance karancin iron da wuri, musamman idan zubar jinin yana yawan faruwa kuma yana da yawa.

texts.t1799: gwajin dakin gwaje-gwaje da aka nufa

texts.t1805: Ana duba thyroid idan zagaye mara daidaito, amenorrhea, rashin ovulation, ko wasu alamun jiki gaba daya suna nuna matsalar thyroid.
texts.t1806: TSH ba dole ba ne ga kowace matsala, amma yana daga cikin binciken farko da ake yawan yi ga amenorrhea/oligomenorrhea.
texts.t1807: Ana bukatar tantance thyroid idan akwai alamun al'ada da na jiki gaba daya.
texts.t1808: Matsalolin thyroid suna shafar ovulation, metabolism kuma wani lokaci prolactin. Saboda haka, duba aikin thyroid sau da yawa yana da amfani a lokutan sabon rashin daidaito, rashin haihuwa, amenorrhea da ba a gane dalilinta ba, ko bayyanannun alamun jiki gaba daya.
texts.t1815: Ana duba prolactin ga amenorrhea, oligomenorrhea, rashin ovulation, galactorrhea, da wasu zarge-zargen matsalar pituitary.
texts.t1816: Wannan gwajin yana da muhimmanci musamman idan rashin daidaiton zagaye yana tare da fitar ruwa daga nono, ciwon kai, ko matsalolin gani.
texts.t1817: Ana bukatar prolactin idan akwai dalilan asibiti na zargin hyperprolactinemia.
texts.t1818: Hyperprolactinemia na daga cikin sanannun dalilan secondary amenorrhea. Saboda haka, prolactin ya dace ba a matsayin gwajin yau da kullum ga kowa ba, sai dai a matsayin gwajin da aka nufa ga tsarin al'ada da pituitary da ya dace da shi.
texts.t1825: Ba a bukatar AMH ga kowace matsalar zagaye ba, sai idan akwai takamaiman manufar haihuwa: tantance ajiyar ovaries a yanayin haihuwa ko wasu shawarwarin kulawa.
texts.t1826: AMH ba gwaji ne na duniya baki daya don iya daukar ciki nan take ba, kuma ba ya bayyana kowace rashin daidaiton zagaye.
texts.t1827: AMH gwaji ne mai takaitacciyar manufa, ba na kowa da kowa ba.
texts.t1828: Wani kuskure da aka saba yi shi ne amfani da AMH a matsayin alamar lafiyar mata gaba daya ko tabbataccen maki na haihuwa. A zahiri, muhimmancinsa ya fi karfi a yanayin magungunan haihuwa, kuma a matsalar zagaye ta yau da kullum sau da yawa ba ya amsa babbar tambayar asibiti.

texts.t1833: Yaushe ake bukatar binciken kamuwa da cuta
texts.t1834: Ana bukatar binciken kamuwa da cuta idan akwai alamun kumburi, fitar al'aura, ciwon mara, abubuwan hadarin STI, alamun rashin haihuwa ko damuwa bayan wata hanya ta jinya.
texts.t1835: Kamuwa da cuta ba ita ce bayanin duk matsalolin zagaye ba, amma idan akwai wasu alamomi, yana da muhimmanci kada a rasa su.
texts.t1836: Binciken kamuwa da cuta yana dogara ne kan alamomi da hadari, ba kawai saboda kowace rikicewar zagaye ba.
texts.t1837: A lokutan zubar jini mara daidaito tare da wari, ciwon mara, dyspareunia, zubar jini bayan jima'i ko tarihin rashin haihuwa, binciken STI da kamuwa da cuta na iya zama muhimmin bangare na hanya. Wannan ya fi shafar yanayi bayan wasu matakan jinya, tare da alamun mahaifar bakin mahaifa, ko yayin binciken da ya dogara da hadari.

texts.t1839: alamomi bayan wata hanya ta jinya

texts.t1844: Ana bukatar hysteroscopy idan ya zama dole a duba cikin kogon mahaifa kai tsaye — misali, idan ana zargin polyps, submucosal fibroids, ragowar nama, ko manne-manen cikin mahaifa.
texts.t1845: Wannan ba gwajin tantancewa na farko ba ne, sai dai hanya da aka nufa idan tarihin lafiya, duban dan tayi, ko tsarin zubar jini suna nuna matsalar cikin kogon mahaifa.
texts.t1846: Ana bukatar hysteroscopy idan ana zargin matsala a cikin kogon mahaifa.
texts.t1847: A lokutan AUB mai dorewa, tabon jini tsakanin al'ada da ke maimaituwa, zargin polyps, ko amenorrhea bayan aikin cikin mahaifa, hysteroscopy na iya bayar da karin bayani fiye da duban dan tayi na yau da kullum. Darajarsa tana cikin ikon ganin kogon kai tsaye kuma sau da yawa a yi magani a lokaci guda.
texts.t1848: AUB mai dorewa tare da zargin matsala a cikin kogon mahaifa
texts.t1853: Yaushe ake bukatar MRI ko karin bincike mai zurfi
texts.t1854: Yaushe ake bukatar MRI ko karin bincike mai zurfi
texts.t1855: Ana bukatar MRI ko karin bincike mai zurfi idan binciken farko bai wadatar ba ko kuma akwai alamun matsalar tsarin jiki mai zurfi, pituitary, ko ciwo mai rikitarwa.
texts.t1856: Wannan ba gwajin farko na yau da kullum ba ne; ana amfani da shi idan hoton asibiti ya nuna cewa gwaje-gwaje masu sauki da duban dan tayi ba su isa ba.
texts.t1857: Ana rubuta MRI ne bisa dalilai na musamman, ba a matsayin mataki na farko ga kowace matsalar da ta shafi zagaye ba.
texts.t1858: Misali, a lokutan alamun hadarin pituitary, zargin endometriosis mai rikitarwa, tarin abu a mara da ba a gane ba, ko hoton farko da bai bayyana ba, ana iya bukatar MRI. Manufar ba ita ce 'a yi komai' ba, sai dai a kara matakin bincike yadda ya dace bayan matakin farko.

texts.t1866: Yana da amfani a zo binciken rashin haihuwa da bayanai kan zagaye, yawan saduwa, gwaje-gwajen da aka riga aka yi, magunguna, tiyata, ciki, da tarihin abokin zama.
texts.t1867: Shiri ba ya sa magani ya yi sauri ta sihiri, amma yana sa ziyarar farko ta haihuwa ta fi amfani sosai.
texts.t1868: Kyakkyawan shiri yana rage rudani yayin binciken rashin haihuwa.
texts.t1869: ACOG game da tantance rashin haihuwa yana jaddada cewa binciken ya shafi ma'aurata. Saboda haka, baya ga tarihin zagaye, ciki na baya, STIs, tiyata, tarihin hana daukar ciki, tsawon TTC, bin diddigin ovulation, da abubuwan da suka shafi abokin zama suna da muhimmanci. Bayanai da aka tattara tun da wuri suna saukaka aikin sosai.

texts.t1876: Menene sakamakon gwaje-gwaje na yau da kullum ke nufi
texts.t1877: Yadda za a fahimci sakamakon gwaje-gwaje na yau da kullum
texts.t1878: Sakamakon gwaje-gwaje na yau da kullum ba kasafai yake bayar da ganewar cuta shi kadai ba; ma'anarsa tana dogara da lokaci, alamomi, mahallin zagaye, da tambayar da ake yi.
texts.t1879: Sakamakon guda daya da ya 'fita daga kima' ba koyaushe yake nufin cuta ba, kamar yadda sakamako na al'ada ba koyaushe yake kawar da matsala ba.
texts.t1880: Ana fassara gwaje-gwaje ne cikin mahallin yanayi, ba da lamba guda daya ba.
texts.t1881: Wannan ya shafi kusan duk gwaje-gwajen haihuwa: prolactin, TSH, FSH/LH, estradiol, ferritin, AMH. Yana da muhimmanci a san wace rana ta zagaye aka yi shi, ko akwai amenorrhea, ko akwai magunguna, manufar rashin haihuwa, matsalar zubar jini ko ciwo. Ba tare da wannan ba, fassara na iya zama mai yaudara.

texts.t1889: Ana maimaita gwaje-gwaje idan sakamakon yana kan iyaka, bai dace da hoton asibiti ba, yana dogara da lokaci ko ilimin jiki, ko idan ana bukatar a ga canjin magani ko yanayi a lokaci.
texts.t1890: Ba a maimaita duk gwaje-gwaje a kai a kai ba, amma yawancin alamun haihuwa suna da iyakoki wajen fassara idan babu mahallin ma'auni guda daya.
texts.t1891: Maimaita gwaje-gwaje yana da dalili idan ana bukatar mahalli ko yanayin canji, ba kawai wani sabon rahoton gwaji ba.
texts.t1892: Misali, gwajin ciki, prolactin, wasu gwaje-gwajen endocrine da tantancewar da ta shafi haihuwa na iya bukatar maimaitawa ko bibiyar su a wani lokaci/mahalli daban. Muhimmin abu ba yawan sake gwaji ba ne, sai dai fahimtar dalilin da ya sa maimaitawa zai canza tsarin kulawa.

texts.t1898: Wadanne tantancewa ake bukata ga abokin zama
texts.t1900: Tantancewar abokin zama ana bukatarta musamman a yanayin rashin haihuwa; a kalla, gwajin maniyyi da wuri da kuma tarihin haihuwa na asali suna da muhimmanci.
texts.t1901: Rashin haihuwa matsalar ma'aurata ce, don haka yin watsi da tantancewar abokin zama na daga cikin dalilan jinkirin bincike da aka fi yawan gani.
texts.t1902: A binciken rashin haihuwa, abokin zama ba na biyu ba ne.
texts.t1903: ACOG da jagororin haihuwa suna jaddada cewa tantancewar ma'aurata ya kamata ta gudana a lokaci guda, ba bayan watanni masu yawa na binciken mace kadai ba. Matakin farko na aiki sau da yawa ya hada da gwajin maniyyi da tarihin da ya dace, sannan a kara wasu gwaje-gwaje bisa abin da aka samu.

texts.t1911: Ba za a iya jinkirta bincike ba idan akwai zubar jini mai yawa tare da alamun anemia, ciwo mai tsanani ko mai kara muni, amenorrhea, zargin matsalar da ta shafi ciki, galactorrhea tare da ciwon kai, zazzabi ko alamun jiki gaba daya masu tsanani.
texts.t1912: Babban ka'ida ita ce kada a rikita 'jira mu gani' da yanayin da jinkiri zai iya sa a rasa babbar cuta ko lahani ga haihuwa.
texts.t1913: Akwai yanayi da suka shafi zagaye inda sa ido ba tare da bincike ba ya riga ya zama mara lafiya.
texts.t1914: Idan ingancin rayuwar mutum yana raguwa, akwai alamun faduwa, ciwo mai kara muni, zargin ectopic ko alamun hadarin endocrine, ya kamata a rage matakin da ake bukata kafin a fara bincike. Dole ne a bambance wadannan takamaiman lokuta da sauyin zagaye guda daya mai sauki, inda sa ido na dan lokaci ya dace.

texts.t1923: Abinci yana shafar lafiyar hormones musamman ta hanyar samuwar kuzari, yanayin metabolism, nauyin jiki, da samar da muhimman sinadarai.
texts.t1924: Abinci da kansa ba ya sarrafa hormones kamar maballi, amma karancin kuzari na dogon lokaci, tsarin cin abinci marar tsari, da manyan karance-karance na iya shafar zagaye da ovulation sosai.
texts.t1925: Abinci wani bangare ne na yanayin da tsarin haihuwa ke aiki a cikinsa.
texts.t1926: A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a guji bangarori biyu masu tsanani: daukar abinci a matsayin cikakkiyar amsar kowace alamar hormone da kuma yin watsi da shi gaba daya. Ga zagaye, isasshen kuzari, tsarin rayuwa mai daidaito, rashin manyan karance-karance, da rashin halayen cin abinci da ke jawo damuwar metabolism ko hypothalamus suna da muhimmanci musamman.

texts.t1988: Babban kuskure game da salon rayuwa shi ne ko dai a raina tasirinsa ga zagaye ko kuma, akasin haka, a yi alkawarin cewa abinci, magnesium, da yoga za su warware kowace matsalar endocrine ko ciwo.
texts.t1989: Protein, kitse, da carbohydrates ga aikin haihuwa
texts.t1990: Manyan sinadaran abinci da aikin haihuwa
texts.t1991: Ana bukatar protein, kitse, da carbohydrates ga aikin haihuwa ba a matsayin sihirin kaso-kaso ba, sai dai a matsayin ginshikin isasshen kuzari, samar da hormones, da daidaitaccen ilimin jiki.
texts.t1992: Babban abin aiki ba neman madaidaicin rabon manyan sinadaran abinci ba ne, sai dai rashin yunwa na dogon lokaci da tsauraran takurawa da ke cutar da zagaye.
texts.t1993: Aikin haihuwa yana dogara da isasshen abinci mai dorewa, ba wani tsarin macro na zamani ba.
texts.t1994: A yanayin asibiti, daidaiton kuzari gaba daya da iya jure tsarin abinci sun fi muhimmanci sosai fiye da rarrabuwar ra'ayi mai tsauri tsakanin manyan sinadaran abinci masu kyau da marasa kyau. Cire cikakkun rukunan abinci na dogon lokaci, musamman kitse da carbohydrates, na iya kasancewa tare da tabarbarewar zagaye, kuzari, barci, da yanayi a wasu mutane.
texts.t1995: tsauraran takaita abinci na dogon lokaci
texts.t1997: protein, kitse, da carbohydrates ga aikin haihuwa
texts.t1998: manyan sinadaran abinci da aikin haihuwa
texts.t2002: Ragin kuzari na kalori na iya jawo rashin fitar ƙwai ta hanyar rage aikin da hypothalamus ke yi wajen daidaitawa.
texts.t2003: Domin fitar ƙwai ya faru, ba BMI kaɗai yake da muhimmanci ba, har ma da ko jiki yana samun isasshen saƙon tsaron kuzari.
texts.t2004: Rashin kuzari na dogon lokaci na iya hana fitar ƙwai.
texts.t2005: Ƙungiyar Endocrine Society ta jaddada cewa a functional hypothalamic amenorrhea, babban abin da ke haddasawa shi ne ƙarancin kuzari—sau da yawa tare da takaita abinci, motsa jiki mai yawa, ko damuwa. Wannan na nufin ko da BMI yana cikin abin da ake ɗauka na 'al'ada', fitar ƙwai na iya tangal-tangal idan kuzarin da jiki ke samu ya yi ƙasa.
texts.t2006: amenorrhea ko zagaye marasa yawa yayin rage kiba
texts.t2007: motsa jiki mai tsanani + rashin fitar ƙwai
texts.t2008: ragin kalori da rashin fitar ƙwai
texts.t2012: Baƙin ƙarfe yana da muhimmanci musamman idan jinin al'ada yana da yawa, domin zubar jini na dogon lokaci na iya jawo ƙarancin baƙin ƙarfe da anemia.
texts.t2013: Baƙin ƙarfe yana taimakawa wajen magance sakamakon zubar jini, amma ba ya kawar da dalilin yawan zubar jinin da kansa.
texts.t2014: A lokacin al'ada, batun baƙin ƙarfe yana da muhimmanci musamman idan zubar jini yana da yawa.
texts.t2015: Idan jinin al'ada yana da yawa, mutum na iya samun ƙarancin baƙin ƙarfe a hankali ko da ba tare da wani babban zubar jini na gaggawa ba. A asibiti, hakan na iya bayyana da rauni, fatar jiki ta yi fari, ƙarancin numfashi, bugun zuciya da sauri, da rage juriyar motsa jiki. Saboda haka, idan zubar jini yana da yawa, yana da muhimmanci a yi la’akari da ferritin/hemoglobin, ba pad da ciwo kaɗai ba.
texts.t2016: rauni da fatar jiki ta yi fari yayin al'ada
texts.t2022: Ana yawan magana kan magnesium don PMS, amma bayanan game da tasirinsa ba su da daidaito, kuma ba ya maye gurbin cikakken tantancewar alamomi masu tsanani.
texts.t2023: Ga wasu mutane, magnesium na iya zama ƙarin zaɓi mai amfani, amma ba magani ne na bai ɗaya ga PMS ba.
texts.t2024: Magnesium don PMS kari ne da ake ta muhawara a kai, amma ba dole ba ne ga kowa.
texts.t2025: Shaharar magnesium ta fi ƙarfin hujjojin kimiyya da ke goyon bayan kowace takamaiman hanya ta PMS. Saboda haka, a fannin asibiti, mafi kyawun hanya ita ce a ɗauke shi a matsayin yiwuwar kari maimakon maye gurbin rubutaccen bayanin alamomi, barci, motsa jiki, da kuma idan ya zama dole, magani mai ƙarin hujja ga PMS ko PMDD.
texts.t2027: shan kari da yawa ba tare da kulawa ba
texts.t2034: Ana yawan tattauna omega-3 a mahallin PMS da alamomin ciwo masu alaƙa da kumburi, amma rawar da yake takawa ta fi zama kari fiye da ginshiƙi na asali.
texts.t2035: Ba hanya ba ce ta 'daidaita zagaye' da kanta, sai dai wata dabara ta tallafi a wasu yanayin alamomi na musamman.
texts.t2036: Ba a ɗaukar omega-3 a matsayin mafita ta bai ɗaya ga zagaye ba.
texts.t2037: A tattaunawar lafiya ta jama'a, ana yawan gabatar da omega-3 kamar kusan wajibi ne ga lafiyar hormones. A asibiti, ya fi dacewa a yi magana cikin taka-tsantsan: zaɓin tallafi ne da ake iya amfani da shi, musamman idan abinci ba ya ƙunsar kifaye sosai, amma ba ya maye gurbin gano dalilin ciwo, rashin fitar ƙwai, yawan zubar jini, ko PMS mai tsanani.
texts.t2038: ciwo mai tsanani ko AUB ba tare da tantance dalili ba
texts.t2039: sa ran kari zai warware matsalar zagaye
texts.t2044: Ana tattauna vitamin D dangane da lafiyar haihuwa, amma muhimmancinsa yana dogara da ko akwai ainihin ƙaranci da kuma cikakken yanayin asibiti.
texts.t2045: Gyara ƙarancin vitamin D abu ne mai ma'ana ga lafiyar gaba ɗaya, amma bai kamata a tallata shi a matsayin magani na bai ɗaya ga zagaye marasa daidaito ba.
texts.t2046: Vitamin D yana da muhimmanci idan akwai ƙaranci, amma ba shi ne amsar bai ɗaya ga korafe-korafen hormones ba.
texts.t2047: Wannan kyakkyawan misali ne na yadda gyaran ƙaranci mai amfani ke rikidewa zuwa tatsuniyar intanet game da dawo da hormones cikin sihiri. Idan akwai ƙaranci, a yi maganinsa. Amma zagaye marasa daidaito, rashin fitar ƙwai, PMS, ko ciwo ba za a taƙaita su ga vitamin D kaɗai ba tare da faɗaɗɗen binciken dalilai ba.
texts.t2048: korafe-korafe masu tsanani ba tare da binciken gano dalilai ba
texts.t2049: shan manyan allurai ba tare da kulawa ba
texts.t2052: Bitamin B da yanayi a duk zagaye
texts.t2054: Ana yawan tattauna bitamin B, musamman B6, don alamomin kafin al'ada, amma rawarsu ta ƙari ce kuma tana dogara da allura, yadda jiki ke ɗauka, da takamaiman manufar amfani.
texts.t2055: Wannan tattaunawa ce ta ƙari, ba mafita ta farko ba ga matsanancin sauyin yanayi a duk zagaye.
texts.t2056: Ana iya tattauna bitamin B don sauyin yanayi na zagaye, amma ba sa maye gurbin tantancewar asibiti.
texts.t2057: Ga alamomi masu sauƙi, mutane kan gwada B6 ko bitamin B-complex. Amma idan akwai tsananin damuwa, baƙin ciki, saurin fushi, ko PMDD, wannan hanya bai kamata ta maye gurbin cikakkiyar dabarar magani ba. Haka kuma, aminci da guje wa manyan allurai ba tare da kulawa ba suna da muhimmanci.
texts.t2059: shan manyan allurai na B6 ba tare da kulawa ba

texts.t2063: Ruwa, gishiri, da kumburi kafin al'ada
texts.t2065: Jin kumburi kafin al'ada na iya bambanta gwargwadon zagaye, kuma cin abinci mai gishiri sosai yana ƙara jin riƙe ruwa a jiki ga wasu mutane.
texts.t2066: Shan ruwa yadda ya kamata yana da amfani, amma shi kaɗai ba ya kawar da kumburin kafin al'ada kuma ba takamaiman magani ba ne ga PMS.
texts.t2067: Shan ruwa da gishiri na iya shafar jin kumburi, amma ba su kaɗai ke bayyana PMS gaba ɗaya ba.
texts.t2068: A aikace, kumburi kafin al'ada alama ce mai dalilai da yawa. Ba ya dogara da gishiri da ruwa kaɗai ba, har ma da barci, sha'awar abinci, zagaye, jin daɗin gaba ɗaya, da yadda mutum yake ji da kansa. Saboda haka, mafi dacewa a nan shi ne matsakaici, ba tsauraran matakai kamar rage ruwa ko gishiri sosai ba tare da dalilin asibiti ba.
texts.t2069: kumburi mai tsanani ko na gefe ɗaya
texts.t2070: ƙarancin numfashi ko kumburi mai ɗorewa a wajen zagaye
texts.t2071: ruwa, gishiri, da kumburi kafin al'ada
texts.t2074: Yadda za a rage ciwon mara ba tare da magani ba
texts.t2075: Taimako ba tare da magani ba ga ciwon al'ada na iya haɗawa da zafi, motsi, barci, dabarun shakatawa masu laushi, da tsarin rayuwa na yau da kullum, amma ba ya maye gurbin tantance dalilin ciwo mai tsanani.
texts.t2076: Idan ciwon ya saba kuma matsakaici ne, irin waɗannan matakan na iya taimakawa sosai. Idan ciwon yana hana rayuwa, ba kulawar kai kaɗai ake buƙata ba, har da duba na asibiti.
texts.t2077: Taimako ba tare da magani ba na iya rage ciwon mara amma bai kamata ya ɓoye ciwo na sakandare ba.
texts.t2078: ACOG da MedlinePlus suna goyon bayan matakan tallafi masu sauƙi: zafi, motsa jiki, barci, da dabarun shakatawa. Wannan kyakkyawan mataki ne na farko ga ciwo marar rikitarwa. Amma idan mutum yana kasa yin komai a kowane zagaye, neman sabbin dabarun rayuwa kawai ba tare da tantance yiwuwar endometriosis ko secondary dysmenorrhea ba kuskure ne na asibiti.
texts.t2079: ciwo yana hana gudanar da rayuwa
texts.t2080: ciwo yana ƙaruwa ko yana tare da wasu alamomi
texts.t2081: tallafi ba tare da magani ba
texts.t2083: yadda za a rage ciwon mara ba tare da magani ba
texts.t2086: Zafi na ɗaya daga cikin mafi sauƙi kuma mafi samun goyon bayan hanyoyin rage ciwon al'ada ba tare da magani ba.
texts.t2087: Hot water bottle, wanka mai ɗumi, ko zafi a wuri guda na iya zama da amfani a matsayin hanya kaɗai ga ciwo mai sauƙi da kuma a matsayin ƙari ga magani idan ciwon ya fi tsanani.
texts.t2088: Zafi a wuri guda hanya ce mai amfani ta farko ta kulawar kai ga ciwon mara.
texts.t2089: Duka ACOG da MedlinePlus suna ba da shawarar zafi a sarari a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin matakan tallafi na asali ga dysmenorrhea. Amfaninsa yana cikin kasancewarsa hanya mai ƙarancin haɗari wadda ake iya haɗawa da NSAIDs, hutu, da motsi mai laushi. Amma idan zafi kaɗai ya daina aiki, hakan ma na iya zama alamar bincike.
texts.t2090: ciwo ya ci gaba da tsanani duk da amfani da zafi
texts.t2095: Barci yana shafar alamomin PMS ta hanyar gajiya, saurin fushi, damuwa, sha'awar abinci, da jin ciwo sosai.
texts.t2096: Rashin isasshen barci ba shi kaɗai ne ke haddasa PMS ba, amma rashin kyakkyawan barci na iya tsananta alamomin zagaye sosai.
texts.t2097: Barci muhimmin abu ne da ke iya sauya tsananin PMS.
texts.t2098: A fannin taimakon kai, ana yawan raina muhimmancin barci yayin da ake ɗaukaka kari fiye da kima. A halin yanzu, rashin kyakkyawan barci yana tsananta ainihin alamomin da ke damun mutane kafin al'ada: saurin kuka, damuwa, sha'awar abinci, gajiya, da ciwo. Saboda haka, inganta barci ba shawara ta gefe ba ce, mataki ne na asali kuma mai ma'ana a asibiti.
texts.t2100: PMS mai hana gudanar da rayuwa sosai
texts.t2104: Motsa jiki matsakaici yayin al'ada yana da aminci ga mutane da yawa kuma ma yana iya rage ciwo, gajiya, da tashin hankali.
texts.t2105: Al'ada da kanta ba ta hana motsa jiki; abin dubawa shi ne yadda mutum yake ji, tsananin ciwo, da yawan zubar jini.
texts.t2106: Motsa jiki matsakaici yayin al'ada sau da yawa yana da karɓuwa kuma yana da amfani.
texts.t2107: ACOG na ba da shawarar motsa jiki na yau da kullum a matsayin abu mai amfani ga ciwon al'ada da PMS. A aikace, yana da muhimmanci kada a tilasta wa kai motsa jiki 'har sai an karye,' amma kuma kada a ɗauki al'ada a matsayin cikakkiyar hana motsi. Motsi mai laushi sau da yawa jiki na ɗauka fiye da zama babu motsi gaba ɗaya.
texts.t2108: sumewa, matsanancin rauni, ko yawan zubar jini
texts.t2112: Wadanne atisaye suka dace da matakai daban-daban na zagaye
texts.t2113: Atisaye da aka daidaita da zagaye
texts.t2114: Yadda ake jin atisaye na iya sauyawa a matakai daban-daban na zagaye, amma babu shiri na bai ɗaya da ya zama wajibi ga kowa bisa zagaye.
texts.t2115: Ya fi amfani a mai da hankali kan tsarin da ke maimaituwa a jikinki na kuzari, ciwo, barci, da murmurewa fiye da tsauraran jadawalin intanet.
texts.t2116: Daidaita atisaye bisa yadda kike ji ya fi amfani fiye da tsauraran tsarin da ya dogara da matakan zagaye.
texts.t2117: Wasu mutane suna jin ƙarin kuzari a wasu matakai, kuma ƙarin saurin jin abubuwa a wasu. Ana iya amfani da wannan a aikace idan irin waɗannan tsare-tsaren suna da ɗorewa. Amma 'atisaye bisa matakan zagaye' bai kamata ya zama sabon nau'in tsauraran iko da damuwa ba: idan bambance-bambancen ƙanana ne, babu buƙatar sake gina dukkan shirin motsa jiki da ƙarfi.
texts.t2118: atisaye suna ƙara lalata zagaye ko murmurewa
texts.t2119: tsananin sa ido da tabarbarewar halayen cin abinci
texts.t2120: wadanne atisaye suka dace da matakai daban-daban na zagaye
texts.t2121: horo da aka daidaita da zagaye
texts.t2123: Motsa jiki mai tsanani da tangardar fitar ƙwai
texts.t2124: Motsa jiki mai tsanani da fitar ƙwai
texts.t2125: Motsa jiki mai tsanani na iya tangarda fitar ƙwai idan ya haɗu da rashin wadataccen abinci, ƙarancin kuzari, da rashin isasshen murmurewa.
texts.t2126: Matsalar yawanci ba wasanni kansu ba ne, sai haɗuwar nauyin aiki da ƙarancin kuzari da damuwa.
texts.t2127: Motsa jiki mai tsanani na iya tangarda fitar ƙwai ta hanyar ƙarancin kuzarin da ake samu.
texts.t2128: Ƙungiyar Endocrine Society ta jaddada alaƙar da ke tsakanin nauyin aiki mai yawa, ƙarancin kuzari, da tangardar hypothalamus. Wannan yana da muhimmanci musamman idan mutum yana alfahari da tsarinsa amma bai lura cewa zagayensa ya zama marar yawa, gajere, ko ya ɓace ba. A nan, ya kamata a maye gurbin taimakon kai da tantancewar asibiti kafin a samu stress fractures da amenorrhea mai ɗorewa.

texts.t2134: Yoga da dabarun shakatawa don PMS
texts.t2135: Yoga, numfashi, da dabarun shakatawa na iya taimakawa wasu mutane da PMS a matsayin hanyar rage tashin hankali, ciwo, da damuwar da suke ji.
texts.t2136: Waɗannan kayan tallafi ne masu amfani, amma ba madadin gano cuta da maganin PMS ko PMDD mai tsanani ba ne.
texts.t2137: Dabarun shakatawa na iya zama wani ɓangare na kulawar kai ga PMS.
texts.t2138: MedlinePlus da sauran tushen asibiti suna haɗa dabarun shakatawa cikin jerin hanyoyin da ba magani ba masu amfani ga ciwon al'ada da alamomi masu alaƙa. A matakin tunanin asibiti, wannan kyakkyawan ƙari ne mai ƙarancin haɗari, musamman idan mutum yana fuskantar damuwa mai yawa, saurin fushi, da matsewar jiki kafin al'ada.
texts.t2139: yoga ba ya taimakawa, kuma alamomin suna da tsanani
texts.t2140: yoga da dabarun shakatawa don pms
texts.t2143: Sarrafa damuwa yana da muhimmanci ga zagaye domin damuwa mai ɗorewa na iya shafar fitar ƙwai, barci, sha'awar abinci, da yadda ake jin tsananin alamomi.
texts.t2144: Wannan ba yana nufin kowace matsalar zagaye kawai 'daga jijiyoyi' take ba, amma damuwa na iya zama muhimmin ɓangare na hoton asibiti.
texts.t2145: Sarrafa damuwa na iya taimakawa zagaye, amma ba ya maye gurbin bincike ba.
texts.t2146: A aikace, daidaito shi ne mabuɗi a nan: kada a musanta tasirin damuwa, amma kuma kada a yi amfani da ita wajen bayyana komai. Idan daidaita kai ya taimaka, zagaye ya daidaita, kuma babu wasu alamomi—wannan wani labari ne. Idan rashin daidaito ya ci gaba, akwai rage kiba, amenorrhea, yawan zubar jini, ko rashin haihuwa—dole ne a nemi wasu dalilai.
texts.t2147: amenorrhea mai ɗorewa ko zagaye marasa yawa
texts.t2148: damuwa + rage kiba + rasa fitar ƙwai
texts.t2153: Rubutaccen bayanin zagaye da alamomi yana taimakawa bambance tsarin jiki da ke maimaituwa daga jin abubuwa na bazata da alamomin da ke buƙatar bincike.
texts.t2154: Yana da amfani musamman ga PMS, ciwo, zagaye marasa daidaito, ɗigon jini, da ƙoƙarin fahimtar alaƙar da ke tsakanin alamomi da matakan zagaye.
texts.t2155: Bayanan zagaye na ɗaya daga cikin kayan sa ido da kai mafi amfani.
texts.t2156: Ba tare da rubutawa ba, mutane kan yi wa abubuwan da suka fi bayyana girma fiye da kima kuma su raina lokaci. Bayani yana taimakawa a ga: shin alamomin da gaske suna da alaƙa da zagaye, a wane mataki suke bayyana, tsawon lokacin da suke ɗauka, me ke rage su, kuma ko suna ƙaruwa. Wannan yana sa tattaunawa da likita ta fi amfani sosai.
texts.t2157: alamomin suna da tsanani, kuma tsarin bai bayyana ba
texts.t2158: zargin PMDD, rashin fitar ƙwai, ko AUB
texts.t2163: Yadda za a bambance al'adar mutum da alamun gargaɗi
texts.t2165: Al'adar mutum ita ce tsarin da ke maimaituwa kuma ana iya jurewa, ba ya ƙaruwa kuma ba ya hana rayuwar yau da kullum; alamun gargaɗi kuwa sabbi ne, masu tsanani, masu ƙaruwa, ko masu shafar jiki gaba ɗaya.
texts.t2166: Babban abin dubawa ba kasancewar alama kaɗai ba ne, sai tsanani, maimaituwa, tasirinta ga rayuwa, da alamun gargaɗi.
texts.t2167: Zagaye na al'ada ba yana nufin babu wata alama kwata-kwata ba, sai dai ana iya hasashensa ba tare da babbar tangarda ba.
texts.t2168: Wasu mutane kullum suna jin ɗan ciwon nono ko gajiya kafin al'ada — kuma wannan na iya zama al'adarsu ta kansu. Amma idan alama ta ƙara tsanani, ta canza, ko tana tare da sumewa, yawan zubar jini, ciwo a gefe ɗaya, matsanancin baƙin ciki, ko amenorrhea, taimakon kai bai isa ba. Ci gaba da tsanani da hana gudanar da rayuwa ne ke sa hoton asibiti ya zama mai muhimmanci.
texts.t2169: sabon ciwo ko ciwo mai ƙaruwa
texts.t2170: sumewa, yawan zubar jini, amenorrhea, matsanancin alamomin yanayi
texts.t2171: yadda za a bambance al'adar mutum da alamun gargaɗi
texts.t2174: Taimakon kai ga jinkirin da damuwa ta jawo
texts.t2175: Idan jinkiri yana da alaƙa da damuwa, taimakon kai na iya haɗawa da barci, abinci, rage nauyin aiki, da sa ido kan zagaye, amma har yanzu dole ne a yi la’akari da ciki da sauran dalilai.
texts.t2176: Bai kamata damuwa ta zama bayanin kai tsaye ga kowane jinkiri ba, musamman idan akwai yiwuwar ciki, rage kiba, ko idan jinkirin ya yi tsawo.
texts.t2177: Taimakon kai ga jinkirin da damuwa ta jawo ya dace ne kawai bayan an bi ainihin tunanin asibiti.
texts.t2178: Hanya mai ma'ana a aikace ita ce kamar haka: da farko, a kawar da yiwuwar ciki, sannan a tantance ko an samu rage kiba kwatsam, gajiya mai tsanani, ko matsananciyar damuwa. Idan babu wasu alamun gargaɗi, dawo da barci, rage nauyin aiki, isasshen abinci, da sa ido suna da amfani. Amma idan amenorrhea ta yi tsawo ko tsarin yana maimaituwa, ana buƙatar ƙarin tsari na tantancewa.

texts.t2183: Yadda hana ɗaukar ciki ta hormones ke aiki
texts.t2184: Hana ɗaukar ciki ta hormones na hana ciki ta hanyar dakile fitar ƙwai, kaurin majinar bakin mahaifa, da/ko canza endometrium — gwargwadon hanyar da aka yi amfani da ita.
texts.t2185: Ba duk hanyoyin ke aiki iri ɗaya ba: COCs, implants, allurai, mini-pills, da hormonal IUDs sun bambanta a yadda suke aiki da kuma matakin dakile fitar ƙwai.
texts.t2186: Hana ɗaukar ciki ta hormones tana aiki ne ta hanyar shafar fitar ƙwai, majina, da endometrium.
texts.t2187: Yana da muhimmanci kada a taƙaita duk hanyoyin hormones zuwa tsari guda. Hanyoyin haɗe suna fi dakile fitar ƙwai, yayin da hanyoyin progestin kaɗai sau da yawa ƙari suna sa majina ta zama mai wahalar wucewa ga maniyyi kuma suna canza endometrium. Saboda haka, tasirin zagaye da tsarin zubar jini suna bambanta sosai tsakanin hanyoyi daban-daban.

texts.t2251: Babban kuskure game da hana ɗaukar ciki da zagaye shi ne tsammanin kowace hanya mai inganci za ta sa al'ada ta zama daidai ƙwarai; a aikace, hanyoyi daban-daban suna haifar da tsarin zubar jini daban-daban, wani lokaci ma masu bambanci sosai.
texts.t2252: Akwai fitar ƙwai a kan COCs?
texts.t2254: Idan ana shan COCs yadda ya kamata, yawanci ana dakile fitar ƙwai, kuma wannan shi ne babban yadda hanyar ke hana ciki.
texts.t2255: Idan an manta ƙwayoyi, an fara sabon fakiti a makare, ko a wasu yanayin amfani, dakile fitar ƙwai na iya zama ba abin dogaro sosai ba.
texts.t2256: A kan COCs, yawanci ana dakile fitar ƙwai idan ana shan ƙwayoyin yadda ya kamata.
texts.t2257: Wannan muhimmin batu ne a asibiti: COCs ba sa 'daidaita zagaye na dabi'a' sai dai suna ƙirƙirar tsarin hormones da ake sarrafawa. Saboda haka, zubar jini a kan COCs ba hujja ba ce cewa fitar ƙwai ta faru. Akasin haka, kurakuran shan magani na iya rage dakile fitar ƙwai kuma su ƙara haɗarin ciki.
texts.t2258: mantuwar ƙwayoyi + jima'i ba tare da kariya ba
texts.t2259: akwai fitar ƙwai a kan cocs
texts.t2262: Al'ada ko withdrawal bleeding a kan COCs
texts.t2264: Zubar jini a kan COCs a lokacin hutun hormones yawanci withdrawal bleeding ne, ba al'ada ta dabi'a mai alaƙa da fitar ƙwai ba.
texts.t2265: Yana iya zama kaɗan, gajere, kuma ya canza da lokaci; kasancewarsa ba ya tabbatar da cewa zagaye a kan COCs yana tafiya yadda yake a dabi'a.
texts.t2266: A kan COCs, yawanci akwai withdrawal bleeding maimakon al'ada ta yau da kullum.
texts.t2267: Wannan na ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan da aka fi yawan rashin fahimta. COCs suna ƙirƙirar tsarin hormones da ake sarrafawa, don haka zubar jini a lokacin hutu yana faruwa ne saboda janyewar hormones, ba sakamakon cikakken zagaye na dabi'a tare da fitar ƙwai ba. Wannan ne ya sa sau da yawa yake zama kaɗan kuma ba ya da zafi sosai fiye da kafin fara COCs.
texts.t2268: rashin zubar jini bayan mantuwar ƙwayoyi ko haɗarin ciki
texts.t2269: zubar jini mai yawa sosai a kan COCs
texts.t2270: al'ada ko withdrawal bleeding a kan cocs
texts.t2273: Zubar jini marar daidaito yayin hana ɗaukar ciki
texts.t2274: Zubar jini marar daidaito yayin hana ɗaukar ciki yakan faru a watannin farko na amfani kuma ya fi zama ruwan dare musamman a hanyoyin progestin kaɗai.
texts.t2275: Ɗigon jini na iya zama tasirin daidaitawa da ake tsammani, amma zubar jini mai tsawo, mai yawa, ko wanda ya canza kwatsam yana buƙatar duba bin umarni da sauran dalilai.
texts.t2276: Ɗigon jini yayin hana ɗaukar ciki sau da yawa abin da ake tsammani ne, amma ba koyaushe ba ne marar illa.
texts.t2277: ACOG ta jaddada cewa breakthrough bleeding ya fi yawa musamman a farkon amfani da hanyar hormones da kuma idan an manta allurai. Amma yana da muhimmanci a bambance daidaitawar da ake tsammani daga yanayin da zubar jini ya yi yawa, ya daɗe, ko yana tare da ciwo, wanda ke buƙatar faɗaɗɗen binciken bambance-bambance.
texts.t2278: zubar jini mai yawa ko mai tsawo
texts.t2279: canji kwatsam a tsarin zubar jini
texts.t2281: zubar jini marar daidaito yayin hana ɗaukar ciki
texts.t2284: IUD na iya canza al'ada sosai, amma yanayin canjin ya dogara da nau'in sa: hormonal da copper IUD suna shafar zagaye ta hanyoyi daban-daban.
texts.t2285: Saboda haka, tambayar 'me zai faru da al'ada da IUD' koyaushe tana buƙatar a fayyace wace na'ura ce ake magana a kai.
texts.t2286: Canje-canjen al'ada da IUD suna dogara da ko na copper ne ko na hormones.
texts.t2287: Wannan na ɗaya daga cikin muhimman abubuwan shawarwari a aikace. Wasu mutane suna tsammanin kowace IUD za ta rage zubar jini, yayin da wasu ke tsammanin kowace za ta ƙara shi. A zahiri, tsarin yana dogara sosai da yadda hanyar ke aiki: hormonal IUD sau da yawa tana rage zubar jini, yayin da ta copper na iya ƙara shi, musamman a watannin farko.
texts.t2288: zubar jini mai yawa sosai bayan sakawa
texts.t2289: ciwo mai tsanani ko zazzabi bayan sakawa
texts.t2295: Hormonal IUD sau da yawa tana jawo ɗigon jini da zubar jini marar daidaito a watannin farko, sannan ga mutane da yawa tana rage yawan jinin al'ada ko ta kai ga amenorrhea.
texts.t2296: Rashin al'ada a kan hormonal IUD ba lallai yana nuna matsala ba; ga wasu masu amfani, wannan tasiri ne da ake tsammani daga hanyar.
texts.t2297: Hormonal IUD sau da yawa tana rage zubar jini da lokaci.
texts.t2298: ACOG ta bayyana tsarin da aka saba gani: ɗigon jini da zubar jini marar daidaito na iya faruwa da farko bayan sakawa, sannan daga baya zubar jini yakan ragu sosai. Ga wasu masu amfani, al'ada kusan tana ɓacewa. Wannan ne ke bambanta hormonal IUD da ta copper, kuma yana da muhimmanci a tattauna tun da wuri domin kada tasirin da ake tsammani ya zama abin damuwa.
texts.t2299: ciwo ko zubar jini mai tsanani sosai
texts.t2300: sabon alama kwatsam bayan wani lokaci na daidaito
texts.t2303: Copper IUD da yawan jinin al'ada
texts.t2304: Copper IUD na iya ƙara zubar jini da ciwon al'ada, musamman a watannin farko bayan sakawa.
texts.t2305: Idan mutum tun da farko yana da al'ada mai yawa ko mai zafi sosai, wannan batu yana da muhimmanci musamman wajen zaɓar hanya.
texts.t2306: Copper IUD na iya sa al'ada ta yi yawa, musamman a farko.
texts.t2307: ACOG ta bayyana a sarari cewa zubar jini da ciwon al'ada na iya ƙaruwa a watannin farko da copper IUD. Ga wasu, wannan musanya ce mai karɓuwa domin hanya ce ba ta hormones ba; ga wasu kuma, dalili ne na zaɓar wata hanyar hana ciki. Saboda haka, yadda al'ada take tun farko yana da matuƙar muhimmanci a nan.
texts.t2308: copper iud da yawan jinin al'ada
texts.t2312: Implant na hana ɗaukar ciki sau da yawa yana canza tsarin zubar jini: zubar jini marar daidaito, zubar jini marar yawa, ko amenorrhea na iya faruwa.
texts.t2313: Muhimmin abin shawarwari shi ne cewa zubar jini da implant na iya zama marar iya hasashe, kuma wannan sau da yawa dalili ne na rashin jin daɗi da hanyar.
texts.t2314: Implant sau da yawa yana canza zagaye zuwa zubar jini marar daidaito.
texts.t2315: Sabanin tsammanin cewa 'tun da hanyar tana da inganci sosai, al'ada za ta zama daidai ƙwarai,' implant sau da yawa yana sa zubar jini ya zama marar iya hasashe. Wannan yawanci ba haɗari ba ne da kansa amma ya kamata a tattauna tun da wuri domin juriyar irin wannan tsarin tana da bambanci sosai tsakanin mutane.

texts.t2321: Hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura da jinkirin dawowar zagaye
texts.t2322: Hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura da dawowar zagaye
texts.t2323: Bayan hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura, dawowar fitar ƙwai da yiwuwar samun ciki na iya ɗaukar lokaci fiye da yawancin sauran hanyoyi.
texts.t2324: Jinkirin dawowar haihuwa abu ne da aka saba gani da DMPA; yana da muhimmanci a yi la’akari da wannan tun da wuri ga shirye-shiryen haihuwa na gaba.
texts.t2325: Bayan hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura, zagaye da haihuwa na iya dawowa a hankali.
texts.t2326: ACOG ta bayyana cewa bayan daina allurai, ciki ba lallai ya faru nan take ba a matsakaici; dawowa sau da yawa yana ɗaukar watanni. Wannan ba yana nufin lalacewar haihuwa ta dindindin ba, amma idan ana shirin ciki, ya kamata a zaɓi hanyar tare da la’akari da lokacin da ake da shi.
texts.t2327: amenorrhea mai tsawo sosai bayan dainawa + wasu alamomi
