texts.t2329: hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura da jinkirin dawowar zagaye
texts.t2330: hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura da dawowar zagaye
texts.t2333: Hanyoyin kariya na hana ɗaukar ciki ba sa daidaita hormones, saboda haka bai kamata su canza fitar ƙwai ko zagaye na dabi'a kai tsaye ba.
texts.t2334: Idan zagaye ya canza yayin amfani da hanyoyin kariya kaɗai, yawanci ana neman wani dalili maimakon jingina shi ga hanyar.
texts.t2335: Hanyoyin kariya bai kamata su canza zagayen al'ada kai tsaye ba.
texts.t2336: Kondom, diaphragm, da sauran hanyoyin kariya suna hana ciki ne ta hanyar inji, ba ta hanyar tsoma baki cikin hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian axis ba. Saboda haka, ba a amfani da su don sarrafa zagaye kuma yawanci ba su bayyana al'ada marar daidaito. Abubuwan da suka bambanta ba su shafi zagaye ba, sai dai jin daɗi, allergy, ko kaikayi a wuri.

texts.t2341: Hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki na dabi'a da sa ido kan fitar ƙwai
texts.t2342: Hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki na dabi'a
texts.t2343: Hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki na dabi'a suna dogara ne da gane lokacin haihuwa bisa alamomin zagaye kuma suna buƙatar tsari, horo, da fassara daidai na alamomin fitar ƙwai.
texts.t2344: Ba sa dakile fitar ƙwai, sai dai suna ƙoƙarin guje wa jima'i ba tare da kariya ba a kwanakin haihuwa.
texts.t2345: Hanyoyin sanin lokacin haihuwa suna aiki ne ta hanyar sa ido, ba ta hanyar dakile zagaye da hormones ba.
texts.t2346: ACOG ta jaddada cewa hanyoyin sanin lokacin haihuwa suna buƙatar horo da bin ƙa'idoji sosai. Gazawa a nan sau da yawa ba a ilimin halittar hanyar take ba, sai a ɓangaren ɗan adam: fassara ba daidai ba ta majina, kalanda, ko lokacin haihuwa na rage amincin hanyar.

texts.t2348: zagaye marasa daidaito ba tare da ƙwarewar sa ido mai kyau ba

texts.t2352: hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki na dabi'a
texts.t2356: Hanyar kalanda ta fi yawancin hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki na zamani rashin aminci sosai, musamman idan zagaye ba su da daidaito.
texts.t2357: Ko da da cikakken amfani, hanyoyin sanin lokacin haihuwa suna dogara da hanyar da tsari, kuma a amfani na yau da kullum, ingancinsu ya yi ƙasa sosai idan aka kwatanta da LARC da hanyoyin hormones.
texts.t2358: Ba a ɗaukar hanyar kalanda a matsayin hanya mai matuƙar aminci ta hana ɗaukar ciki ba.
texts.t2359: ACOG ta bayyana cewa hanyoyin sanin lokacin haihuwa gaba ɗaya ba su da inganci kamar wasu hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki da yawa, kuma hanyar kalanda tana da rauni musamman idan fitar ƙwai ta matsa lokaci. Saboda haka, kalanda a matsayin kayan aiki kaɗai ba ta dace sosai ga waɗanda ciki a yanzu ba a so sosai.
texts.t2360: muhimmancin guje wa ciki yana da yawa
texts.t2364: Yadda hana ɗaukar ciki na gaggawa ke shafar fitar ƙwai
texts.t2365: Hana ɗaukar ciki na gaggawa da fitar ƙwai
texts.t2366: Hana ɗaukar ciki na gaggawa na iya jinkirta ko hana fitar ƙwai, kuma lokacin da aka yi amfani da shi dangane da lokacin fitar ƙwai yana shafar ingancinsa sosai.
texts.t2367: Ba hanya ba ce ta kawo ƙarshen ciki da ya riga ya samu; manufarta ita ce hana ciki kafin dashewar ƙwai a mahaifa.
texts.t2368: Hana ɗaukar ciki na gaggawa yana aiki, a wani ɓangare, ta hanyar matsar ko jinkirta fitar ƙwai.
texts.t2369: ACOG ta lura cewa magungunan hana ɗaukar ciki na gaggawa, ciki har da levonorgestrel da ulipristal, suna aiki ne da farko kafin ciki ya samu, ciki har da ta hanyar shafar lokacin fitar ƙwai. Saboda haka, idan fitar ƙwai ta kusa faruwa ko ta riga ta faru, ingancin wasu tsare-tsare na iya raguwa.

texts.t2374: hana ɗaukar ciki na gaggawa da fitar ƙwai
texts.t2376: Yaushe zagaye ke dawowa bayan daina hana ɗaukar ciki
texts.t2377: Yaushe zagaye ke dawowa bayan dainawa
texts.t2378: Bayan daina hana ɗaukar ciki, lokacin dawowar zagaye yana dogara da hanyar: bayan yawancin hanyoyi, haihuwa na dawowa da sauri, yayin da bayan hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura zai iya ɗaukar ƙarin lokaci.
texts.t2379: Yana da muhimmanci a bambance tsakanin dawowar haihuwa da dawowar tsarin zubar jini na yau da kullum—ba koyaushe suke zama abu ɗaya ba.
texts.t2380: Zagaye bayan daina hana ɗaukar ciki yana dawowa da sauri daban-daban gwargwadon hanyar.
texts.t2381: Bayan COCs, implants, da IUDs, fitar ƙwai da yiwuwar ciki sau da yawa suna dawowa da sauri. Amma jin cewa 'zagaye na bai koma yadda yake ba tukuna' na iya ci gaba, musamman idan hana ɗaukar ciki a baya ta ɓoye wata matsalar rashin daidaito da ta riga ta kasance. Bayan hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura, dawowa yawanci ya fi jinkiri, kuma ya kamata a yi la’akari da wannan tun da wuri.

texts.t2388: Yaushe za a iya fara shirin ciki bayan daina hana ɗaukar ciki
texts.t2389: Shirin ciki bayan daina hana ɗaukar ciki
texts.t2390: Bayan daina yawancin hanyoyin hana ɗaukar ciki, za a iya fara shirin ciki nan take, amma abin da ake tsammani game da lokacin dawowar fitar ƙwai ya kamata ya yi la’akari da takamaiman hanyar.
texts.t2391: Ga yawancin hanyoyi, babu wata ƙa'ida ta likita da ta wajabta jira zagaye da dama kawai don 'tsarkake jiki'; babban abin da ya bambanta a aikace shi ne hana ɗaukar ciki ta allura wadda dawowar haihuwa ke ɗaukar lokaci a hankali.
texts.t2392: Bayan daina yawancin hanyoyi, za a iya fara TTC ba tare da wani hutu na dole ba.
texts.t2393: Shawara mai amfani tana dogara ne ba kan tatsuniyar tsarkake jiki ba, sai kan hanyar da shirye-shiryen haihuwa. Idan ana son ciki nan ba da jimawa ba, ya fi muhimmanci a fara folic acid, a duba magunguna, kuma a fahimci yadda fitar ƙwai ke dawowa bayan takamaiman hanya. Ga DMPA, lokacin yawanci ya fi na ƙwaya, implant, ko IUD tsawo.

texts.t2400: Wadanne magunguna za su iya shafar zagaye
texts.t2402: Zagaye na iya shafuwa da magungunan hormones, antipsychotics, antidepressants, magungunan thyroid, glucocorticosteroids, da wasu magunguna da ke shafar prolactin, fitar ƙwai, ko zubar jini.
texts.t2403: Magani na iya canza yawan zuwan al'ada, yawan zubar jini, fitar ƙwai, ko ya jawo ɗigon jini. Saboda haka, idan sabon rashin daidaiton zagaye ya bayyana, koyaushe yana da amfani a sake duba jerin magunguna.
texts.t2404: Magunguna da yawa na iya canza tsarin al'ada.
texts.t2405: Ba kowane canjin zagaye ne ke da alaƙa da cutar tsarin haihuwa kai tsaye ba. Wani lokaci mabuɗin warware matsalar shi ne sabon magani ko wanda aka canza kwanan nan. Canje-canjen zagaye sun fi yawa musamman da magungunan hormones, magungunan da ke shafar prolactin, da magungunan da ke canza fitar ƙwai ko yanayin endometrium.

texts.t2465: Babban kuskure game da magunguna da zagaye shi ne ko dai a ɗauki kowace illa a matsayin haɗari fiye da kima ko kuma, akasin haka, a jingina duk canje-canje ga daidaitawar al'ada ba tare da duba yanayin asibiti ba.
texts.t2468: Ana ɗaukar NSAIDs a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin magungunan farko don ciwon al'ada domin suna rage ciwon da prostaglandins ke haddasawa.
texts.t2469: Sun fi amfani idan an fara su da zarar alamomi sun fara ko tun da wuri idan zagaye ana iya hasashensa. Suna taimakawa ga ciwo da kuma, a wani ɓangare, yawan zubar jini.
texts.t2470: NSAIDs zaɓi ne na asali don rage alamomin dysmenorrhea.
texts.t2471: ACOG ta jaddada cewa ibuprofen da sauran NSAIDs suna aiki fiye da kyau idan an sha su a kan lokaci maimakon jira har sai ciwo ya kai kololuwa. Amma idan ciwon yana da tsanani kowane wata, bai amsa NSAIDs ba, ko yana tare da wasu alamomi, wannan dalili ne na neman wani dalili na sakandare maimakon canza ƙwayoyi kawai.

texts.t2480: Ana tattauna antispasmodics don ciwon al'ada, amma rawarsu yawanci ba ta kai ta NSAIDs muhimmanci ba kuma hujjojin da ke goyon bayansu sun fi rauni.
texts.t2481: Idan ciwon yawanci prostaglandins ne ke haddasawa, NSAIDs ne yawanci ake ɗauka a matsayin zaɓin farko. Ana iya amfani da antispasmodics a matsayin ƙarin zaɓi na rage alamomi a wasu tsare-tsare.
texts.t2482: Antispasmodics ba sa maye gurbin ainihin tantance dalilin ciwo.
texts.t2483: Ga ciwon mara na zagaye, mutane sau da yawa suna amfani da antispasmodics saboda sun saba. Amma tunanin asibiti yawanci yana ba NSAIDs fifiko domin suna kai hari ga babban hanyar da ke haddasa primary dysmenorrhea. Idan mutum ya dogara da antispasmodics kaɗai kuma ciwon ya ci gaba da tsanani, ya kamata a yi tunanin ciwo na sakandare kuma a sake duba dabarar kulawa.

texts.t2491: Ana iya amfani da magungunan hormones don daidaita zubar jini, dakile fitar ƙwai, rage ciwo, da kare endometrium, amma zaɓin ya dogara da dalilin matsalar zagaye.
texts.t2492: Ba wai kawai suna sa zagaye ya fi sauƙi ba: wani lokaci ana amfani da su wajen maganin AUB, dysmenorrhea, PCOS, da sauran yanayi.
texts.t2493: Daidaita zagaye da hormones yana dogara da manufar asibiti.
texts.t2494: Rubuta maganin hormones ba tare da fahimtar manufar ba kuskure ne da aka saba yi. Abu ɗaya ne a yi maganin yawan zubar jini, wani abu daban a dakile fitar ƙwai, sannan wani daban a daidaita zubar jini na rashin fitar ƙwai ko taimakawa ciwo. Saboda haka, rukuni ɗaya na magunguna na iya dacewa a wani yanayi amma ba zai warware matsalar a wani ba.
texts.t2495: AUB da ba a bayyana ba kafin fara magani
texts.t2502: Magungunan progesterone: lokacin da ake amfani da su
texts.t2504: Ana amfani da magungunan progestin da progesterone a yanayi daban-daban: don sarrafa zubar jini, kare endometrium idan ba a yin ovulation, hana daukar ciki, da kuma a wasu tsare-tsaren haihuwa.
texts.t2505: Kalmar tana iya zama kamar iri ɗaya ce, amma manufofin asibiti da tsarin amfani suna bambanta sosai.
texts.t2506: Ba a amfani da magungunan progesterone don manufa guda ɗaya ta bai ɗaya ba.
texts.t2507: Ana iya amfani da su a matsayin wani ɓangare na zagayen jawo jini, a matsayin wani ɓangare na hana daukar ciki, a matsayin hanyar daidaita endometrium, ko kuma a matsayin wani ɓangare na maganin haihuwa. Saboda haka, tambayar ba ita ce kawai 'ana buƙatar progesterone ko a'a' ba, sai dai 'wane magani, a wane kashi, me ya sa, kuma a wane yanayi'.

texts.t2513: Kwayoyin hana daukar ciki na baki masu haɗin hormone da zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2515: COCs suna canza zagayowar al'ada ta hanyar dakile ovulation da samar da tsarin hormone mai sarrafawa, don haka jinin da ake gani a kansu ba daidai yake da jinin al'ada na halitta bayan ovulation ba.
texts.t2516: COCs sau da yawa suna rage ciwo, yawan jini, da rashin daidaito, amma suna iya jawo zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada, musamman a farkon amfani ko idan an manta da kashi.
texts.t2517: COCs suna ƙirƙirar zagayowar al'ada da aka sarrafa ta wucin gadi maimakon mayar da ta ta halitta.
texts.t2518: COCs na iya sa zagayowar al'ada ta zama daidai a zahiri, amma ba lallai su gyara ainihin dalilin rashin daidaiton ba. Saboda haka, bayan an daina su, tsarin da yake akwai a baya yakan sake bayyana. Lokacin fara COCs, ɗigon jini a watannin farko ba sabon abu ba ne, musamman idan an manta da ƙwayoyi.

texts.t2520: zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada mai ɗorewa ko mai tsanani
texts.t2521: kwayoyin hana daukar ciki na baki masu haɗin hormone da zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2526: Mini-pills da sauran hanyoyin da ke ɗauke da progestin kaɗai sau da yawa suna jawo ɗigon jini ba bisa ka'ida ba, musamman a farkon amfani.
texts.t2527: Irin wannan tsarin na iya zama abin da ake tsammani, amma zubar jini mai ɗorewa yana buƙatar a duba ko ana shan maganin yadda ya kamata, lokaci, da sauran dalilan AUB.
texts.t2528: Zubar jini ba bisa ka'ida ba yayin amfani da mini-pills sakamako ne da aka saba gani.
texts.t2529: ACOG ta bayyana a sarari cewa hanyoyin da ke ɗauke da progestin kaɗai na iya jawo ɗigon jini da zubar jini ba bisa ka'ida ba, musamman a shekara ta farko. Wannan ba koyaushe yake da haɗari ba, amma idan zubar jinin ya yi yawa, ya daɗe, ko ya dame sosai, ya zama dole a duba ba hanyar kawai ba har ma da yadda ake shan ta da sauran yiwuwar dalilai.
texts.t2530: canji kwatsam a tsarin yayin amfani da hanyar
texts.t2534: Hana daukar ciki na gaggawa da canje-canjen zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2536: Bayan hana daukar ciki na gaggawa, zagayowar al'ada na iya canzawa na ɗan lokaci: al'ada na iya zuwa da wuri ko a makare, kuma ɗigon jini da rashin daidaito na ɗan lokaci na iya faruwa.
texts.t2537: Wannan martani ne na ɗan lokaci da aka saba gani, amma ciwo mai tsanani, zubar jini da ba a saba gani ba sosai, ko jinkiri mai tsawo suna buƙatar ƙarin bincike.
texts.t2538: Hana daukar ciki na gaggawa na iya matsar da zagayowar al'ada na ɗan lokaci.
texts.t2539: ACOG ta lura cewa zubar jini ba bisa ka'ida ba ko ɗigon jini bayan ƙwayoyin EC na iya faruwa. Amma bai kamata EC ta zama bayanin bai ɗaya ga kowanne ciwo ko jinkiri mai tsawo ba. Idan al'ada ta yi jinkiri sosai, ya kamata a yi gwajin ciki; idan akwai ciwo a gefe guda ko suma, dole ne a kawar da yiwuwar ciki mai rikitarwa.
texts.t2540: hana daukar ciki na gaggawa da canje-canjen zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2542: Magungunan rage baƙin ciki da zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2543: Magungunan rage baƙin ciki da zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2544: Ba a ɗaukar magungunan rage baƙin ciki a matsayin babban sanadin matsalolin zagayowar al'ada kai tsaye ba, amma a wasu mutane suna iya canza tsarin al'ada a kaikaice ta hanyar tasiri ga prolactin, nauyi, barci, sha'awar jima'i, da damuwa.
texts.t2545: Muhimmin abin dubawa a aikace shi ne lokaci: shin zagayowar al'ada ta canza ne bayan fara maganin ko sauya shi?
texts.t2546: Alaƙar da ke tsakanin magungunan rage baƙin ciki da zagayowar al'ada sau da yawa tana kasancewa a kaikaice fiye da kai tsaye.
texts.t2547: Kasancewar mutum yana shan maganin rage baƙin ciki kaɗai ba ya bayyana kowanne rashin daidaiton al'ada kai tsaye. Amma idan canje-canje sun fara bayan rubuta maganin, musamman tare da wasu sakamako masu illa, duba maganin ya zama wani ɓangare mai ma'ana na bincike. A lokaci guda, bai kamata a manta cewa baƙin ciki, damuwa, da canje-canje a nauyi da barci su ma suna shafar zagayowar al'ada da kansu ba.

texts.t2553: magungunan rage baƙin ciki da zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2556: Magungunan antipsychotic na iya ƙara prolactin kuma ta haka su jawo amenorrhea, oligomenorrhea, rashin ovulation, da fitowar madara daga nono.
texts.t2557: Idan zagayowar al'ada ta rikice yayin shan maganin antipsychotic, prolactin na zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan bayanan da ya kamata a bincika.
texts.t2558: Magungunan antipsychotic muhimmiyar hanyar magani ce da ke iya jawo hyperprolactinemia.
texts.t2559: Wannan wata sananniyar hanya ce ta matsalar al'ada da magani ke jawowa. A aikace, yana da muhimmanci kada a daina maganin kwakwalwa da kai, sai dai a tattauna alamun da likitocin da ke kula da ke: wani lokaci ana buƙatar auna prolactin, a sake duba tsarin magani, ko a binciki wasu dalilai, musamman idan akwai ciwon kai ko matsalolin gani.
texts.t2565: Magungunan thyroid ba sa shafar zagayowar al'ada kai tsaye kamar hanyoyin hana daukar ciki, amma ta hanyar gyara yanayin thyroid ne, wanda shi kansa ke shafar ovulation da zubar jini.
texts.t2566: Idan aikin thyroid ya daidaita, zagayowar al'ada ma na iya zama mafi sauƙin hasashe ga wasu mutane.
texts.t2567: Canje-canje a jinin al'ada yayin maganin thyroid sau da yawa suna nuna canje-canje a aikin thyroid maimakon wani sakamako na daban.
texts.t2568: A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a fassara wannan bisa yanayi: muni ko sauƙi na iya danganta da hypothyroidism ko hyperthyroidism da ba a kula da su ba, ba ƙwayar magani kaɗai ba. Saboda haka, tambayar yawanci ba ita ce ko a daina maganin ba, sai dai ko gyaran yanayin thyroid ya isa.
texts.t2569: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada mai ɗorewa tare da alamun thyroid
texts.t2574: Glucocorticosteroids na iya shafar zagayowar al'ada a kaikaice ta hanyar tsarin hormone na damuwa, nauyi, metabolism, da yanayin jiki gaba ɗaya, ko da yake ba su ne mafi yawan sanadin matsalar al'ada kaɗai ba.
texts.t2575: Idan matsalolin zagayowar al'ada sun bayyana yayin dogon magani na jiki gaba ɗaya, ana tantance su tare da cutar asali da kuma cikakken yanayin endocrine.
texts.t2576: Glucocorticosteroids na iya kasancewa cikin abubuwan da ake la'akari da su wajen matsalolin zagayowar al'ada da magani ya jawo.
texts.t2577: A aikace, yana da muhimmanci kada a fassara wannan da ƙuntatawa sosai: zagayowar al'ada na iya canzawa ba daga maganin kaɗai ba har ma daga cutar kumburi ta asali, canjin nauyi, damuwa, da sauran magunguna da ake sha tare. Saboda haka, tantancewar koyaushe tana kasancewa mai faɗi.
texts.t2578: amenorrhea mai ɗorewa ko AUB yayin dogon magani
texts.t2583: Ana amfani da magungunan jawo ovulation idan babu ovulation ko kuma yana faruwa da wuya, amma suna buƙatar zaɓen marar lafiya daidai da sa ido.
texts.t2584: Ba ƙwayoyi ba ne na bai ɗaya don saurin samun ciki, sai dai kayan aikin jawo ovulation masu takamaiman dalilai da haɗari.
texts.t2585: Jawo ovulation magani ne da aka nufa don rashin haihuwa da ke da alaƙa da matsalar ovulation.
texts.t2586: Muhimmin tunani shi ne: da farko a fahimci dalilin rashin ovulation, sannan a zaɓi maganin da tsarin da ya dace. Haɗurra sun haɗa da ciki na tagwaye ko fiye, canje-canjen cyst, kuma a wasu tsare-tsare, OHSS; saboda haka, ba za a rage jawo ovulation zuwa shawarar kawai ta shan wani abu don ovulation ba.

texts.t2588: ciwo, kumburin ciki, ko ƙarancin numfashi yayin jawo ovulation
texts.t2594: Clomiphene tsohon sanannen magani ne don jawo ovulation, amma a wasu yanayi, musamman a PCOS, yanzu ana ɗaukar letrozole a matsayin zaɓin farko mafi so.
texts.t2595: Clomiphene ba ya aiki iri ɗaya ga kowa kuma yana buƙatar fahimtar yadda ovulation ke amsawa, haɗurra, da manufofin magani.
texts.t2596: Clomiphene ba zaɓin farko na bai ɗaya ba ne ga dukkan lokutan rashin ovulation.
texts.t2597: A tarihi, an yi amfani da clomiphene sosai don jawo ovulation. Yanzu, tunanin jagororin ya fi daidaito: misali, a rashin haihuwa mai alaƙa da rashin ovulation a PCOS, sau da yawa ana fifita letrozole. Duk da haka, clomiphene har yanzu yana da muhimmanci a matsayin kayan aiki a takamaiman yanayin asibiti.

texts.t2599: alamun yawan motsa ovaries ko cysts
texts.t2605: Letrozole ɗaya ne daga cikin manyan magungunan jawo ovulation, kuma a PCOS sau da yawa ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin zaɓin farko don jawo ovulation.
texts.t2606: Ba a rubuta shi bisa ka'idar 'gwargwadon ƙarfi, gwargwadon kyau' ba; yana aiki ne a cikin takamaiman tsare-tsare da sa ido.
texts.t2607: Letrozole muhimmiyar magani ce ta farko don jawo ovulation a PCOS.
texts.t2608: Jagororin zamani suna jaddada rawar letrozole wajen kula da rashin haihuwa mai alaƙa da rashin ovulation a PCOS. Wannan ba yana nufin kowa da kowa mai rashin daidaituwar al'ada yana buƙatarsa ba. Da farko, ana tabbatar da manufa: ko matsalar da gaske matsalar ovulation ce da kuma ko akwai wasu abubuwan rashin haihuwa.
texts.t2610: ciwo, kumburin ciki, ko wata amsa da ba a saba gani ba ga motsawa
texts.t2615: Ana amfani da allurar hCG a matsayin tayarwa a cikin tsare-tsaren motsawa don jawo balagar ƙarshe ta ƙwayar halitta da kuma ovulation a lokacin da aka tsara.
texts.t2616: Kayan aiki ne don sarrafa lokaci, ba maganin gida na yau da kullum ba ne don rashin daidaituwar al'ada.
texts.t2617: Ana amfani da tayarwar hCG a cikin tsare-tsaren haihuwa da ake sa ido a kansu.
texts.t2618: A aikace, amfanin tayarwar shi ne tana taimakawa daidaita lokacin ovulation da jima'i, IUI, ko sauran matakan magani. Amma ba a rubuta ta ba tare da tsari ba: ana buƙatar sa ido kan follicle, fahimtar haɗarin hyperstimulation, da manufar tsarin.

texts.t2623: Metformin da zagayowar al'ada a PCOS
texts.t2625: Ana tattauna metformin a PCOS da farko a matsayin taimakon metabolism, wanda a wasu marasa lafiya zai iya taimakawa zagayowar al'ada da ovulation, amma ba madadin bai ɗaya ba ne ga jawo ovulation.
texts.t2626: Idan babban buri shi ne samun ciki, dabarar tana dogara da cikakken hoto, ba kasancewar PCOS da insulin resistance kaɗai ba.
texts.t2627: Metformin a PCOS ba kawai ƙwaya ba ce don al'ada.
texts.t2628: Tunanin jagorori a PCOS yana ginuwa ne a kan tsarin alamomi: manufofin metabolism, zagayowar al'ada, jawo ovulation, da yanayin da ya shafi nauyi. Metformin na iya taimakawa wasu mutane, musamman masu siffofin metabolism, amma ba koyaushe ita ce mataki mafi tasiri na farko musamman don samun ciki ba.

texts.t2634: Iron don yawan jinin al'ada da anemia
texts.t2636: A yawan jinin al'ada, sau da yawa ana buƙatar a tantance iron kuma a cike shi idan akwai ƙarancin iron ko anemia, amma iron da kansa ba ya magance dalilin yawan zubar jinin.
texts.t2637: Wannan wani ɓangare ne na tallafi kuma sau da yawa mai muhimmanci a kulawa, musamman idan akwai rauni, fari, ƙarancin numfashi, da ƙarancin ferritin ko hemoglobin.
texts.t2638: Iron yana magance sakamakon asarar jini, ba tushen zubar jinin ba.
texts.t2639: A HMB, kuskuren asibiti shi ne a yi magani da masu rage ciwo kawai a manta da asarar iron mai ɗorewa. Idan mutum yana gajiya, ya yi fari, yana fama da ƙarancin numfashi, yana da bugun zuciya mai sauri, ko gwaji ya tabbatar da ƙaranci, gyaran iron ya zama wani ɓangare na tsari tare da binciken dalilin zubar jinin.
texts.t2641: iron don yawan jinin al'ada da anemia
texts.t2644: Wadanne kari ne ake yawan tattaunawa don PMS
texts.t2646: Magnesium, bitamin B6, calcium, da sauran kari ana yawan tattaunawa don PMS, amma ingancin hujja ga magunguna daban-daban yana bambanta, kuma aminci da kashi suna da muhimmanci kamar shahara.
texts.t2647: Karin abinci bai kamata su maye gurbin tantance PMS ko PMDD ba idan alamun suna da tsanani ko haɗari.
texts.t2648: Shaharar kari ba ta nufin akwai buƙatar asibiti kai tsaye ba.
texts.t2649: A yanayin PMS, yana da sauƙi a fada cikin gwaje-gwajen kai marasa ƙarewa. Hanyar da ta fi amfani ita ce a fara fahimtar tsananin alamun, a riƙe kundin rubutu, a tattauna barci, ciwo, da yanayi, sannan a zaɓi ƙananan hanyoyin taimako masu ma'ana maimakon shan komai lokaci guda. Yana da muhimmanci musamman a tuna hulɗar magunguna da yawan kashi fiye da kima.

texts.t2651: wadanne kari ne ake yawan tattaunawa don pms
texts.t2654: Me ya sa ya kamata a tantance magunguna tare da likita idan ana la'akari da zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2655: Me ya sa a tantance magunguna tare da likita
texts.t2656: Ya kamata a tantance magunguna tare da likita idan ana la'akari da zagayowar al'ada saboda magani ɗaya na iya zama mai amfani a wani yanayi kuma mai matsala a wani—gwargwadon buri, shekaru, abubuwan da ke hana amfani, manufofin ovulation, da cututtukan da ke tare da shi.
texts.t2657: Zagayowar al'ada ba wata gaɓa dabam ba ce, sai dai wani ɓangare na tsarin endocrine da haihuwa gaba ɗaya; saboda haka, tantance magani yana buƙatar yanayi.
texts.t2658: Duba magunguna tare da la'akari da zagayowar al'ada ya zama dole don daidaita amfani, haɗari, da manufofin haihuwa.
texts.t2659: Wannan yana da muhimmanci musamman idan akwai shirin ciki, amenorrhea, HMB, ciwo mai ɗorewa, maganin yanayi, ko cutar endocrine. Likita ba ya tantance maganin kaɗai ba har ma da dalilin da ake buƙatarsa, abin da ya riga ya canza a zagayowar al'ada, ko akwai abubuwan da ke hana amfani, ko ana buƙatar sa ido, da kuma ko maganin yana ɓoye wata matsala mai zurfi.

texts.t2667: Amenorrhea shi ne rashin zuwan al'ada, kuma a asibiti, dole ne a fara kawar da yiwuwar ciki, sannan a binciki dalili a kan layin hypothalamus–pituitary–ovaries–mahaifa.
texts.t2668: Amenorrhea alama ce, ba cikakkiyar ganewar asali ba. Tana iya kasancewa da alaƙa da ciki, PCOS, hyperprolactinemia, cututtukan thyroid, matsalar hypothalamus, da POI.
texts.t2669: Amenorrhea shi ne rashin zuwan al'ada a lokacin da ake tsammani.
texts.t2670: ACOG da ASRM suna jaddada cewa ba za a iya bayyana amenorrhea da damuwa ko nauyi kaɗai ba ba tare da tantance ainihin abubuwan da ake la'akari da su ba. Secondary amenorrhea sau da yawa tana buƙatar a fara kawar da ciki, sannan a tantance tarihin lafiya, nauyi, damuwa, magunguna, hormones, kuma a yi duban dan tayi idan ya zama dole. Yayin da rashin zuwan al'ada ya ƙara tsawo, haka muhimmancin tsararren binciken dalili ke ƙaruwa.

texts.t2720: An ba fifiko ga ACOG, ASRM, ESHRE, Endocrine Society, da StatPearls; a wannan sashe, yana da matuƙar muhimmanci a bambanta tsakanin matsalar ovulation, structural AUB, da dalilan endocrine na jiki gaba ɗaya.

texts.t2735: Babban kuskuren asibiti game da rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada shi ne kallon kalanda kawai da raina cewa alama ɗaya na iya nuna canjin ɗan lokaci ko kuma matsalar endocrine, tsarin jiki, ko ciwo.
texts.t2738: Oligomenorrhea na nufin al'ada mai nisa, kuma yawanci tana nuna rashin daidaiton ovulation ko matsalar ovulation.
texts.t2739: Al'ada mai nisa ba kawai matsalar kalanda ba ce, sai dai alamar asibiti ta yiwuwar matsaloli da ovulation, PCOS, thyroid, prolactin, nauyi, ko damuwa.
texts.t2740: Oligomenorrhea ita ce al'ada mai nisa fiye da kima.
texts.t2741: A aikace, oligomenorrhea sau da yawa tana da alaƙa da rashin ovulation ko ovulation mai wuya. Wannan yana da muhimmanci musamman wajen shirin ciki da tantance haɗarin endometrial hyperplasia idan zubar jini yana da nisa kuma ba a iya hasashensa. Nisan zagayowar da kansa dalili ne na binciken musabbabi, maimakon kawai rayuwa da doguwar kalanda.
texts.t2747: Polymenorrhea: al'ada mai yawan zuwa fiye da kima
texts.t2749: Polymenorrhea na nufin zubar jinin al'ada mai yawan faruwa fiye da kima, kuma tana buƙatar a bambanta gajeriyar zagayowar da ke da ovulation daga zubar jinin mahaifa da ba daidai ba.
texts.t2750: Al'ada mai yawan zuwa fiye da kima na iya kasancewa da alaƙa da matsalar ovulation, dalilan tsarin jiki, ko wasu nau'ikan AUB.
texts.t2751: Polymenorrhea ita ce gajeriyar tazara fiye da kima tsakanin lokutan zubar jini.
texts.t2752: Yana da muhimmanci kada a rikita al'ada a matsayin zagayowar da kowanne zubar jini mai maimaituwa. Lokutan zubar jini masu yawan faruwa na iya zama ɗigon jini a tsakanin al'ada, AUB, ko sakamakon matsalar tsarin jiki. Saboda haka, aikin asibiti shi ne a tantance me ake ɗauka a matsayin al'ada da kuma yadda zubar jinin ya dace da ainihin al'ada.
texts.t2753: zubar jini mai yawan faruwa fiye da yadda aka saba a zagaye da dama a jere
texts.t2754: lokuta masu yawa ko masu ciwo
texts.t2755: polymenorrhea: al'ada mai yawan zuwa fiye da kima
texts.t2760: Menorrhagia na nufin yawan jinin al'ada, wanda zai iya jawo anemia, rauni, da raguwar ingancin rayuwa sosai.
texts.t2761: Ba a tantance tsanani da milliliters kaɗai ba, har ma da yadda ake saurin canza kayan tsafta, ko akwai daskararrun jini, rauni, da raguwar ayyukan yau da kullum.
texts.t2762: Menorrhagia ita ce yawan jinin al'ada fiye da kima.
texts.t2763: A kalmomin zamani, ana yawan amfani da heavy menstrual bleeding, amma ma'anar aikace-aikacen iri ɗaya ce: zubar jini da ya yi yawa ga takamaiman mutum. Dalilai sun haɗa da tushen AUB na tsarin jiki da marasa tsarin jiki bisa PALM-COEIN. A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci kada a ɗauki yawan jini a matsayin al'ada kawai saboda ya daɗe yana haka.
texts.t2766: zubar jinin mahaifa da ba daidai ba
texts.t2773: Hypomenorrhea ita ce ƙarancin jinin al'ada, kuma tana iya nuna bambancin mutum na al'ada ko kuma matsaloli da ovulation, endometrium, ko daidaiton hormone.
texts.t2774: Karancin jinin al'ada kaɗai ba koyaushe yana nuna cuta ba, amma idan ya haɗu da amenorrhea, damuwa, rage nauyi, hanyoyin aikin mahaifa, ko rashin haihuwa, yana buƙatar tantancewa.
texts.t2775: Hypomenorrhea ita ce al'ada mai sauƙi fiye da yadda aka saba.
texts.t2776: Muhimmancin hypomenorrhea a asibiti yana dogara da yanayi. A wasu mutane, al'ada a dabi'a gajera ce kuma mai sauƙi. Amma idan zubar jinin ya canza kwatsam, ya kusan daina gaba ɗaya, ko ya faru bayan curettage, haihuwa, rage nauyi, ko a kan yanayin rashin ovulation, to yanayin ya bambanta.
texts.t2777: canji kwatsam a yawan jinin al'ada
texts.t2778: ƙarancin jinin al'ada bayan aikin mahaifa
texts.t2783: Zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada ɗigon jini ne ko zubar jini a wajen lokacin al'ada da ake tsammani, kuma ya kamata a tantance shi a matsayin wani nau'in zubar jinin mahaifa da ba daidai ba.
texts.t2784: Dalilai sun haɗa da matsalar ovulation, polyps, cututtuka, magungunan hormone, ciki, da sauran yanayi.
texts.t2785: Zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada ba al'ada ta yau da kullum ba ce.
texts.t2786: Lokaci guda na ɗan zubar jini mai sauƙi na iya samun bayani mara haɗari, amma tsarin da yake maimaituwa ko mai yawa yana buƙatar ganewar asali. Yana da muhimmanci musamman kada a rasa ciki, polyps, matsalar bakin mahaifa, da kumburi. Kasancewar zubar jinin mai sauƙi kaɗai ba ya nufin yanayin yana da aminci kai tsaye ba.
texts.t2787: zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada mai maimaituwa
texts.t2792: Rashin ovulation zagayowar al'ada ce ba tare da sakin ƙwai ba, kuma tana iya bayyana a matsayin al'ada mai nisa, marar tsari, ko zubar jini da ba a saba gani ba.
texts.t2793: Kasancewar zubar jini ba ya tabbatar da cewa ovulation ya faru. Rashin ovulation sanannen tushen rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada ne.
texts.t2794: Rashin ovulation shi ne rashin faruwar ovulation a takamaiman zagaye.
texts.t2795: Zagayen da babu ovulation na iya faruwa lokaci-lokaci har ma a lafiyayyun mutane, amma rashin ovulation mai maimaituwa yana buƙatar binciken dalili. Mafi yawan yanayi sun haɗa da PCOS, hypothalamic amenorrhea, hyperprolactinemia, cututtukan thyroid, da sauran matsalolin endocrine.
texts.t2796: zagaye da dama ba tare da alamun ovulation ba
texts.t2797: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada mai ɗorewa
texts.t2800: Rashin isasshen luteal phase ra'ayi ne mai jayayya kuma mai ruɗani a asibiti; gajeriyar luteal phase ko ƙarancin progesterone ba koyaushe suke zama cikakkiyar ganewar asali mai zaman kanta ba.
texts.t2801: Ana yawan amfani da wannan kalma da sassauci fiye da kima. A aikace, ya fi muhimmanci a tantance ainihin ovulation, cikakken zagayowar al'ada, da yanayin rashin haihuwa fiye da yin ganewar asali bisa gwaji guda ɗaya.
texts.t2802: Rashin isasshen luteal phase ba sauƙaƙƙen ganewar asali ba ne bisa matakin progesterone guda ɗaya.
texts.t2803: Magungunan haihuwa na zamani suna taka-tsantsan da wannan ra'ayi. Gajeriyar luteal phase, jadawalin BBT marasa daidaito, ko matakin progesterone guda ɗaya mai ƙasa ba sa ba da tabbatacciyar hujja ta wata cuta ta musamman. Sau da yawa, irin waɗannan abubuwan lura suna faruwa ne saboda kuskuren lokaci, matsalar ovulation, ko bambancin zagayowar al'ada na yau da kullum.
texts.t2804: matsalolin samun ciki na watanni da dama
texts.t2805: fassarar progesterone marar bayyani ba tare da yanayi ba
texts.t2809: PCOS sanannen dalili ne na rashin daidaituwar al'ada, rashin ovulation, da hyperandrogenism, ba kawai kasancewar cysts a ovaries ba.
texts.t2810: PCOS yana shafar zagayowar al'ada, ovulation, lafiyar metabolism, da haihuwa, saboda haka hanyar kulawa da shi dole ta kasance mai faɗi.
texts.t2811: PCOS wata cuta ce ta hormone da metabolism tare da matsalar ovulation.
texts.t2812: A PCOS, rashin daidaituwar al'ada, alamun hyperandrogenism, da/ko siffar ovaries masu polycystic suna da muhimmanci, ba hoton duban dan tayi kaɗai ba. A asibiti, yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan dalilan oligomenorrhea da rashin ovulation.
texts.t2813: al'ada mai nisa tare da hyperandrogenism
texts.t2819: Endometriosis yanayi ne da a cikinsa ƙwayoyin kama da endometrium suke a wajen kogon mahaifa kuma sau da yawa suna da alaƙa da ciwo da rashin haihuwa.
texts.t2820: Tsarin da aka fi gani ya haɗa da dysmenorrhea mai tsanani, ciwo mai zurfi yayin jima'i, ciwo yayin bayan gida, da ciwon ƙugu mai ɗorewa, amma alamun suna da matuƙar bambanci.
texts.t2821: Endometriosis sanannen dalili ne na ciwon zagayowar al'ada na biyu.
texts.t2822: Alamun endometriosis suna da yawa: daga ciwo mai tsanani zuwa rashin haihuwa da kuma tafiya ba tare da alama ba. Kuskure na yau da kullum shi ne a bayyana ciwon al'ada da ke ƙaruwa a matsayin al'ada kuma a kasa la'akari da endometriosis tsawon shekaru.
texts.t2829: Adenomyosis yanayi ne da a cikinsa ƙwayoyin endometrium suke shiga cikin tsokar mahaifa kuma sau da yawa suna jawo al'ada mai ciwo da/ko mai yawa.
texts.t2830: Adenomyosis sau da yawa tana bayyana da yawan zubar jini, dysmenorrhea, da jin matsin lamba a ƙugu.
texts.t2831: Adenomyosis sanannen dalili ne na al'ada mai ciwo da mai yawa.
texts.t2832: A asibiti, tana da muhimmanci a matsayin abin bambancewa ga ciwon zagayowar al'ada da yawan jinin al'ada, musamman idan mahaifa ta faɗaɗa kuma ciwo/zubar jini suna ƙaruwa. Tana iya kasancewa tare da endometriosis da fibroids.
texts.t2833: al'ada mai yawa kuma mai ciwo
texts.t2837: Fibroids na mahaifa ƙuraje ne marasa cutar daji na tsokar mahaifa waɗanda za su iya jawo yawan jinin al'ada, matsin lamba, ciwo, da matsalolin haihuwa.
texts.t2838: Ba kowanne fibroid ne ke jawo alama ba, amma idan akwai AUB da jin wani abu ko matsin lamba, yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan dalilan tsarin jiki da ake la'akari da su.
texts.t2839: Fibroid dalili ne na tsarin jiki na zubar jinin mahaifa da ba daidai ba.
texts.t2840: A cikin tsarin PALM-COEIN, ana rarraba fibroids a matsayin dalilan tsarin jiki na AUB. Muhimmancin asibiti yana dogara da girma, yawa, da wurin ƙurajen. Ƙurajen submucosal sun fi alaƙa da zubar jini, yayin da manya suka fi alaƙa da matsin lamba da rashin jin daɗi a ƙugu.
texts.t2841: yawan jinin al'ada tare da anemia
texts.t2847: Polyps na endometrium ƙananan tsiro ne na endometrium da aka takaita wuri guda waɗanda sau da yawa suke bayyana a matsayin zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada, ɗigon jini, ko yawan jinin al'ada.
texts.t2848: Ana rarraba polyps a matsayin dalilan tsarin jiki na AUB kuma suna da muhimmanci musamman a bambancewar zubar jini mai maimaituwa da ɗigon jini a tsakanin al'ada.
texts.t2849: Polyps na endometrium na iya jawo zubar jini ba tare da tsari ba.
texts.t2850: Idan mutum yana yawan samun ɗigon jini ko zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada, polyps suna ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan da ake la'akari da su a aikace. Ba koyaushe suke jawo ciwo ba, don haka rashin ciwo ba ya nufin babu matsala.
texts.t2851: zubar jini a tsakanin al'ada mai maimaituwa
texts.t2853: AUB ba tare da bayyanannen dalili ba
texts.t2857: Cysts na ovaries masu aiki suna faruwa a matsayin wani ɓangare na tsarin ovulation kuma sau da yawa suna ɓacewa da kansu, amma suna iya jawo ciwo ko jinkirin zagayowar al'ada.
texts.t2858: Ba kowanne cyst ne mai haɗari ba, amma sabon ciwo, munin alamomi, ko rikice-rikicen cyst suna buƙatar wata dabara ta kulawa daban.
texts.t2859: Functional cyst sau da yawa tana da alaƙa da tsarin ovulation na al'ada.
texts.t2860: Follicular da luteal cysts sau da yawa suna samuwa a matsayin wani ɓangare na aikin ovaries na al'ada. Da yawa ba sa nuna alama kuma suna ɓacewa da kansu. Muhimmancin asibiti yana tasowa idan akwai ciwo a gefe guda, girma mai yawa, zargin fashewa ko juyawa, ko matsalolin zagayowar al'ada masu maimaituwa.
texts.t2861: ciwo mai kaifi a gefe guda
texts.t2867: Raguwar aikin ovaries da wuri ita ce rasa aikin ovaries na al'ada kafin shekara 40, kuma yawanci tana bayyana da rashin daidaituwar al'ada, amenorrhea, da hauhawar FSH.
texts.t2868: POI ba kawai "menopause da wuri" ba ce a ma'anar yau da kullum, sai dai wata babbar matsala ta haihuwa da endocrine da ke buƙatar tabbatarwa da kulawa.
texts.t2869: POI ita ce raguwar aikin ovaries kafin shekara 40.
texts.t2870: POI tana shafar ba haihuwa kaɗai ba har ma da ƙashi, zuciya da jijiyoyi, da lafiyar tunani da motsin rai. Muhimman alamomi ga zagayowar al'ada sun haɗa da sabon nisan al'ada, amenorrhea, da alamun ƙarancin estrogen a mace mai ƙarancin shekaru.
texts.t2872: zafin jiki mai tashi/bushewa tare da rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada
texts.t2877: Hyperprolactinemia na iya jawo amenorrhea, oligomenorrhea, rashin ovulation, da fitowar madara daga nono ta hanyar dakile GnRH.
texts.t2878: Hawan prolactin ɗaya ne daga cikin sanannun dalilan secondary amenorrhea da rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada.
texts.t2879: Hyperprolactinemia ita ce prolactin mai yawa tare da sakamakon haihuwa.
texts.t2880: Hawan prolactin na iya kasancewa da alaƙa da prolactinoma, magunguna, damuwa, hypothyroidism, da sauran dalilai. Haɗin alamomin da ke damun asibiti sun haɗa da rashin daidaituwar al'ada, rashin ovulation, fitowar madara daga nono, ciwon kai, da/ko matsalolin gani.
texts.t2886: Cututtukan thyroid na iya rikita zagayowar al'ada, ovulation, da tsarin zubar jini; saboda haka, yanayin thyroid wani ɓangare ne na bambancewar rashin daidaituwar al'ada.
texts.t2887: Duka hypothyroidism da hyperthyroidism na iya shafar aikin al'ada, ko da yake hanyar da tsarin rikicewar sun bambanta.
texts.t2888: Thyroid tana da alaƙa ta kusa da aikin al'ada.
texts.t2889: Matsalolin thyroid suna shafar layin hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian, metabolism, prolactin, da ovulation. Saboda haka, a lokutan amenorrhea, oligomenorrhea, ko rashin ovulation, tantance aikin thyroid sau da yawa wani ɓangare ne na binciken farko.
texts.t2890: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada tare da alamun thyroid na jiki gaba ɗaya
texts.t2895: Insulin resistance na iya shafar zagayowar al'ada da farko ta hanyar alaƙarta da PCOS, matsalar ovulation, da matsalolin metabolism.
texts.t2896: Kalmar da kanta ba ta bayyana duk matsalolin zagayowar al'ada ba, amma sau da yawa tana cikin yanayin metabolism na PCOS.
texts.t2897: Insulin resistance na iya kasancewa wani ɓangare na yadda rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada ke samuwa.
texts.t2898: A asibiti, wannan batu ya fi tasowa a mutanen da ke da PCOS, kiba, acanthosis nigricans, tarihin iyali na ciwon sukari, da zagaye masu tsawo. Yana da muhimmanci kada a danganta kowanne rashin daidaituwar al'ada da insulin resistance, amma kuma kada a yi watsi da ɓangaren metabolism idan yana nan a zahiri.
texts.t2904: Hypothalamic amenorrhea tana faruwa ne saboda dakilewar GnRH ta aiki a kan yanayin ƙarancin kuzari, damuwa, rage nauyi, ko motsa jiki mai tsanani.
texts.t2905: Wannan ba 'ovaries masu kasala' ba ne, sai dai daidaitawar tsakiya ta jiki ga yanayin kuzari da ake gani a matsayin mara aminci.
texts.t2906: Hypothalamic amenorrhea ita ce dakilewar tsakiya ta aikin layin haihuwa.
texts.t2907: FHA sau da yawa tana da alaƙa da ƙarancin kuzari, horo mai yawa, rage nauyi, da damuwar zamantakewa da tunani. A asibiti, ba rashin zuwan al'ada kaɗai ke da muhimmanci ba, har ma da sakamakon ga ƙashi, haihuwa, da lafiyar gaba ɗaya.
texts.t2908: amenorrhea a kan yanayin rage nauyi/motsa jiki
texts.t2911: Matsalolin zagayowar al'ada bayan matsananciyar damuwa
texts.t2913: Matsananciyar damuwa na iya rikita zagayowar al'ada na ɗan lokaci ta hanyar tasirinta ga tsarin hypothalamic-pituitary, amma bai kamata ta bayyana amenorrhea mai tsawo kai tsaye ba ba tare da tantancewa ba.
texts.t2914: Damuwa ainihin abu ne, amma ba ta kawar da buƙatar a kawar da ciki, dalilan endocrine, da matsalar ovulation ba.
texts.t2915: Damuwa na iya matsar da ovulation kuma ta rikita zagayowar al'ada.
texts.t2916: A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci a amince da tasirin damuwa, amma kada a yi amfani da ita a matsayin bayanin bai ɗaya ga komai. Idan zagayowar al'ada ta canza kwatsam bayan wani abu mai tayar da hankali kuma ba ta dawo ba, ana buƙatar tsararren binciken dalilai.
texts.t2918: matsalolin zagayowar al'ada bayan matsananciyar damuwa
texts.t2921: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan rage nauyi cikin sauri
texts.t2922: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan rage nauyi
texts.t2923: Rage nauyi cikin sauri sau da yawa yana rikita zagayowar al'ada ta hanyar ƙarancin kuzari da dakilewar hypothalamus ga ovulation.
texts.t2924: Ga tsarin haihuwa, ba BMI kaɗai ke da muhimmanci ba, har ma da saurin rage nauyi, takaita abinci, da yawan kuzarin da jiki ke samu gaba ɗaya.
texts.t2925: Bayan rage nauyi cikin sauri, zagayowar al'ada na iya rikicewa saboda ƙarancin kuzari.
texts.t2926: Ko da nauyin jiki na ƙarshe ya kasance a cikin kima ta al'ada a rubuce, ƙarancin kuzari mai sauri da yawa na iya rikita bugun GnRH, ovulation, da al'ada.
texts.t2929: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan rage nauyi cikin sauri
texts.t2930: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan rage nauyi
texts.t2932: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan haihuwa
texts.t2933: Bayan haihuwa, dawowar zagayowar al'ada tana dogara da shayarwa, prolactin, da yanayin jikin mutum; saboda haka, lokacin dawowar al'ada yana bambanta.
texts.t2934: Yayin shayarwa, rashin zuwan al'ada na iya ɗaukar lokaci mai tsawo, amma wannan bai kamata ya hana tantance alamun cuta ba.
texts.t2935: Bayan haihuwa, zagayowar al'ada ba ta dawowa da sauri iri ɗaya ga kowa ba.
texts.t2936: Yana da muhimmanci a tuna abubuwa biyu a lokaci guda: bayan haihuwa, zagayowar al'ada na iya dawowa a hankali kuma ta dogara da shayarwa; zubar jini mai yawa da ba a saba gani ba, ciwo mai ɗorewa, rashin dawowa tare da wasu alamomi, ko alamun matsalar endocrine suna buƙatar tantancewa.
texts.t2938: rashin dawowar zagayowar al'ada mai ɗorewa tare da wasu alamomi
texts.t2939: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan haihuwa
texts.t2941: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan zubar da ciki
texts.t2942: Bayan zubar da ciki, zagayowar al'ada na iya canzawa na ɗan lokaci, amma rashin zuwan al'ada mai tsawo, ciwo da ba a saba gani ba, ko zubar jini mai maimaituwa suna buƙatar a kawar da rikice-rikice da dalilan tsarin jiki.
texts.t2943: Muhimmin tambayar ita ce ko wannan dawowa ce ta ɗan lokaci da ake tsammani ko alamar matsala, kamar ragowar nama, kamuwa da cuta, ko mannewar cikin mahaifa.
texts.t2944: Bayan zubar da ciki, zagayowar al'ada na iya ɗaukar lokaci kafin ta dawo, amma bai kamata a yi watsi da alamun haɗari ba.
texts.t2945: Dole ne a yi la'akari da dalilan tsarin jiki na secondary amenorrhea idan tsayawar al'ada ta faru bayan kayan aikin da aka yi a cikin kogon mahaifa. Saboda haka, jinkirin dawowar zagayowar al'ada bayan zubar da ciki yanayi ne da yake da muhimmanci a tuna ba hormones kaɗai ba har ma da hanyoyin tsarin jiki da kamuwa da cuta.
texts.t2946: zubar jini mai yawa ko mai tsawo
texts.t2948: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan zubar da ciki
texts.t2950: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan daina hana daukar ciki na hormone
texts.t2951: Bayan daina hana daukar ciki na hormone
texts.t2952: Bayan daina hana daukar ciki na hormone, wani lokaci zagayowar al'ada tana buƙatar lokaci don nuna tsarin ta na kanta, amma amenorrhea ko rashin daidaito mai ɗorewa suna buƙatar binciken dalili.
texts.t2953: Hana daukar ciki ba ta "lalata" zagayowar al'ada; sau da yawa, bayan an daina ta, ainihin karkatar da ke zuwa ga PCOS, oligomenorrhea, ko rashin ovulation ne ke bayyana.
texts.t2954: Bayan daina hana daukar ciki na hormone, zagayowar al'ada na iya dawowa ta hanyoyi daban-daban.
texts.t2955: A wasu mutane, ovulation tana dawowa da sauri; a wasu kuma, zagayowar al'ada na iya zama marar tabbas a watannin farko. A asibiti, yana da muhimmanci kada a makale da maganar "saboda an daina ƙwayoyi ne kawai" idan al'ada ba ta dawo na dogon lokaci ba ko kuma tsohon tsarin rashin daidaito ya bayyana nan da nan.
texts.t2957: rashin daidaito mai ɗorewa > watanni da dama
texts.t2959: rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada bayan daina hana daukar ciki na hormone
texts.t2960: bayan daina hana daukar ciki na hormone
texts.t2962: Lokacin da rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada ke buƙatar ganewar asali
texts.t2963: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada tana buƙatar ganewar asali idan rashin daidaiton yana ɗorewa, yana tare da amenorrhea, zubar jini mai yawa, ciwo, hyperandrogenism, rashin haihuwa, ko alamun jiki gaba ɗaya.
texts.t2964: Babban ƙa'ida ita ce kada a jira har abada idan zagayowar al'ada tana fita daga iyakar bambancin al'ada akai-akai kuma tana shafar lafiya ko haihuwa.
texts.t2965: Rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada mai ɗorewa alama ce ta binciken dalili, ba sa ido kawai ba.
texts.t2966: Zagayowar al'ada guda ɗaya da ba ta saba ba na iya zama wani nau'in canjin jiki na ɗan lokaci. Amma maimaituwar zubar jini mai tsawo, mai nisa, mai yawan faruwa, mai yawa, ko mai sauƙi, da kuma alamun da ke nuna matsalar endocrine, tsarin jiki, ko ciwo, suna buƙatar ganewar asali.
texts.t2967: lokutan AUB masu yawa ko masu yawan faruwa
texts.t2969: lokacin da rashin daidaituwar zagayowar al'ada ke buƙatar ganewar asali
texts.t2972: Alamun farko na ciki sau da yawa ba su da takamaiman siffa kuma suna iya haɗawa da rashin zuwan al'ada, taushin nono, gajiya, ɗan tashin zuciya, da canje-canje a fitar farji.
texts.t2973: A matakin farko sosai, alamomi ba sa ba da damar tabbatar da ciki cikin dogaro ba tare da gwaji ba. Ciki na farko sau da yawa yana kama da PMS.
texts.t2974: Alamun farko na ciki yawanci ba su da takamaiman siffa.
texts.t2975: A matakan farko ƙwarai, jiki yana fara amsawa ne kawai ga hCG da ke ƙaruwa da canje-canjen hormone. Saboda haka, alamun na iya zama masu laushi, su bambanta daga mutum zuwa mutum, kuma sau da yawa su yi kama da luteal phase na al'ada. A asibiti, babban abin dogaro ba ji na mutum kaɗai ba ne, sai dai rashin zuwan al'ada, gwaji, kuma idan ya zama dole, auna hCG a jere.

texts.t3021: An ba da fifiko ga ACOG, NHS, MedlinePlus/NIH, da StatPearls; a wannan sashe, lokacin yin gwaji, yadda hCG ke canzawa, da tantance gaggawa don ciki a wajen mahaifa suna da muhimmanci musamman.

texts.t3037: kada a yi watsi da ciwo a gefe ɗaya, zubar jini, suma, ko ciwon kafaɗa
texts.t3038: Kuskuren da aka fi yawan yi game da ciki na farko shi ne rikita ji na jiki marasa takamaimai da hujjar cewa akwai ciki, tare da raina alamomin haɗari da ke buƙatar a kawar da yiwuwar ciki a wajen mahaifa.
texts.t3039: Yadda ciki na farko yake kama da PMS
texts.t3041: Ciki na farko yana kama da PMS saboda duka biyun suna faruwa a lokacin matakin progesterone kuma suna iya haifar da taushin nono, gajiya, kumburi, da jin matsin ciki.
texts.t3042: Duka PMS da ciki na farko na iya zuwa da alamomi masu kama da juna, don haka sau da yawa ba zai yiwu a bambance su da tabbaci bisa ga yadda jiki ke ji kafin gwaji ba.
texts.t3043: Ciki na farko da PMS sau da yawa suna kama da juna a yadda ake ji.
texts.t3044: Shi ya sa ƙoƙarin 'hasashen ciki ta saƙonnin jiki' kafin jinin al’ada ya makara yakan jawo damuwa da kuskuren fahimta. Bambancin ba wai ciki yana da wata alama ta farko guda ɗaya ta musamman ba ne, sai dai a ciki jinin al’ada ba ya zuwa, kuma gwaji yana zama mai kyau yayin da matakin hCG ke ƙaruwa.
texts.t3045: jinin al’ada ya makara tare da gwaji mara kyau da ciwo
texts.t3046: zubar jini da bai yi kama da jinin al’ada na yau da kullum ba
texts.t3047: yadda ciki na farko yake kama da pms
texts.t3050: Zubar jinin dashewar ƙwai: me ake nufi da shi
texts.t3052: Zubar jinin dashewar ƙwai yawanci yana nufin ɗan tabon jini mai sauƙi na ɗan lokaci a farkon ciki sosai, amma ana yawan amfani da wannan kalma fiye da kima.
texts.t3053: Ɗan tabon jini na iya faruwa a farkon ciki, amma ba kowane zubar jini na farko ba ne dashewar ƙwai marar haɗari.
texts.t3054: Kalmar 'zubar jinin dashewar ƙwai' bai kamata ta zama abin kwantar da hankali kai tsaye ba.
texts.t3055: A al’ada, ana yawan kiran duk wani ɗan tabon jini na farko da zubar jinin dashewar ƙwai. A fannin likitanci, wannan sauƙaƙawa ce mai haɗari: tabon jini yayin da ake zargin ciki na farko na iya nufin abubuwa daban-daban kuma wani lokaci yana buƙatar a kawar da yiwuwar zubar da ciki ko ciki a wajen mahaifa. Saboda haka, yawan jinin, ciwo, jinkiri, da sakamakon gwaji su ne masu muhimmanci, ba sunan da aka ba shi ba.
texts.t3057: zargin ciki tare da ciwo a gefe ɗaya
texts.t3060: zubar jinin dashewar ƙwai: me ake nufi da shi
texts.t3063: Yaushe za a yi gwajin ciki bayan ovulation
texts.t3064: Yaushe za a yi gwaji bayan ovulation
texts.t3065: Gwajin ciki ya fi bada bayani bayan ranar da ake sa ran jinin al’ada; yin gwaji da wuri sosai bayan ovulation yakan bada sakamako mara kyau na ƙarya.
texts.t3066: Ko da an samu ɗaukar ciki, hCG yana buƙatar lokaci ya tashi zuwa matakin da za a iya ganowa. Saboda haka, gwaje-gwajen farko kafin jinin al’ada ya makara suna da iyaka wajen gano ciki.
texts.t3067: Iyakar da aka fi samu a gwajin farko ita ce an yi shi da wuri sosai.
texts.t3068: Bayan ovulation, haɗuwar ƙwayayen haihuwa, da dashewar ƙwai, yana ɗaukar lokaci kafin a iya gano hCG a fitsari. Saboda haka, gwajin da aka yi da wuri sosai na iya zama mara kyau ba don babu ciki ba, sai don lokaci bai yi ba tukuna a gano shi da gwaji. A aikace, ya fi aminci a jira zuwa ranar da ake sa ran jinin al’ada ko a sake gwaji bayan awa 48 idan har yanzu jinin bai zo ba.
texts.t3069: jinin al’ada ya makara da gwaji mara kyau tare da ciwo
texts.t3070: zargin ciki tare da zubar jini
texts.t3072: yaushe za a yi gwajin ciki bayan ovulation
texts.t3073: yaushe za a yi gwaji bayan ovulation
texts.t3075: Yaushe gwajin ciki zai iya zama mara kyau na ƙarya
texts.t3077: Gwajin ciki na iya zama mara kyau na ƙarya idan an yi shi da wuri sosai, fitsarin ya yi ruwa sosai, ko kuma an ƙayyade lokaci/ovulation ba daidai ba.
texts.t3078: Sakamako mara kyau na ƙarya ya fi yiwuwa musamman idan an yi gwajin kafin ranar da ake sa ran jinin al’ada ko kuma idan ovulation ba ya zuwa a tsari.
texts.t3079: Gwaji mara kyau na ƙarya yawanci yana da alaƙa da lokaci, ba da wata dalili mai wuya da ban mamaki ba.
texts.t3080: A aikace, dalilan da aka fi samu su ne yin gwaji da wuri da kuma kuskuren zato game da ranar ovulation. Wannan haɗarin ya fi yawa a zagayowar da ba su da tsari. Saboda haka, gwaji mara kyau ba koyaushe yake rufe batun ba idan har yanzu jinin al’ada ya makara ko kuma idan alamomin da ba su dace da PMS na yau da kullum ba sun bayyana. A irin waɗannan lokuta, yana da ma’ana a maimaita gwajin ko a koma ga gwajin hCG na jini.
texts.t3081: jinin al’ada ya makara + gwaji mara kyau + ciwo a gefe ɗaya
texts.t3082: suma ko tsananin ciwo tare da gwaji mara kyau
texts.t3083: yaushe gwajin ciki zai iya zama mara kyau na ƙarya
texts.t3088: Idan ciki ya samu, zafin jikin asali na iya ci gaba da kasancewa sama fiye da yadda aka saba a matakin luteal, amma BBT kaɗai ba ya tabbatar da ciki.
texts.t3089: Ci gaba da kasancewar BBT a sama na iya zama wata alama ta kai tsaye ba, amma har yanzu ana tabbatar da ganewar ne ta gwajin ciki ko hCG.
texts.t3090: BBT mai sama na iya kasancewa tare da ciki na farko amma ba ya maye gurbin gwaji.
texts.t3091: Tun da tasirin progesterone yana ci gaba, jadawalin BBT a wasu mutane ba ya sauka kafin ranar da ake sa ran jinin al’ada. Wannan na iya nuna yiwuwar ciki. Amma BBT yana shafar barci, rashin lafiya, barasa, da yadda ake aunawa; saboda haka, a fannin likitanci alama ce ta taimako kawai, ba hanyar gano ciki ba.
texts.t3092: jinin al’ada ya makara tare da jadawali mara daidaito da ciwo
texts.t3093: alamomi masu tsanani yayin ƙoƙarin dogaro da BBT kaɗai
texts.t3098: A farkon ciki, fitar farji na iya ƙaruwa, ya zama mai haske a launi kuma mai ɗan kauri kamar majina, amma wari mara daɗi, kaikayi, ciwo, ko jini suna buƙatar a tantance su dabam.
texts.t3099: Canje-canje a fitar farji na iya faruwa ba tare da wata matsala ba; amma ciki na farko ba ya bayyana kai tsaye duk wani fitar farji da ba a saba gani ba.
texts.t3100: Fitar farji a farkon ciki na iya canzawa, amma alamomin kamuwa da cuta ko zubar jini har yanzu suna da muhimmanci.
texts.t3101: A wasu mutane, farin ko bayyanannen fitar majina daga farji yana ƙaruwa a farkon ciki. Amma idan akwai ƙuna, kaikayi, wari, tsananin ciwo, ko jini, wannan ya wuce sauƙaƙan bayanin 'fitar ciki ne kawai.' A fannin likitanci, irin waɗannan alamomi suna buƙatar a yi la’akari da kamuwa da cuta, zubar jini, ko wasu dalilai.
texts.t3109: Ciwon nono da jin zafi a nono na iya faruwa a PMS da kuma farkon ciki, don haka ba za a iya bambance su da tabbaci da wannan alama kaɗai ba.
texts.t3110: Bambancin yawanci ba a tantance shi da irin ciwon ba, sai dai da ko jinin al’ada ya zo da kuma menene sakamakon gwaji.
texts.t3111: Taushin nono alama ce ta farko marar takamaimai.
texts.t3112: Duka matakin progesterone na zagayowar da farkon ciki na iya zuwa da cikar nono da jin zafi. Saboda haka, ƙoƙarin bambance su ta tsananin ciwon yawanci ba shi da tabbaci. Jinkirin jinin al’ada, yadda alamomin ke ci gaba, da gwajin ciki a daidai lokaci su ne suka fi bada bayani.
texts.t3113: ciwon nono tare da ƙulli ko fitar ruwa daga kan nono
texts.t3114: ciwo mai tsanani a gefe ɗaya da ba a saba gani ba
texts.t3118: Matsin ƙasan ciki: PMS ko ciki
texts.t3120: Matsin ƙasan ciki na iya faruwa a PMS da kuma farkon ciki, don haka ba tare da gwaji ba ba ya bambance yanayin da tabbaci.
texts.t3121: Ɗan jin matsi na iya yiwuwa, amma tsananin ciwo, ciwo a gefe ɗaya, ko ciwon da ke ƙaruwa bai kamata a raina shi a matsayin PMS ko farkon ciki kawai ba.
texts.t3122: Ɗan jin matsin ciki ba takamaimai ba ne, yayin da tsananin ciwo alama ce ta gargaɗi.
texts.t3123: A aikace, wannan alama ta musamman sau da yawa tana sa mutane su tambaya, 'jinin al’ada ne ko ciki'. A fannin likitanci, amsar ita ce: ba za a iya tantancewa da ji kaɗai ba. Amma idan ciwon ya yi tsanani, ya tsaya a gefe ɗaya, yana tare da zubar jini, suma, ko tsananin rauni, dole ne a gaggauta kawar da dalilai masu haɗari, ciki har da ciki a wajen mahaifa.
texts.t3127: matsin ƙasan ciki: pms ko ciki
texts.t3130: Tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara: zai yiwu ne
texts.t3131: Tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara
texts.t3132: Tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara yana yiwuwa a ka’ida, amma a matsayin alama ta farko ba shi da tabbaci kuma ba ya tabbatar da ciki.
texts.t3133: Wasu mutane suna lura da abubuwan da ba su saba ji ba tun da wuri sosai, amma a fannin likitanci ba a ɗauki tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara a matsayin alama mai takamaimai sosai ba.
texts.t3134: Tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara yana yiwuwa, amma ba za a iya amfani da shi don yanke hukunci da tabbaci game da ciki ba.
texts.t3135: Wasu mutane na iya samun jin canje-canje a hanji ko ciki tun da wuri; amma a wannan lokacin, damuwa, PMS, da tsammanin ciki ma suna shafar jiki. Saboda haka, ba za a iya amfani da tashin zuciya a matsayin gwajin ciki na farko ba. A aikace, ya fi amfani a jira lokacin gwaji da ya dace maimakon ƙara nazarin kowane irin ji a jiki.
texts.t3136: amai da rashin ruwa a jiki
texts.t3137: tsananin ciwo ko zubar jini da ke faruwa lokaci guda
texts.t3138: tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara: zai yiwu ne
texts.t3139: tashin zuciya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara
texts.t3141: Ƙarin gajiya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara
texts.t3142: Gajiya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara
texts.t3143: Ƙarin gajiya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara na iya yiwuwa, amma tana da rashin takamaimai kamar yadda take a PMS, damuwa, ko matsalar barci.
texts.t3144: Wannan alama na iya kasancewa tare da farkon ciki, amma ita kaɗai ba ta tabbatar da komai ba.
texts.t3145: Gajiya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara alama ce mai rauni kuma marar takamaimai.
texts.t3146: Kafin jinin al’ada ya makara, yana da sauƙi musamman a danganta gajiya ta yau da kullum da ciki idan tsammanin ɗaukar ciki yana da muhimmanci a zuciya. A fannin likitanci, ya fi amfani a ɗauki gajiya a matsayin alama ta yanayi maimakon ma’aunin ganewa. Idan akwai tsananin rauni, fari a jiki, ko jiri, yana da muhimmanci a yi la’akari da wasu dalilai, ciki har da zubar jini, ƙarancin jini, da matsalolin gaggawa.
texts.t3150: ƙarin gajiya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara
texts.t3151: gajiya kafin jinin al’ada ya makara
texts.t3154: Gwajin hCG na jini ya dace idan ana buƙatar gwaji mai saurin gano ciki ko na wuri fiye da gwajin fitsari, ko kuma idan ana buƙatar a duba yadda matakin ke canzawa a yanayi mara tabbas.
texts.t3155: hCG yana da amfani musamman idan jinin al’ada ya makara, gwaje-gwaje suna da shakku, ko akwai ciwo ko zubar jini yayin da ake zargin farkon ciki.
texts.t3156: hCG hanya ce ta dakin gwaje-gwaje don tabbatarwa da sa ido kan farkon ciki.
texts.t3157: Ba kamar gwajin fitsari na gida ba, hCG na jini ya fi saurin gano ciki kuma ya dace da maimaita aunawa a tsawon lokaci. Wannan yana da muhimmanci musamman wajen tantance ko ciki yana ci gaba yadda ake tsammani, kawar da yiwuwar zubar da ciki na farko, ko tantance haɗarin ciki a wajen mahaifa tare da duban dan tayi da bayanan asibiti. Amma ƙima guda ɗaya kaɗai ba tare da mahallin bayani ba tana da iyakacin fassara.
texts.t3158: ciwo/zubar jini tare da gwaji mai kyau ko mai shakku
texts.t3162: Yadda za a fassara gwaji mai layi mai rauni amma mai kyau
texts.t3164: Gwaji mai layi mai rauni amma mai kyau yawanci yana nuna farkon ciki tare da ƙananan matakan hCG, amma yana buƙatar maimaita gwaji a tsawon lokaci da kuma mahallin asibiti.
texts.t3165: Layi mai kyau amma mai rauni ba lallai yana nufin matsala ba, amma kuma ba dalilin ɗaukar cewa an gama batun gaba ɗaya ba ne ba tare da sake dubawa ba.
texts.t3166: Gwaji mai kyau mai rauni yawanci yana buƙatar a maimaita gwaji ko a yi gwajin jinin hCG.
texts.t3167: Da zarar an yi gwajin da wuri, haka ake yawan ganin layin ya yi rauni. Wannan na iya dacewa da ciki na farko sosai na al’ada. Amma idan layin bai ƙara duhu ba, gwaje-gwajen suna nuna halaye marasa tabbas, ko kuma akwai ciwo da zubar jini, a fannin likitanci yana da muhimmanci a daina sa ido a gida kawai a koma ga tantancewar dakin gwaje-gwaje. Layi mai rauni ya fi zama farkon tattaunawa fiye da ƙarshenta.
texts.t3169: gwaje-gwaje ba sa ƙara duhu yayin da alamomi ke ci gaba
texts.t3170: yadda za a fassara gwaji mai layi mai rauni amma mai kyau
texts.t3173: Abin da za a yi idan jinin al’ada ya makara kuma gwaji mara kyau ne
texts.t3174: Jinin al’ada ya makara kuma gwaji mara kyau
texts.t3175: Idan jinin al’ada ya makara kuma gwaji mara kyau ne, yana da muhimmanci a yi la’akari da lokacin ovulation, a maimaita gwajin bayan awa 48, ko a yi gwajin hCG idan jinkirin ya ci gaba ko kuma akwai alamomi.
texts.t3176: Gwaji mara kyau yayin da jinin al’ada ya makara ba koyaushe yake rufe batun ba, musamman idan ovulation ya makara ko ba a san lokacin sa ba.
texts.t3177: Jinkirin jinin al’ada tare da gwaji mara kyau yana buƙatar sake duba lokaci da alamomi maimakon firgita.
texts.t3178: Idan ovulation ya sauya lokaci, jinkirin da kalanda ta nuna na iya zama ba jinkiri na zahiri ba. Saboda haka, mataki na gaba mai ma’ana shi ne a maimaita gwaji bayan awa 48, musamman idan an yi gwajin farko da wuri. Amma idan akwai ciwo, zubar jini, suma, ko tsananin rauni, jira a gida ba shi ne mafi kyawun zaɓi ba — dole ne a kawar da rikice-rikicen farkon ciki ko wata matsalar gaggawa daban.
texts.t3180: jinin al’ada ya makara + zubar jini
texts.t3181: abin da za a yi idan jinin al’ada ya makara kuma gwaji mara kyau ne
texts.t3182: jinin al’ada ya makara kuma gwaji mara kyau
texts.t3184: Yaushe ya kamata a gaggauta kawar da yiwuwar ciki a wajen mahaifa
texts.t3185: Yaushe za a gaggauta kawar da yiwuwar ciki a wajen mahaifa
texts.t3186: Dole ne a gaggauta kawar da yiwuwar ciki a wajen mahaifa idan gwaji mai kyau ko jinkirin jinin al’ada yana tare da ciwo a gefe ɗaya, zubar jini, suma, tsananin rauni, ko ciwon kafaɗa.
texts.t3187: Ciki a wajen mahaifa ba koyaushe yake zuwa da cikakken hoto na gargajiya ba, amma haɗuwar ciwo da alamomin ciki na buƙatar kulawa ta musamman sosai.
texts.t3188: Ciki a wajen mahaifa yana daga cikin muhimman abubuwan da dole a tantance cikin gaggawa a farkon ciki idan akwai ciwo ko zubar jini.
texts.t3189: NHS ta jaddada alamomin da aka fi gani: ciwo a ƙasa a gefe ɗaya, zubar jini daga farji ko ruwan kasa mai ruwa, ciwon kafaɗa, rashin jin daɗi yayin fitsari ko bayan gida, kuma idan ya fashe — tsananin ciwo, faduwa, jiri, da suma. Ya fi kyau a yi kuskure a bangaren neman tantancewar gaggawa fiye da jira 'har sai komai ya ƙara bayyana'.
texts.t3191: ciwon kafaɗa ko zubar jini tare da jinkirin jinin al’ada
texts.t3193: yaushe ya kamata a gaggauta kawar da yiwuwar ciki a wajen mahaifa
texts.t3194: yaushe za a gaggauta kawar da yiwuwar ciki a wajen mahaifa
texts.t3198: Haihuwa ita ce ikon samun ciki idan akwai ovulation, maniyyi mai inganci, bututun mahaifa a buɗe, da yanayi mai kyau don dashewar ƙwai.
texts.t3199: Haihuwa ba alama guda ɗaya ba ce ko gwaji guda ɗaya ba, sai dai sakamakon aiki tare na ovulation, hanyoyin haihuwa, maniyyi, shekaru, da lafiyar gaba ɗaya.
texts.t3200: Haihuwa ita ce ikon ɗaukar ciki ta dabi’a.
texts.t3201: A fannin likitanci, haihuwa ba ta takaitu ga shekaru ko hormones kaɗai ba. Don ciki ya samu, ana buƙatar: saduwa a lokacin tagar haihuwa, ovulation, ingancin maniyyi mai kyau, buɗewar bututun mahaifa, da yanayin mahaifa da ke ba da damar dashewar ƙwai.

texts.t3266: Babban kuskure a batun haihuwa shi ne neman shawara guda ɗaya cikakkiya maimakon a lokaci guda a yi la’akari da lokaci, ilimin zagayowar, shekaru, lafiyar ma’aurata, da lokacin da ya dace na komawa bincike.
texts.t3267: Abin da haihuwar mace ta dogara da shi
texts.t3268: Abin da haihuwa ta dogara da shi
texts.t3269: Haihuwar mace tana dogara da shekaru, ovulation, ajiyar ƙwai, yanayin bututun mahaifa da mahaifa, cututtukan da ke tare, da salon rayuwa.
texts.t3270: Babu abu guda ɗaya da ya shafi kowa: haihuwa tana raguwa ta hanyoyi daban-daban, kuma babban dalili na iya bambanta daga mutum zuwa mutum.
texts.t3271: Haihuwa tana dogara da matakai da dama na tsarin haihuwa.
texts.t3272: Muhimman abubuwa sun haɗa da shekaru, kasancewar ovulation da tsarinsa, endometriosis, PCOS, matsalar bututu, tiyata, kamuwa da cuta, matsalolin endocrine da ke tare, nauyin jiki, shan taba, da sauran abubuwan salon rayuwa.
texts.t3274: abin da haihuwar mace ta dogara da shi
texts.t3275: abin da haihuwa ta dogara da shi
texts.t3279: Shekaru suna shafar yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki musamman ta hanyar raguwar yawa da ingancin ƙwayayen haihuwa, kuma wannan abu yana ƙara bayyana musamman bayan shekara 35.
texts.t3280: Shekaru na ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan haihuwa mafi daidaito kuma mafi muhimmanci a ilimin halitta, ko da yake akwai bambancin mutum da mutum.
texts.t3281: Yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki ta dabi’a tana raguwa da shekaru.
texts.t3282: Shekaru ba wai kawai suna shafar damar samun ciki ba, har ma da haɗarin zubar da ciki da rikice-rikicen ciki. A fannin likitanci, wannan yana nufin a fara shiri da wuri kuma cikin sani, musamman idan tuni akwai zagayowar mara tsari ko wasu abubuwan haɗari.
texts.t3283: shekaru 35+ kuma babu ciki tsawon watanni 6
texts.t3290: Ajiyar ƙwai wata alama ce ta kai tsaye ba ba ta yawan follicles da suka rage da kuma yadda ovaries za su amsa ba, maimakon gwaji kai tsaye na haihuwa ta dabi’a a wannan lokacin.
texts.t3291: Raguwar ajiyar ƙwai ba ta nufin kai tsaye cewa ɗaukar ciki ta dabi’a ba zai yiwu ba, amma tana ba da muhimman bayanai game da tsawon lokacin haihuwa da ajiyar amsawa.
texts.t3292: Ajiyar ƙwai tantancewa ce ta yawan follicles da ovaries ke da su.
texts.t3293: AMH da ƙididdigar antral follicles suna taimakawa wajen tantance ajiyar ƙwai, musamman a fannin magungunan haihuwa. Amma bai kamata a yi amfani da irin waɗannan gwaje-gwajen a matsayin kayan hasashen haihuwa ta dabi’a ga kowa ba tare da wata manufar asibiti ba.
texts.t3294: ajiyar ƙwai mai ƙasa sosai a mahallin shiri
texts.t3295: saurin canjin zagayowar ko alamomin POI
texts.t3298: Yadda za a san lokacin da ya dace a fara binciken rashin haihuwa
texts.t3299: Lokacin da ya dace a fara tantancewa
texts.t3300: Ya kamata a fara binciken rashin haihuwa idan ƙoƙari ya wuce lokacin da ake tsammani ko kuma idan akwai bayyanannun abubuwan haɗari da ke sa jira bai dace ba.
texts.t3301: Babban jagora ba wai yawan watanni kaɗai ba ne, har ma da shekaru, tsari na ovulation, tarihin tiyata, endometriosis, kamuwa da cuta, da dalilin namiji.
texts.t3302: Fara bincike yana dogara da tsawon lokacin ƙoƙari da abubuwan haɗari.
texts.t3303: Idan akwai zagayowar mara tsari, zargin rashin ovulation, sanannen dalilin namiji, endometriosis, haɗarin bututu, ko dalilan shekaru, jira har zuwa daidaitaccen lokaci ba koyaushe yake da ma’ana ba.

texts.t3310: Bayan watanni nawa na ƙoƙari ya kamata a ga likita
texts.t3311: Bayan watanni nawa za a nemi taimako
texts.t3312: Yawanci, ana neman taimako bayan watanni 12 na ƙoƙari ga masu ƙasa da shekara 35, bayan watanni 6 ga masu shekara 35 zuwa sama, kuma ga masu sama da 40 ya fi kyau a tattauna tantancewa nan da nan.
texts.t3313: Waɗannan lokutan suna aiki ne ga saduwa ta yau da kullum ba tare da kariya ba kuma ba tare da wani sanannen dalilin rashin haihuwa ba.
texts.t3314: Lokacin neman taimako yana dogara da shekaru da mahallin yanayi.
texts.t3315: Idan akwai ovulation mara tsari ko wasu matsaloli bayyanannu, lokutan ma sun fi guntu.
texts.t3316: shekaru 35+ da fiye da watanni 6 ba tare da ciki ba
texts.t3318: bayan watanni nawa na ƙoƙari ya kamata a ga likita
texts.t3319: bayan watanni nawa za a nemi taimako
texts.t3321: Tsarin shiri kafin ɗaukar ciki mataki-mataki
texts.t3323: Shiri kafin ɗaukar ciki ya haɗa da tantance zagayowar, shan folic acid, duba magunguna, alluran rigakafi, kula da cututtuka masu ɗorewa, da fahimtar tagar haihuwa.
texts.t3324: Mafi kyawun tsarin kafin ciki ba tarin shawarwari marasa tsari ba ne, sai dai shiri mai daidaito na lafiya da lokaci.
texts.t3325: Shirin ciki yana farawa kafin gwaji ya nuna ciki.

texts.t3333: Ba a lissafa tagar haihuwa da wata almara ta rana ta 14 ba, sai dai da ainihin yiwuwar ovulation: yawanci kwanaki 5 kafin ovulation da ranar ovulation ɗin.
texts.t3334: Idan zagayowar na da tsari, lissafi ya fi sauƙi, amma idan ovulation yana canzawa, ya fi kyau a dogara da alamomin jiki maimakon kalanda kaɗai.
texts.t3335: Tagar haihuwa ita ce lokacin da yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki ta fi yawa a kusa da ovulation.
texts.t3336: Lissafin kalanda yana bada jagora ne kawai. Hanyar gida da ta fi daidaito ta haɗa da bin diddigin zagayowar, gwajin LH, da majinar mahaifa, maimakon kwanan wata guda ta lissafi.
texts.t3341: Mafi kyawun kwanaki don ɗaukar ciki
texts.t3342: Mafi kyawun kwanaki don ɗaukar ciki yawanci su ne kwanaki 1–2 kafin ovulation da ranar ovulation ɗin.
texts.t3343: Mafi yawan lokuta, kwanakin kafin ovulation su ne masu muhimmanci saboda maniyyi na iya rayuwa, yayin da ƙwai ke da gajeren lokaci.
texts.t3344: Mafi kyawun kwanaki don ɗaukar ciki yawanci suna gabanin ovulation.

texts.t3352: Fahimtar tagar haihuwa, saduwa akai-akai, sarrafa abubuwan salon rayuwa, da yin tantancewa a kan lokaci idan wani abu bai tafi daidai ba suna taimakawa wajen ƙara damar samun ciki ta dabi’a.
texts.t3353: Matakan da suka fi taimako suna da sauƙi: dacewa da kwanakin haihuwa, rage abubuwan da ke cutarwa, kuma kada a jinkirta bincike idan akwai matsaloli bayyanannu.
texts.t3354: Lokaci da lafiyar tsarin haihuwa gaba ɗaya suna ƙara damar samun ciki.
texts.t3355: Babu wani kari na sihiri ko biohack guda ɗaya da zai ƙara yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki sosai ga kowa. Abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci su ne: saduwa akai-akai a lokacin tagar haihuwa, daina shan taba, kiyaye nauyin jiki mai kyau, shan folic acid, da duba abubuwan da suka shafi ma’auratan.

texts.t3364: Salon rayuwa ba ya maye gurbin gano rashin haihuwa, amma yana shafar ovulation, ingancin maniyyi, da lafiyar haihuwa gaba ɗaya.

texts.t3375: Duka ƙarancin nauyi da yawan nauyi na iya rage yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki ta hanyar shafar ovulation da yanayin metabolism.
texts.t3376: Nauyi ba batun kyan gani kawai ba ne, yana daga cikin abubuwan ilimin halittar haihuwa.
texts.t3377: Nauyin jiki yana shafar yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki ta hanyar daidaiton hormones da metabolism.
texts.t3378: A fannin likitanci, ba lamba guda ɗaya ce kawai ke da muhimmanci ba, sai mahallin: saurin canjin nauyi, abinci, samuwar kuzari, insulin resistance, da zagayowar.

texts.t3386: Don ovulation, ba body mass index kaɗai ke da muhimmanci ba, har ma da samuwar kuzari, saurin rage nauyi, da gaba ɗayan saƙon tsaron metabolism.
texts.t3387: Ƙarancin nauyi na iya rikita ovulation.
texts.t3388: A yanayin ƙarancin kuzari, sakin GnRH na bugawa-bugawa yana raguwa, motsawar LH/FSH tana raguwa, kuma oligomenorrhea ko rashin ovulation yana faruwa.
texts.t3395: Yawan nauyi na iya rage yiwuwar ɗaukar ciki ta hanyar shafar ovulation, metabolism na insulin, da daidaiton hormones.
texts.t3396: Wannan ba yana nufin ciki ba zai yiwu ba, amma a fannin likitanci yawan nauyi na iya zama wani ɓangare na matsalar ovulation da nauyin metabolism.

texts.t3398: Matsalar sau da yawa tana da alaƙa da haɗuwar insulin resistance, PCOS, canje-canje na kumburi, da metabolism.
texts.t3404: Abinci yayin shirin ciki ya kamata ya tallafa wa isasshen kuzari, isasshen furotin, sinadarai masu gina jiki, da tsarin da za a iya ci gaba da shi, maimakon tsauraran takurawa.
texts.t3405: Babban buri shi ne shirya jiki don ɗaukar ciki da farkon ciki, ba kafa cikakkiyar tsarin abinci ko ta halin kaka ba.
texts.t3406: Abinci yayin TTC ya kamata ya zama isasshe kuma mai dorewa.
texts.t3407: ACOG tana jaddada isasshen abinci mai daidaito, duba ƙarancin sinadarai, da folic acid.
texts.t3414: Matsakaicin motsa jiki yana tallafa wa lafiyar haihuwa, amma yawan motsa jiki fiye da kima tare da ƙarancin kuzari na iya rikita ovulation.
texts.t3415: Yana da muhimmanci a bambance tsakanin motsa jiki mai lafiya da matsin horo tare da rashin isasshen murmurewa.
texts.t3416: Motsa jiki na iya tallafa wa haihuwa ko ya rikita ta.
texts.t3417: Motsi yana da amfani ga lafiyar metabolism da shirin ciki. Amma idan nauyin motsa jiki ya yi yawa sosai, musamman tare da takurawar abinci, rashin ovulation na iya faruwa.

texts.t3424: Barci yana da alaƙa da lafiyar haihuwa ta hanyar daidaiton hormones, jure damuwa, da murmurewar jiki gaba ɗaya.
texts.t3425: Mummunan barci ba shi kaɗai ne dalilin rashin haihuwa ba, amma ci gaba da rashin isasshen barci yana lalata yanayin metabolism da neuroendocrine.
texts.t3426: Barci wani ɓangare ne na yanayin da tsarin haihuwa ke aiki a ciki.
texts.t3427: Barci mai kyau yana shafar damuwa, sha’awar abinci, yanayi, ciwo, da ikon riƙe salon rayuwa mai dorewa.
texts.t3434: Damuwa na iya shafar zagayowar, rayuwar jima’i, da halayya, amma ita kaɗai ba ta bayyana kowane yanayi na rashin samun ciki ba.
texts.t3435: Yana da muhimmanci a guji duka ƙara girman rawar damuwa da kuma raina ta.
texts.t3436: Damuwa na iya wahalar da TTC, amma ba ita ce bayanin duniya ga rashin haihuwa ba.
texts.t3437: Damuwa na iya kawo cikas ga lokaci, barci, jima’i, da ovulation a wasu mutane masu saurin amsawa, amma ba ta maye gurbin bincike idan akwai ainihin matsala ba.
texts.t3445: Shan taba yana raunana haihuwa kuma yana da alaƙa da mummunan sakamakon haihuwa; saboda haka, idan ana TTC, daina shan taba na ɗaya daga cikin matakai mafi muhimmanci.

texts.t3469: Hanyar natsuwa ta fi amfani a fannin likitanci: kada a damu da kofi guda ɗaya, amma kuma kada a ɗauki yawan caffeine sosai a matsayin abu marar tasiri ga lafiyar gaba ɗaya, barci, da damuwa.

texts.t3477: Ya kamata a fara shan folic acid kafin ciki saboda rufewar neural tube tana faruwa da wuri, sau da yawa kafin a gane ciki.

texts.t3490: Hanyar ya kamata ta zama mai ma’ana: tantance cututtuka masu ɗorewa, kamuwa da cuta idan an nuna, matsayin garkuwar jiki, wani lokaci TSH, HbA1c, da sauran gwaje-gwaje gwargwadon mahallin yanayi.

texts.t3511: Kafin ɗaukar ciki, yana da muhimmanci a tantance haɗarin cututtukan da za su iya shafar tafiyar ciki, haihuwa, ko kuma su buƙaci magani a lokacin shiryawa.
texts.t3512: Ba batun yin cikakken gwaji ga komai ba ne, sai dai ɗaukar mataki mai niyya bisa tarihi, allurar rigakafi, da abubuwan haɗari.

texts.t3546: Shirya ciki ya fi tasiri kuma ya fi sauƙin ɗauka a zuciya idan aiki ne na haɗin gwiwa ga ma'aurata, ba aikin mutum ɗaya kaɗai ba.
texts.t3547: Hanyar haɗin gwiwa tana rage rashin daidaiton nauyi kuma tana taimakawa a yi la’akari da bangaren namiji, lokaci, damuwa, da ainihin ƙuntatawar abokan biyu a kan lokaci.

texts.t3555: Abin da za a yi idan ovulation ba ya zuwa a kai a kai
texts.t3556: Idan ovulation ba ya zuwa a kai a kai, yana da muhimmanci ba kawai a yi ƙoƙarin lissafa lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa ba, har ma a nemo dalili: PCOS, damuwa, ƙarancin kuzari, matsalolin thyroid, prolactin, da sauran abubuwa.
texts.t3557: Ovulation mara tsari ba kawai zagaye ne mai wahala ba, har ma alama ce ta asibiti da ke nuna yiwuwar matsalar ovulation.
texts.t3558: Ovulation mara tsari yana buƙatar a bi dalili.
texts.t3559: Idan ovulation ba a iya hasashensa, ƙoƙarin samun ciki ta hanyar kalanda yana ƙara wahala sosai. Amma babban tambayar ba ita ce yadda za a ƙara wayo wajen ƙirga kwanaki ba, sai dai me ya sa zagayen ba ya daidaita.

texts.t3565: Idan ciki bai samu ba, yana da muhimmanci kada a makale cikin bin diddigi mara ƙarewa, sai a matsa zuwa tantance ma'aurata cikin tsari a kan lokaci.
texts.t3566: Mataki na gaba yana danganta da shekaru, tsawon lokacin ƙoƙari, daidaiton ovulation, bangaren namiji, da sauran haɗurra.
texts.t3567: Idan ciki bai samu ba, ana buƙatar tsari, ba ƙarin damuwa da shawarwarin intanet kawai ba.
texts.t3568: Tsari mai amfani: tabbatar da lokaci da yawan saduwa, tantance zagaye, la’akari da shekaru, bangaren namiji, ciwo, tiyata, cututtuka, da cututtuka masu ɗorewa, sannan a ci gaba da bincike mai niyya.

texts.t3575: Jima'i a lokacin al'ada yana yiwuwa, amma jin daɗi, tsafta, haɗarin kamuwa da cuta, da yiwuwar ciki suna danganta da yanayin mutum.
texts.t3576: Ga wasu mutane, jima'i a lokacin al'ada abin karɓa ne kuma mai daɗi; ga wasu kuma ba haka ba ne. A asibiti, yarda, kariya, jin daɗi, da fahimtar cewa al'ada ba ta kawar da haɗarin cututtukan da ake ɗauka ta jima'i da ciki ba suna da muhimmanci.
texts.t3577: Jima'i a lokacin al'ada ba a haramta shi kai tsaye ba, amma yana buƙatar irin ƙa'idodin tsaro da jin daɗi kamar sauran kwanakin zagaye.
texts.t3578: Al'ada ba ta sa jima'i ya zama mai cutarwa ko haɗari kai tsaye ba. Amma tana iya canza yanayin aikace-aikace: jini ya fi yawa, mannewa ya bambanta, yiwuwar rashin jin daɗi, tashin hankali na tunani, da batutuwan tsafta. Kariyar shinge har yanzu tana da muhimmanci, kuma dole ne a cire tampon ko kofin al'ada kafin jima'i. Idan jima'i yana tare da ciwo, wari, zazzabi, ko tsananin rashin jin daɗi, to ba batun zaɓi kawai ba ne.

texts.t3626: An ba fifiko ga ASRM, ACOG, CDC, da bita kan bin diddigin ovulation da man shafawa; ƙa'idoji masu amfani a aikace sun fi muhimmanci a wannan sashe fiye da tatsuniyoyi.

texts.t3642: A batun jima'i da zagaye, babban tushen kuskure shi ne gauraya ilimin halittar lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa da shahararrun al'adu da tatsuniyoyin ɗabi'a; shawarwari masu amfani a aikace yawanci sun fi sauƙi fiye da yadda masu amfani suke tsammani.
texts.t3643: Shin jima'i a lokacin al'adarki yana da lafiya?
texts.t3645: Jima'i a lokacin al'ada na iya zama lafiya idan ana so, yana da daɗi, kuma an yi amfani da kariya mai dacewa, amma al'ada ba ta kawar da haɗarin cututtukan da ake ɗauka ta jima'i ba.
texts.t3646: Kariyar shinge da kula da alamomi suna da muhimmanci a kowane mataki na zagaye, har da lokacin al'ada.
texts.t3647: Lafiyar jima'i a lokacin al'ada ba ta dogara da kasancewar jini ba, sai dai matakin kariya, jin daɗi, da rashin alamomin da ke tayar da hankali.
texts.t3648: Za a iya yin jima'i a lokacin al'ada idan ba ya jawo ciwo kuma idan ana bin irin ƙa'idodin tsaron jima'i kamar kowane lokaci: yarda, hanyar hana ɗaukar ciki mai dacewa, kariya daga cututtukan da ake ɗauka ta jima'i, da rashin yin watsi da alamomi. Jini ba hanyar hana ɗaukar ciki ba ce kuma ba ya soke kariyar shinge. Yanayin jiki da ƙwayoyin cuta a lokacin al'ada ba sa sa mutum ya zama “mai kariya” daga cututtuka.
texts.t3651: babu kariya mai dacewa idan akwai haɗarin cututtukan da ake ɗauka ta jima'i
texts.t3652: shin jima'i a lokacin al'adarki yana da lafiya?
texts.t3655: Za a iya samun ciki a lokacin al'ada?
texts.t3657: Eh, samun ciki a lokacin al'ada yana yiwuwa, musamman idan zagaye gajere ne, ovulation yana zuwa da wuri, ko kuma an ɗauki zubar jini a matsayin al'ada ta yau da kullum.
texts.t3658: Al'ada ba kariya ce mai dogaro daga ciki ba. Haɗarin yana danganta da ainihin lokacin ovulation da tsawon rayuwar maniyyi.
texts.t3659: Jima'i a lokacin al'ada ba ya ba da tabbacin cewa ciki ba zai samu ba.
texts.t3660: Babban dalilin ruɗani shi ne mutane suna tunani ne ta kalanda: “tun da ina al'ada, ovulation yana da nisa.” Amma idan zagaye gajere ne ko ovulation ba ya daidaita, maniyyi na iya rayuwa har zuwa lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa. Bugu da ƙari, ba duk zubar jini ba ne cikakkiyar al'ada: zubar jini tsakanin al'adu ko zubar jini da wuri na iya sa a yi kuskuren fassara.
texts.t3661: jima'i ba tare da kariya ko hanyar hana ɗaukar ciki ba
texts.t3662: gajerun zagaye ko zagaye marasa tsari
texts.t3663: zargin ciki bayan zubar jini da ba a saba gani ba
texts.t3664: za a iya samun ciki a lokacin al'ada?
texts.t3667: Jima'i a lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa
texts.t3668: Jima'i a lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa shi ne mafi muhimmanci don samun ciki domin maniyyi na iya rayuwa na kwanaki da dama, yayin da ƙwai ke rayuwa na ɗan gajeren lokaci.
texts.t3669: A aikace, ya fi muhimmanci kada a jira takamaiman ranar ovulation, sai dai a yi jima'i a kwanakin da lokacin ya riga ya buɗe.
texts.t3670: Lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa shi ne kwanakin da damar samun ciki ta fi yawa a kusa da ovulation.
texts.t3671: A ilimin halitta, lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa yawanci yana rufe kwanaki 5 kafin ovulation da ranar ovulation. Saboda haka, muhimmin saduwa sau da yawa ba ta faruwa “daidai lokacin ovulation” ba, sai dai kwana 1–2 kafin shi. A wannan ma'ana, sa ido kan majinar mahaifa, gwajin LH, da tsarin zagaye gaba ɗaya sun fi amfani fiye da dogaro da ranar kalanda kaɗai.
texts.t3672: rashin fahimtar lokacin haihuwa mafi yiwuwa yayin ƙoƙarin samun ciki
texts.t3673: dogon ƙoƙari ba tare da nasara ba
